hits.title: PORTUGAL YOGA RETREAT 19-24 MAY 2026 — INSPIRO YOGA
hits.snippet:
Check out is at 11am.   
   ## How do I get to the venue?

Cucumbi is located about 1 hour 15min from Lisbon and it’s easy to find an Uber or taxi to get there. Usually a ride is about 60€ with an Uber. Taxis tend to overcharge from our experience.

We’re happy to connect you to others to share the cost.

You might also want to get a rental car, which can be nice if you plan to stay a few days extra beofre/after the retreat as well as if you want to explore a bit around Cucumbi while you’re at the retreat.   
   ## How can I know if your yoga retreat will suit me and my level of yoga?

The best way to know this is to take one of our FREE CLASSES, to get a taste of how we teach. [...] _7.30PM__:_ DINNER

_NOTE__: The retreat starts at 5pm on the day of arrival with a welcome circle & yoga practice and ends at 11am on the last day._

# The Package

   6 days and 5 nights at Cucumbi Farm, with access to the entire 112-hectare property, featuring lakes, hiking trails, a saltwater pool, and various indoor and outdoor spaces and a beautiful restaurant area.

   Daily 2-hour Morning Practice with Lisa

   Daily 90-minute Afternoon Yoga / Breath-work / Dance with dif. teachers

   Generous brunch buffet

   Three-course farm-to-table dinner

   Group breathwork session with _Anna Prana Ehrenfeldt_

   Daily morning & afternoon snack

   Herbal tea, coffee & fresh fruit available throughout the day

   Free use of bikes, canoes, and stand-up paddle boards [...] The farm offers 10 beautifully minimalist rooms, each with its own ensuite bathroom. You’ll find double rooms with queen- or king-size beds, as well as twin rooms. Some of the rooms are located in spacious apartments that come with their own kitchen, fireplace, and living room.

In addition to its beautifully designed rooms, Cucumbi features a large saltwater swimming pool, a spacious living room, a gorgeous communal kitchen with an honesty bar, a small shop, and a stunning restaurant where meals will be served.

The impressive 112-hectare farmland includes two trails (3-5 km) that take you through breathtaking landscapes of rolling hills and around several lakes.

You can use the bikes and stand-up paddle boards or even take a canoe ride on the lake.

# The Program

Imagine having time to sleep in (no alarm!), waking up when your body wants to, morning walks in breath taking nature, and refreshing lake-swims surrounded by flowers and cork trees.

**This retreat is all about slowing things down.****For real.**

It’s about disconnecting from the busyness of life, to-do lists and outside distractions.

The energy of Cucumbi is hard to put into words — it has to be experienced. One thing’s for sure: it’s the perfect place to connect with nature and with yourself.

**To just _be._**

For this retreat we’ll gather for our morning practice at 8.30am. This class includes meditation, journaling, dynamic open-level Vinyasa and a long well-deserved Savasana.

In the afternoons, we’ll come together again for a slower, more inward-focused session blending Yin Yoga, myo-fascial release, restorative yoga, meditation, and pranayama.

If you’ve never practiced with us before, we recommend trying one of our [**FREE CLASSES**](https://www.inspiroyoga.com/free-classes) or feel free to [email us](mailto:INFO@INSPIROYOGA.COM?subject=PORTUGAL%20RETEAT%20-%20QUESTION%20ABOUT%20YOGA) with any questions about our classes.

![Image 15](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/64dc7fc40cfc861339788d64/07869a72-5621-4ab8-ade8-18f2185687e8/emily_jean_photography_cucumbi_restaurant001_52774617574_o.jpg)

# The Food

During this retreat, you’ll pamper yourself with incredible homemade, wholesome food, much of which is prepared with produce straight from Cucumbi’s own veggie garden.

After the morning practice, a generous brunch buffet will be served at 10.30am. Expect everything from fresh juices and smoothies, locally made sourdough bread, yogurt, and homemade granola to eggs from the farm’s chickens, local cheeses, and fresh fruit.

In the afternoon there will be some healthy light snacks and savoury treats to refuel.

Our afternoon yoga session is scheduled so you’ll have the chance to enjoy an aperitif or glass of wine while watching the sunset, either by the pool or by the lake.

Around 7.30 pm, we’ll be treated to a gorgeous three-course, colourful farm-to-table dinner. We promise it will be a feast for the senses!

**_Note_**: If you have any food allergies or dietary restrictions, like lactose- or gluten-free needs, please mention them in the booking form, and we’ll pass them on to the chef.

# Our Venue

## CUCUMBI - _AN OASIS of tranquility_

Cucumbi is one of those places where, as soon as you arrive, your shoulders drop from your ears, and a sense of calmness washes over you. The energy here is truly special, and it’s something you’ll definitely want to experience.

Cucumbi Farm is located in the tiny village of _Barrancão_ in the _Alentejo_ region, southeast of Lisbon, about 30 minutes inland from the coast and roughly 1,5 hour drive from Lisbon.

The farm offers 10 beautifully minimalist rooms, each with its own ensuite bathroom. You’ll find double rooms with queen- or king-size beds, as well as twin rooms. Some of the rooms are located in spacious apartments that come with their own kitchen, fireplace, and living room.

In addition to its beautifully designed rooms, Cucumbi features a large saltwater swimming pool, a spacious living room, a gorgeous communal kitchen with an honesty bar, a small shop, and a stunning restaurant where meals will be served.

**The impressive 112-hectare farmland** includes two trails (3-5 km) that take you through breathtaking landscapes of rolling hills and around several lakes.

You can use the bikes and stand-up paddle boards or even take a canoe ride on the lake.

We KNOW you’ll fall in love with Cucumbi — it’s as simple as that. The only downside? You might not want to leave.

## HOW TO GET HERE

Whether traveling from Lisbon center or the airport, the easiest (and by far the cheapest) way to reach Cucumbi is by Uber or Bolt (around €60) or by renting a car on your own or sharing it with others. The ride takes about 1 hour to 1 hour 15 minutes.

We’re more than happy to connect you with others to share the ride.

# Your Teacher

## LISA ANDERSSON RHODINER (SWE)

_CO-FOUNDER INSPIRO YOGA & LEAD TEACHER_

Lisa Andersson Rhodiner is an experienced Vinyasa, Yin, and Meditation teacher, teacher trainer, mentor, and business coach for yoga teachers.

Since completing her first teacher training in Bali in 2012, she has dedicated her life to yoga, accumulating over 1,000 hours of advanced yoga studies and more than 6,000 teaching hours.

As a Yoga Alliance E-RYT 500 certified teacher and YACEP (Continuing Education Provider), Lisa has led over 20 international yoga teacher trainings, certifying more than 150 yoga teachers worldwide, and has hosted more than 100 retreats across Europe, Asia, and beyond.

Known for her empowering, slow yet strong flow classes and deeply restorative Yin sessions, Lisa weaves in thoughtful themes and seamless transitions, offers intentional hands-on adjustments, and always pairs the practice with a carefully curated playlist.

**_10.30AM_**: GENEROUS BRUNCH

POOL-TIME / MASSAGE / LAKE-SWIMS / SUP & CANOEING / BIKING / SIESTAS / AFTERNOON SNACK

# The Package

*   6 days and 5 nights at Cucumbi Farm, with access to the entire 112-hectare property, featuring lakes, hiking trails, a saltwater pool, and various indoor and outdoor spaces and a beautiful restaurant area.

*   Daily 2-hour Morning Practice with Lisa

*   Daily 90-minute Afternoon Yoga / Breath-work / Dance with dif. teachers

*   Generous brunch buffet

*   Three-course farm-to-table dinner

*   Group breathwork session with _Anna Prana Ehrenfeldt_

*   Daily morning & afternoon snack

*   Herbal tea, coffee & fresh fruit available throughout the day

*   Free use of bikes, canoes, and stand-up paddle boards

**_NOTE_**_: Your flight and transport to/from Cucumbi are not included._

## WHAT YOU CAN ADD

*   Massage

*   Ceramic Workshop (a minimum of people required)

*   Private Breath-work Session

# The Pricing (per person)

## _Shared apartment_**1799€-1899€*****SOLD OUT**

Stay in a single bed in a room for two people. All twin rooms are located in beautiful spacious apartments (1-3 rooms) each with a kitchenette, living room, and fireplace. Some rooms have ensuite bathrooms, some have shared. There’s free Wi-Fi, air conditioning, a hair dryer, pool towels, and organic toiletries from Portuguese brand _8950_.

## _DOUBLE ROOM FOR TWO_**1599€-1799€* SOLD OUT**

Stay in a double room with a queen-size bed and an ensuite bathroom. Some rooms feature a private terrace with a garden view, while others don’t. The room has free Wi-Fi, air conditioning, a hair dryer, pool towels, and organic toiletries from Portuguese brand _8950_.

## _Single Room_**2299€-2399€* SOLD OUT**

Enjoy a double room all to yourself, featuring a queen-size bed and ensuite bathroom. Some rooms offer a private terrace with a garden view, while others do not. The room has free Wi-Fi, air conditioning, a hair dryer, pool towels, and organic toiletries from Portuguese brand _8950._

![Image 41: Cucumbi (10).jpeg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/64dc7fc40cfc861339788d64/3c32f711-df73-4d13-bc0b-43f23db32091/Cucumbi+%2810%29.jpeg)

![Image 42: Cucumbi-10.jpeg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/64dc7fc40cfc861339788d64/a9e03e7c-8e5d-4cd5-a6f5-1dacd362ffc5/Cucumbi-10.jpeg)

![Image 43: Cucumbi-9.jpeg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/64dc7fc40cfc861339788d64/ae12ae2f-bd59-4a22-a5e7-691f90ee9a90/Cucumbi-9.jpeg)

![Image 44: cucumbi-51_53704011667_o.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/64dc7fc40cfc861339788d64/73a9ca2e-cc3b-4bf2-a88c-086b979213f6/cucumbi-51_53704011667_o.jpg)

![Image 45: emily_jean_vanweydeveld_cucumbi_2305_072_52940712755_o.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/64dc7fc40cfc861339788d64/d32c966a-e197-4b32-9cee-fd95b4ca344b/emily_jean_vanweydeveld_cucumbi_2305_072_52940712755_o.jpg)

![Image 46: R7 - 4.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/64dc7fc40cfc861339788d64/c591ff2e-070d-4bdc-a9c1-c9fea2e913ce/R7+-+4.jpg)

![Image 48: cucumbi_52474417428_o.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/64dc7fc40cfc861339788d64/551b5311-e187-4648-bf17-c598642531b0/cucumbi_52474417428_o.jpg)

# Still have questions?

If there is anything we haven’t covered here, please drop us a line at [info@inspiroyoga.com](mailto:info@inspiroyoga.com)

*    
## When can I check in/out?

CHECK IN / ARRIVAL DAY

Check in at Cucumbi Farm is at 2pm. If you arrive earlier you can leave your bags and either chill by the pool or have a little hike.

CHECK OUT / DEPARTURE DAY

**Check out is at 11am** after our morning class and a brunch. The schedule on the last day will be slightly different, with a 90 min yoga class starting at 8am (instead of 8.30am) and the brunch starting at 9.30am.   
*   ## What's the schedule like the first/last day?

Check in is from 2pm.

The retreat starts at 5pm. We’ll gather in the yoga shala or outside for an introduction, followed by a grounding yoga practice and dinner.

The retreat ends after our morning yoga class (this class will be 90min) and brunch on the last day of the retreat.

**Check out is at 11am.**   
*   ## How do I get to the venue?

Cucumbi is located about 1 hour 15min from Lisbon and it’s easy to find an Uber or taxi to get there. Usually a ride is about 60€ with an Uber. Taxis tend to overcharge from our experience.

We’re happy to connect you to others to share the cost.

You might also want to get a rental car, which can be nice if you plan to stay a few days extra beofre/after the retreat as well as if you want to explore a bit around Cucumbi while you’re at the retreat.   
*   ## How can I know if your yoga retreat will suit me and my level of yoga?

The best way to know this is to take one of our [FREE CLASSES](https://www.inspiroyoga.com/free-classes), to get a taste of how we teach.

If you’re someone who likes a dynamic practice, with a bit of challenges then you’ll probably like it. If you’re more into a more gentle yoga, probably not.   
*   ## I'm travelling alone, is this ok?

Absolutely! The majority of our guests travel alone and you’ll see that you’ll make a lot of new friends!   
*   ## What's you cancellation and refund policy?

Please see our [Terms & Conditions](https://www.inspiroyoga.com/terms-conditions).   
*   ## Do you offer payment plans?

Sure, just get in touch as you make the bookings and we can set that up. The retreat must still be fully paid 30 days prior to start.   
*   ## What's the adress of the venue?

**Herdade Serra dos Mendes**

**Santa Susana 7580-701**

**Portugal**

(+351) 911 955 298   
*   ## What shall I bring?

RECOMMENDED PACKING LIST

    *   Your own yoga mat (if you like! (there are also mats available onsite)

    *   A journal

    *   Refillable water bottle

    *   Sneakers

    *   Flip flops/sandals

    *   Sunglasses

    *   Swimwear

    *   Yoga clothes

    *   Sunscreen

    *   Warm socks (sometimes Portuguese floors can be cold early mornings)

    *   Ear plugs and sleeping mask if you’re a light sleeper and will be sharing room with someone.

    *   Possibly a raincoat (check the weather forecast)

*   ## Do I need to bring my own sheets or towels?

No, you don't need to bring any of those as the venue will provide that.   
*   ## What's the weather like in May?

The weather can vary (as with everywhere!) but normally it’s around 18-25 degrees during the day. Temperature can drop at night. The days can be warm and sunny and evenings/nights chilly. Make sure you check the weather forecast before you pack.

### Who are we?

We are a team of yogis who came together to put our energy into making the world a better place by connecting you with life-changing yoga retreats, meditation retreats, wellness retreats, and yoga teacher trainings. We are all about spreading love!

### Why choose us?

We aren't just a business, we are family. When you book with us, you can be sure that your experience will be full of love, security, understanding, and joy every step of the way. From helping you find the perfect retreat to taking care of you when things go wrong, we treat you like family.

## Find and compare 20 Yoga Retreats in Lisbon, Portugal

Paying a visit to Portugal's capital city will immerse you into the magic of Portuguese culture and art scene. From memorable monuments like Torre de Belém to picturesque areas like Alfama, your Lisbon yoga retreat is bound for all things awe-inspiring. Plus, the weather's pleasant all year round and they've got friendly locals no matter where you go. It's only a matter of time before you fall completely head over heels with the place. ### Who are we?

We are a team of yogis who came together to put our energy into making the world a better place by connecting you with life-changing yoga retreats, meditation retreats, wellness retreats, and yoga teacher trainings. We are all about spreading love!

### Why choose us?

We aren't just a business, we are family. When you book with us, you can be sure that your experience will be full of love, security, understanding, and joy every step of the way. From helping you find the perfect retreat to taking care of you when things go wrong, we treat you like family.

Yoga retreat by the sea May 2026

Yoga Retreat for Women Portugal May 2026 [...] ##### Location

We share all the good vibes of this laid-back location. The charming and truly unique retreat house by the sea offers a special atmosphere, surrounded by the national park, Sintra’s castles, and the coastline of Azenhas do Mar just around the corner. Simply being here and feeling this grounding energy, is a reset for your nervous system.

With a variety of room types, from suites to glamping, plus stunning sunset views, cozy chill-out spaces, a fireplace, and a spacious outdoor area with a swimming pool, the house is designed for comfort and ease. There are dedicated spaces for practicing yoga both indoors and outdoors, so you can enjoy your practice in any weather. All of this is just minutes from the ocean.

##### Feel

This Yoga Retreat in Portugal is a **high vibe retreat,** happening again in **May and September/October 2026.**It offers you an utterly amazing experience that you won´t forget. It is designed to show you the way back to your core essence, that shining easeful self. Just imagine; spending **7 days with fresh new impulses,** movements and relaxation, shared real-life experiences, support of a experience charismatic teachers and an supporting group of new friends, a stunning location, only minutes away from the sea.

##### Location

We share all the good vibes of this laid-back location. The charming and truly unique **retreat house by the sea** offers a **special atmosphere, surrounded by the national park, Sintra’s castles, and the coastline of Azenhas do Mar** just around the corner. Simply being here and **feeling this grounding energy, is a reset for your nervous system.**

With a variety of room types, from suites to glamping, plus stunning sunset views, cozy chill-out spaces, a **fireplace, and a spacious outdoor area with a swimming pool**, the house is designed for comfort and ease. There are dedicated spaces for practicing **yoga both indoors and outdoors**, so you can enjoy your practice in any weather. All of this is just **minutes from the ocean.**

##### Dates:

### Holistic Yoga Retreat in Portugal 2026

### **Spring Awakening: May 23 – 29, 2026**

Long Summer Nights and Mild Days

* Perfect Temperatures, Nature in Bloom, Extended Daylight.

### **Late summer: September 27 – October 3, 2026**

Golden Summer Days

* Warm and Inviting: Early autumn remains sunny and warm, with temperatures hovering between 25–30°C particularly in September, offering more serene surroundings for retreats.
* Golden Light: The softer, golden light of autumn enhances Portugal’s natural beauty, making it a stunning time for photography or simply basking in the scenery.

Surf and retreat May 2023 Portugal

##### Join us!

Group size is limited. This retreat will sell out. Book your spot while you can. Feel uplifted, connected and like a more radiant and relaxed version of yourself.

##### Anke

hits.title: Lisbon Yoga and Meditation Retreat — Light Inside Yoga
hits.snippet:
Through breath-led yoga classes and workshops to remember your purpose and priorities, lots of free time to rest, enjoy the expanse of nature at our doorstep, site see and explore the region while making great memories with new friends, you’ll explore the space between doing and being, sound and silence, effort and ease. It’s here that simplicity becomes powerful, and in that simplicity, you’re invited to rediscover clarity, innate spaciousness, and a deep sense of belonging within yourself, your life & your community.

See Room Options + Pricing

See Room Options + Pricing

 #### 

  📍 Location: A private luxury-retreat center on a century-old heritage farm in the countryside south of Lisbon, Portugal

  Dates: May 1-6, 2026

  Check in: 3:00p

  Check out: 10:00a
 #### [...] By registering with your deposit, you electronically sign the Waiver & Liability Release - Read it Here

  Payment plans are available.

  25% deposit due upon registration or by October 1, 2025

  Half payment due by January 15, 2026

  Final payment due by March 1, 2026
 #### 

  A typical day begins with a deep, embodied morning yoga practice, followed by an absolutely delicious brunch made by our private, world-class chef.

  You’ll have lots of free time for excursions or taking a day trip to Lisbon, lounging at the pool or getting a spa massage.

  We’ll have an amazing family-style, 3 course dinner together.

  Some days we’ll have an inspiring afternoon workshop or movement session or a sunset/evening restorative class. [...] These sessions may include slow flow, viniyoga, yin yoga, breathwork, guided meditation and Yoga Nidra, sound baths, myofascial release, somatic experiencing, journaling, and philosophy discussions - offering a rich, integrative approach to body, mind, and nervous system restoration.

  Niki’s teaching draws on the full yogic lineage of Patanjali’s Yoga Sutras, with a trauma-informed, inclusive approach that honors every body size, condition, and experience level. While group classes cultivate connection and shared energy, individual guidance ensures your unique needs and intentions are met throughout the retreat.

  All yoga equipment and mats are provided for your comfort and ease.

# The Space Between

## May 1 - 6, 2026

[all inclusive rates start at $2,400](/portugal-retreat-2026)

[all inclusive rates start at $2,400](/portugal-retreat-2026)

#### A week to clear your mind, reconnect with your self, nourish your body through Yoga, hikes and site seeing, eat delicious meals prepared by our world class chef and enjoy beautiful nature in kindhearted community, just 40 minutes south of Lisbon.

### Registration closes on April 15th.

**RETREAT SNAPSHOT**

**In a world that moves fast and asks for too much, this retreat offers something radical: space. Set on an organic farm just outside Lisbon, this is a place to pause, soften and come back to what matters.**

**Through breath-led yoga classes and workshops to remember your purpose and priorities, lots of free time to rest, enjoy the expanse of nature at our doorstep, site see and explore the region while making great memories with new friends, you’ll explore the space between doing and being, sound and silence, effort and ease. It’s here that simplicity becomes powerful, and in that simplicity, you’re invited to rediscover clarity, innate spaciousness, and a deep sense of belonging within yourself, your life & your community.**

[See Room Options + Pricing](/portugal-retreat-2026)

[See Room Options + Pricing](/portugal-retreat-2026)

* #### 

  📍 **Location:** A private luxury-retreat center on a century-old heritage farm in the countryside south of Lisbon, Portugal

  **Dates:** May 1-6, 2026

  Check in: 3:00p

  Check out: 10:00a
* #### 

  Lisbon (LIS) International Airport – is approximately 35 minutes away by car.

  Shuttle options available and there is parking at the retreat center if you choose to rent a car.
* #### 

  Daily Yoga, breathwork & meditation classes all week long + high quality yoga equipment

  A gorgeous private or shared bedroom with private terrace or balcony and private bathroom

  Daily brunch and dinner prepared by our world-class private chef (farm fresh and organic)

  Light snacks, beverages available throughout the day

  Laundry facilities available

  2 months of Premium Membership at Light Inside Yoga when you sign up by March 1

  Access to on-site amenities: pool, sauna, walking trails, farm, nature reserve, and lagoon

  Support to organize extra excursions to Lisbon city and surrounding heritage sites

  Select excursions to Azeitão town, Meco Beach, Arrábida nature preserve, and Lagoa de Albufeira *for an additional fee*

  Transport to and from Lisbon airport *for an additional fee*
* #### 

  Travel to/from Lisbon, Portugal at designated times (can arrange for $50 fee)

  Travel insurance

  Offsite excursions and tours

  Spa services

  Private sessions with Niki

  Gratuity for chef
* #### 

  **A non-refundable deposit of $750 or 25% of a room buyout confirms and holds your space on the retreat. Any discounts will be applied to the remaining balance.**

  You can choose a room buyout to ensure you have the room all to yourself, share a room with someone you know, or the team at Light Inside Yoga will pair you with an appropriate roommate.

  Starting at $2,150 for a shared room

  **Payment plans are available.**

  **Reservation & Payment Information**  
  To reserve your space, a $750 non-refundable deposit is required per person in a shared room. A 25% non-refundable deposit is required for any room buyouts or rooms in any of the houses. The remaining balance will be invoiced separately, with payment options available via credit card, Zelle, or Venmo.

  **Deposit Information**

  Costs are in USD$ and include all meals, classes & accommodations.

  By registering with your deposit, you electronically sign the Waiver & Liability Release - [Read it Here](https://lightinsideyoga.com/retreat-policies)

  **Payment plans are available.**

  25% deposit due upon registration or by October 1, 2025

  Half payment due by January 15, 2026

  Final payment due by March 1, 2026
* #### 

  **A typical day begins with a deep, embodied morning yoga practice, followed by an absolutely delicious brunch made by our private, world-class chef.**

  You’ll have lots of free time for excursions or taking a day trip to Lisbon, lounging at the pool or getting a spa massage.

  We’ll have an amazing family-style, 3 course dinner together.

  **Some days we’ll have an inspiring afternoon workshop or movement session or a sunset/evening restorative class.**

  These sessions may include slow flow, viniyoga, yin yoga, breathwork, guided meditation and Yoga Nidra, sound baths, myofascial release, somatic experiencing, journaling, and philosophy discussions - offering a rich, integrative approach to body, mind, and nervous system restoration.

  Niki’s teaching draws on the full yogic lineage of Patanjali’s Yoga Sutras, with a trauma-informed, inclusive approach that honors every body size, condition, and experience level. While group classes cultivate connection and shared energy, individual guidance ensures your unique needs and intentions are met throughout the retreat.

  All yoga equipment and mats are provided for your comfort and ease.

  For deeper personalization, optional one-on-one sessions with Niki are available to explore specific aspects of your practice or healing journey.

  [**See an example daily schedule here.**](/lisbon-countryside-2026#lisbonretreatschedule)

### A sample day on retreat:

**Each day begins with a Yoga class and brunch, and ends with a movement class and mindfulness workshop, followed by dinner. You will have tons of free time during the day to rest, get a massage or take an excursion.**

7:00 AM - Morning happy hour: coffee, tea & fresh juice, fruit + light bites

8:00 AM - Yoga & Mobility practice + guided meditation

9:30 AM - Organic, farm-fresh brunch on the terrace

10:30 AM - Excursion off-site or nature walk to the lagoon

2:00 PM - Afternoon snacks, farm tour or quiet solo time,

5:30 PM - Mindfulness workshop & Yoga practice

6:30 PM - Dinner by our private chef

8:00 PM - Sunset Yin Yoga + Meditative Journaling

What guests are saying:

* ## Niki skillfully & intentionally took a group of strangers and built a heartfelt community. She was able to transition from leader to group member, modeling how to bring your whole self to the retreat. It was a truly special experience to go on retreat with Niki.

  Esther Kotecha
* ## This may sound contrived or cheesy, but my first retreat with NIki was truly transformative and life-changing. The thought, care, and intention that went into planning the retreat was evident every hour of every day. Through the practices and engagement with the other attendees, I came to some self-understandings that had been hidden from me for years if not decades. My husband and I signed up for the next one on the books while we were literally in the cab leaving our first retreat.

  Bri T.
* ## This retreat wasn't long, but I felt the effects for months to follow! The whole experience was a reset for the way I approached life and even thought about myself and my body. My intention was to separate from work + reconnect with myself as a being, not an achiever. Mission accomplished!

  Angela Harvey
* ## I came to the Retreat feeling so disconnected from myself. I have had ongoing stresses for 5+ years and have been trying to manage. The structure of your retreat was so perfect, your encouragement was helpful and kind. My peace of mind is back & I have you to thank.

  Carolyn Steinberg
* ## Going on Niki's retreat allowed me to, for a brief but wonderful time, remove myself from the chaos of the world and focus on what really matters. Every part of the retreat experience was purposeful and meaningful, and I left feeling our shared experiences and intentions had rapidly built a powerful community. The retreat gave me what I needed to go back into the world with a renewed, clarified mindset.

  Tanner H.

**Four spots available for this intimate, co-ed retreat experience.**

Experience the beauty of Portugal through daily yoga, coastal adventures, and soul-deep reconnection.

[join the retreat](/portugal-retreat-2026)

[join the retreat](/portugal-retreat-2026)

# Still have questions?

## FAQs

* #### 

  Your registration includes:  
  – 5 nights of accommodations at a luxury private retreat venue in the countryside south of Lisbon  
  – All nourishing, seasonal meals from arrival to departure  
  – Daily yoga practices, embodied workshops, and guided meditations  
  – Full use of yoga props and retreat materials  
  – Access to on-site amenities including the sauna, pool, nature trails, farm, and private lagoon  
  – Some excursions to help you explore the land and local culture  
  – Optional group transport to and from Lisbon airport (at designated times)
* #### 

  You’ll be responsible for:  
  – Flights to and from Lisbon  
  – Travel insurance (required for all guests)  
  – Gratuities   
  – Any personal add-ons such as spa treatments, private yoga sessions, or off-site activities
* #### 

  You’ll want to book your flight into **Lisbon Portela Airport (LIS)**, the main international airport in Lisbon. From there, it’s about a 45-minute drive to the retreat venue. We’ll be offering optional group transportation to and from the airport within a specific arrival/departure window, which will be shared after registration. If you prefer to rent a car or arrive early, we’ll also provide clear driving directions and arrival logistics.
* #### 

  Probably! Our private chef prepares organic, seasonal meals with a focus on nourishment and flavor. Vegan, vegetarian, pescatarian and omnivores as well as dairy-free needs can all be accommodated. Please let us know your dietary preferences and food allergies when you register so we can plan accordingly. Celiac, medical diets or other diets like keto, raw, etc… email us so we can have a chat.
* #### 

  Yes! Absolutely. Niki’s classes are for anyone with a body - which is everyone!

  Our practices are designed to be welcoming, adaptive, and accessible. Whether you’re newer to yoga or have been practicing for years, this retreat will meet you where you are and support your body, mind, and energy with care and respect.

  So come as you are - every class can be tailored to where you’re at in your practice evolution.
* #### 

  This retreat is open to adults of all genders and identities who intend to deepen their practice of Yoga. It’s for anyone who is seeking deep rest, personal reconnection, and inspiration through nature, movement, and mindful community. The Light Inside Yoga community is made up of and welcomes all who are respectful, open-hearted, and aligned with the values of compassion, curiosity, critical thinking, common sense and inner growth.

  We maintain a **zero-tolerance policy for racism, antisemitism, homophobia, transphobia, or any form of hate or discrimination.** This is a space of health, healing, integrity, and respect - for one another, the land, and the lineage of yoga itself.
* #### 

  Yes! When you register you will be prompted to fill out a short intake form that includes a spot to name the person whom you are traveling with or want to share a room with.
* #### 

  Due to the nature of retreat planning, deposits are non-refundable.

  Travel insurance is strongly recommended.

  Please read [the complete retreat policy here](https://lightinsideyoga.com/retreat-policies) before attending this event.
* #### 

  Awesome! Email Niki directly to coordinate private yoga lessons while on retreat: [Click Here](mailto:lightinsideyoga@gmail.com?subject=Portugal%20Retreat%20Add%20On%20Request&body=What%20is%20the%20add%20on%20you'd%20like%20to%20include%20or%20get%20more%20information%20about%3F%0ALet%20Niki%20know%3A%0A%0A)
* #### 

  The retreat venue is nestled in the rolling countryside of Portugal and features natural terrain, gravel paths, and some uneven ground. While the rooms and main practice space are on flat ground, please note that full accessibility for those with significant mobility limitations may be limited. If you have specific needs, please reach out before booking - we’re happy to discuss the layout and help determine if this retreat is the right fit or offer supportive alternatives.

### What to Expect

**Space to breathe and be:** Daily breath-led yoga and movement designed to clear mental clutter, bring strength and support to your body, and invite presence. Practices that honor where you are and support your next step on the yogic path.

**Nourishment from the land:** Delicious, locally sourced meals prepared with care and passion by our world-class chef Ricardo Santos.

**Immersive nature connection:** Wander peaceful walking trails, explore nearby lagoons, or simply rest in the embrace of the farm’s organic fields, saltwater pools and coastal nature reserves.

**Intentional rest and reflection:** Time carved out each day for exploration, and restorative practices to deepen your inner clarity and ease.

**Meaningful community:** Connect authentically with like-hearted people in a safe, supportive space…sharing stories, meals, and moments of collective stillness.

**Curated excursions:** Optional explorations to charming villages, secluded beaches, and vibrant nature spots that enrich your retreat experience without overwhelming your downtime.

### This Retreat Is For You If

You feel overwhelmed by the pace and noise of modern life and crave spaciousness, intentional community and simplicity.

You want to deepen your Yoga and meditation practice with compassionate guidance that meets you where you are.

You long for meaningful connection…to yourself, to others, and to the natural world.

You’re seeking physical renewal and mental clarity through balanced movement and rest.

You want to experience Portugal’s countryside beyond the typical tourist trail, with adventures that complement your inner journey.

You value a retreat experience that blends intention with ease…structured enough to support growth, spacious enough to honor your rhythm, a bit of luxury & a generous amount of ancient wisdom.

[WOULD YOU LIKE A POOLSIDE ROOM OR GARDEN TERRACE?](/portugal-retreat-2026)

[WOULD YOU LIKE A POOLSIDE ROOM OR GARDEN TERRACE?](/portugal-retreat-2026)

This retreat is your chance to pause the noise of daily life and find joyful presence…spend the week reconnecting to lighthearted embodiment and deeply inspiration.

Set in the peaceful Portuguese countryside, you’ll slow your breath, soothe your nervous system, and step into a rhythm that feels natural and healing.

Each day includes yoga, breathwork, and meditation focused on building presence - practical tools you can bring off the mat to reduce stress, increase clarity, and live the moments of your life more fully.

This co-ed retreat is for anyone ready to break free from overwhelm, heal deeply, and reconnect to their strength…body, mind, and heart.

You’ll also have time to explore beautiful trails, swim in saltwater, and absorb the calm of the land - supporting the transformation happening within.

**True presence blooms in the space between thoughts.**

Come home to your natural pace again, to your deep breath, your strength, and your clarity.

### Want to make sure this is the right retreat for you or still have a question?

[let's talk!](mailto:lightinsideyoga@gmail.com?subject=Bloom%20Retreat%20Interest&body=I'm%20interested%20in%20the%20Camp%20R%20%26%20R%20Retreat%20at%20Bloom!%20%0A%0A(Please%20include%20your%20questions%20here%20and%20Niki%20will%20get%20back%20to%20you%20very%20soon.)%0A%0A)

[let's talk!](mailto:lightinsideyoga@gmail.com?subject=Bloom%20Retreat%20Interest&body=I'm%20interested%20in%20the%20Camp%20R%20%26%20R%20Retreat%20at%20Bloom!%20%0A%0A(Please%20include%20your%20questions%20here%20and%20Niki%20will%20get%20back%20to%20you%20very%20soon.)%0A%0A)

## **Meet Your Retreat Team**

**Retreat Leader: Niki Saccareccia, E-RYT 500, YACEP, TI**  
 *Trauma-Informed Yoga Therapist, Mentor & Educator*

Rooted in science, shaped by spirit, and devoted to the healing path, Niki is a trauma-informed yoga therapist with a background in psychology, behavioral science, and over 15 years of experience guiding emotional healing through embodied practice. Her teaching blends timeless yogic wisdom with evidence-based tools to help people reconnect to their bodies, rewrite inner narratives, and live with greater clarity, care, and curiosity.

Drawn to the quiet rhythms and fertile beauty of the Portuguese countryside, Niki chose this retreat setting for its grounded simplicity and space to reset. Here, surrounded by olive groves, wild herbs, and open sky, you’ll be invited to slow down, listen inward, and reconnect with the steadiness that lives beneath life’s noise.

A poet, writer, and lifelong student of integrative anatomy and somatic healing, Niki brings a whole-person approach to everything she offers. Her presence is both grounding and expansive - meeting you exactly where you are, while gently inviting you toward where you're meant to grow.

**Matt Meyer, On-Site Logistics Coordinator & Retreat Assistant**  
Matt is your behind-the-scenes anchor and friendly guide throughout the retreat experience. He’s here to make sure everything flows - from daily schedules and excursions to spa appointments and mealtimes - so you can stay present and at ease. With a calm, approachable presence and a gift for keeping things running smoothly, Matt helps create a supportive, lighthearted environment where you can fully receive the depth of the retreat.

**Chef Ricardo Santos, Retreat Chef**

With over 20 years of experience, Chef Ricardo brings a deep love of flavor, connection, and global inspiration to every dish. Trained in culinary school and seasoned through travel and running his own restaurant as Executive Chef of Amore Vero in southern Portugal, his style blends Middle Eastern, Mediterranean, and Asian influences into vibrant meals that are boldly flavored and look as beautiful as they taste. Whether cooking for retreats or private gatherings, his food is always rooted in love, shared joy, and a pinch of high quality salt. He specializes in plant-based meals and can back a mean apricot tart from scratch before you even have your first sip of coffee. You can drool over his creations on instagram: [**@chef\_ricardosantos**](https://www.instagram.com/chef_ricardosantos/)

hits.title: PORTUGAL RETREAT (May 2026) — Lost 'n Found Yoga & Pilates in St. Catharines, Ontario
hits.snippet:
The town has a maze of cubist houses on the cobbled streets near the market and as you move further north the style changes to something a little grander. It’s an easy-going place, with a very distinct heart and guests simply enjoy wandering around, stumbling upon sculptures and murals that are all part of the civic art here. Near the supermarket, Pingo Doce, along the walls of the old cannery buildings, you’ll see vast depictions of the fish-canning industry that once thrived in the town. [...] You can reach Olhão two different ways:

   Book an international flight to Lisbon, Portugal. From Lisbon choose either a domestic flight from Lisbon to Faro (FAO) or take a bus or train from Lisbon to Olhão. The public bus is the from Lisbon to Faro is the most economical at appoximately 20 Euros per person.

       Train:Approximately2h30 to 3hwithCP - Comboios de Portugal. You can check schedules and tickets here:

       Bus:Also around2h30 to 3hwithRede Expressos or Flexibus. More details available at:

       Car:About2h30via the A2 highway.

   Fly direct from Toronto to Faro, Portugal (FAO) and return the same way by coming a day early and stay a day longer. Local accommodations can be recommended for these two additional nights.

Image 21 [...] #### MAY 13TH - 19TH, 2026

## Welcome

  

Boasting over 300 days of sunshine every year, Portugal’s magical Algarve is the perfect place to press pause. The Algarve, Portugal’s southern coastline, is known for its picturesque beaches backdropped by dramatic, golden cliffs sculpted by the elements. Quaint villages and artisanal cuisine are sure to delight.

![Image 3](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/7a776b0d-c274-43d7-a854-1a25f0800589/CR+2+terraces+with+sunbeds.jpg)

# **Press****Pause****in Portugal**

**Yoga Retreat in Olhão, Portugal**

#### **MAY 13TH - 19TH, 2026**

## **Welcome**

* * *

Boasting over 300 days of sunshine every year, Portugal’s magical Algarve is the perfect place to press pause. The Algarve, Portugal’s southern coastline, is known for its picturesque beaches backdropped by dramatic, golden cliffs sculpted by the elements. Quaint villages and artisanal cuisine are sure to delight.

You will find Casa Rosa Villa, our bohemian styled luxury boutique hotel, nestled in the fishing village of Olhão. It’s the perfect place to slow down and soak in your surroundings. Spend your day relaxing on white washed stone by the pool, or venture to one of the stunning nearby islands. Borrow a bike to explore the salt pans or go by foot to immerse yourself in the culture of local artists, delightful markets and authentic restaurants.

Healthy, local food prepared for you, chilled wine and nightly turndown service are just some of what you can look forward to at this beautiful villa.

![Image 4](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/a98de650-b5d6-4f16-9d96-bf8a28764bd2/Beach+areas+on+the+Islands+3.jpeg)

## **Itinerary**

A laid-back itinerary gives you the opportunity to be present in the moment and appreciate the simple things of life.

#### ARRIVAL DAY

*   Check in at Casa Rosa Villa & Welcome Dinner

#### DAY 2 – 6

*   Morning Yoga Practice & Brunch

*   Relaxation & Exploration Time _(option to purchase lunch in town)_

*   Late Afternoon/Evening Yoga Practice _(2 evenings will feature Yoga Nidra Sessions after dinner)_

*   Dinner

#### DEPARTURE DAY

*   Farewell Breakfast

![Image 5](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/a1251fbf-bb46-43ee-bf09-32d5ab4b9c4e/CR+Yoga+terrace+6.jpg)

![Image 6](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/d2399b9e-bd7c-4c30-b93f-047dd8127c5a/sandraseibtfotografie1-21.jpg)

## **The Package**

#### _What’s included…_

*   6 nights accommodation in a room of your choosing

*   Twice daily yoga practice

*   Brunch

*   Dinner served with wine

*   Optional yoga and art workshop

*   Access to Casa Rosa Villa’s amenities including swimming pool, beach towels, terraces, bicycles and more

*   Generous amounts of free time for rest, reflection and immersion in the culture

#### _What’s not included…_

*   Airfare and ground transport

*   Travel and medical insurance

*   Lunches in town

*   Additional alcoholic beverages

*   Optional excursions & spa treatments

*   Gratuities for house staff

![Image 7](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/8359fedb-6215-4e7d-a0a7-80f1b3eda58c/CR+Turndown+tray+2.jpg)

## **Rooms and Rates**

The rooms are simple and chic. Think warm hues with a bohemian mid-century modern vibe. There are six rooms on the ground floor pool level and four more rooms upstairs that open onto a shared terrace. While Olhão is a very quiet village, triple glazed windows and shutters help maximize your sleep quality.

Each room has an air conditioner and a private bathroom with a walk-in shower, and toiletries are provided (shampoo, shower gel, cotton buds, tissues, cotton pads, etc.)

*   ![Image 8](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/4414473a-6b7c-4f52-9153-09157c94690a/CR+Room+1+and+2+bed+and+couch.jpg)  ## ROOM 1: KING ROOM (Ground Floor) - Booked

2 Twin Beds OR 1 King Bed

Double occupancy (1 bed/person): $2,095 USD | Single occupancy: $2,995 USD   
*   ![Image 9](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/fc769feb-eeec-4581-82d6-f268b46cd42d/CR+Room+1+or+2+with+3rd+angle.jpg)  ## ROOM 2: KING ROOM (Ground Floor) - Booked

2 Twin Beds OR 1 King Bed

Double occupancy (1 bed/person): $2,095 USD | Single occupancy: $2,995 USD   
*   ![Image 10](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/8d944464-f3fc-4583-ba65-3c4bac84df20/CR+Room+3.jpg)  ## ROOM 3: DOUBLE ROOM (Ground Floor) -Booked

1 Double Bed

Single occupancy: $2,495 USD   
*   ![Image 11](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/2a1eb7b5-7c1c-44f0-83c1-88ecab3b5cea/CR+Room+4+couch+bed.jpg)  ## ROOM 4: DOUBLE & SINGLE ROOM (Ground Floor)

1 Double Bed & 1 Single Bed

Double Bed: $2,245 USD | Single Bed: $2,095 USD

Single occupancy: $3,295 USD   
*   ![Image 12](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/312e5942-f59b-41ab-be5a-e9271cc67c1a/CR+Room+4.jpg)  ## ROOM 5: QUEEN ROOM (Ground Floor)- Booked

1 Queen Bed

Double occupancy (shared bed): $1,947.50 USD | Single occupancy: $2,695   
*   ![Image 13](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/b74f4883-63a8-4e9d-acde-5d21bb651a97/CR+Twin+room.jpg)  ## ROOM 6: KING ROOM (Ground Floor) - Booked

2 Twin Beds OR 1 King Bed

Double occupancy (1 bed/person): $2,095 USD | Single occupancy: $2,995 USD   
*   ![Image 14](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/6b939df2-6535-4e0b-a36c-a7409b3f843c/CR+Room+11+or+14+bed.jpg)  ## ROOM 11: QUEEN ROOM (Upstairs) - Booked

1 Queen Bed

Double occupancy (shared bed): $2,147.50 USD | Single occupancy: $2,995 USD   
*   ![Image 15](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/ddfe28ed-915b-4b48-84fc-be443d3ed7b5/CR+Room+12+view+out+to+balcony.jpg)  ## ROOM 12: QUEEN ROOM (Upstairs) - Booked

1 Queen Bed

Double occupancy (shared bed): $2,147.50 USD | Single occupancy: $2,995 USD   
*   ![Image 16](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/0ce3c751-1729-4060-9e01-a0e33563f0c8/CR+Room+14.jpg)  ## ROOM 14: QUEEN ROOM (Upstairs) - Booked

1 Queen Bed

Double occupancy (shared bed): $2,147.50 USD | Single occupancy: $2,995 USD   

**Retreat Leaders**

*   ![Image 17](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/d9aa172b-83f2-4cb3-a931-a8ebb0b74162/April+Janzen.jpg)  ## April Janzen

April is a yoga studio owner and instructor who brings her love of movement together with her years of experience as a registered social worker to support you in your journey home to yourself. She is a trauma informed teacher who employs a poetic lens of awareness to craft unique classes that speak to body, mind and spirit. April is known for her graceful flowing classes that simultaneously encourage her students to laugh, grow, and challenge themselves while creating a safe container for rest, healing and deep inner work.

In addition to her 200-hour training, April has completed an additional 300 hours in Trauma Centered Trauma Sensitive Yoga from the Center for Trauma and Embodiment as well as the 300-hour YogaSpace Advanced Teacher Training Program in Toronto. She holds certifications in Yin Yoga, Restorative Yoga, Meditation, Prenatal Yoga, Elemental Vinyasa, Hands-On Assists and Yoga Philosophy. This is just the beginning for April and she looks forward to a lifetime of learning and deep practice.   
*   ![Image 18](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/302a4b84-bdfa-46f2-99e9-b19c95887530/Diana%2BHarpwood.webp)  ## Diana Harpwood

Since her earliest days, Diana has always been ‘a girl in motion’. She danced her way through school always choreographing and teaching anyone who would listen. Her love of this art form inspired her to earn a Bachelor of Fine Arts in Dance at York University.

While at university Diana found yoga and Pilates and realized how important it was to understand body mechanics so that you can train in a healthy way. Her love for movement grew and she knew that she had a passion that she wanted to share.

Diana has been teaching students of all ages for over 15 years. At Lost ’n Found, Diana has found an environment where she can share yoga, Pilates and dance! She encourages her students to find strength, balance and awareness in body and in spirit.

In addition to her B.F.A in dance and her 200 hour Yoga Teacher Training certification she is CDTA Full Member in Ballet and Jazz, CDTA Associate Member in Modern and has completed a full Comprehensive Pilates Teacher Training Program.

Students often comment that Diana’s joyful, energetic nature and ready smile make her classes a welcoming and happy place to be!   

![Image 19](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/7d44bd29-a1bc-47d2-871e-f06116b1ef75/Armona+Island_1687287601.jpg)

## **The Area**

Set on the banks of the Ria Formosa in the unspoilt eastern Algarve, Olhão is a beautiful old fishing town that still has the sea at its heart. It has a working fleet – the largest in the region – and you’ll find its fresh bounty in the town’s market and restaurants.

These markets are very special indeed and they’re one of the fabulous things that make his town incredible – and they’re just a five-minute walk from Casa Rosa Villa. On Saturdays, the place buzzes as farming families set up along the seafront, selling citrus fruits, pomegranates, almonds, tomatoes, figs, piri piri peppers and the other glories of the Algarve fields.

The town has a maze of cubist houses on the cobbled streets near the market and as you move further north the style changes to something a little grander. It’s an easy-going place, with a very distinct heart and guests simply enjoy wandering around, stumbling upon sculptures and murals that are all part of the civic art here. Near the supermarket, Pingo Doce, along the walls of the old cannery buildings, you’ll see vast depictions of the fish-canning industry that once thrived in the town.

Once you see the light in Olhão, you’ll understand why it attracts painters here – as well as all sorts of creative types. It’s still a traditional working town – but it’s also artistic. There’s a cultural centre, República 14, just across the road from Casa Rosa Villa, with yoga, Pilates and Qigong classes as well as art exhibitions, concerts and open-air films and it has a café and bar.

![Image 20](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/c86d6dda-997e-48f1-ae5b-4b514547e2e8/08e5f519baa33718dce3b41bc79bb07b-1920w.jpg)

**Things To Do**

*   Ria Formosa Natural Park - Explore by foot or by bike the parks unique marshes, lagoons and sandbars.

*   Islands - Armona Island and Ilha da Fuzeta, accessible only by boat, display beautiful white sandy beaches. Enjoy the quiet while drenching in the sun and sea.

*   Sea Caves of Benagil - Kayak around the spectacular, golden cliffs of the Algarve and it’s caves, stopping to enjoy the stunning Benagil Cave that houses a beach within it’s sunsoaked walls.

*   Olive Oil Tour and Tasting - Learn more about how olive oil is produced and sample avariety of different olive oils.

*   Mer cado de Olhão - A lively market with fresh fish, fruit and vegetables

*   Artisan shops - Enjoy handmade products by local artists

*   Faro and Tavira are a short train ride away where you can enjoy theatres and shops.

# **Additional Information**

### **How to Get There**

You can reach Olhão two different ways:

*   **Book an international flight to Lisbon, Portugal**. From Lisbon choose either a domestic flight from Lisbon to Faro (FAO) or take a bus or train from Lisbon to Olhão. The public bus is the from Lisbon to Faro is the most economical at appoximately 20 Euros per person.

    *   **Train:**Approximately**2h30 to 3h**with**CP - Comboios de Portugal**. You can check schedules and tickets here:[https://www.cp.pt](https://www.cp.pt/)

    *   **Bus:**Also around**2h30 to 3h**with**Rede Expressos or Flexibus**. More details available at:[https://rede-expressos.pt](https://rede-expressos.pt/)

    *   **Car:**About**2h30**via the A2 highway.

*   **Fly direct from Toronto to Faro, Portugal (FAO)** and return the same way by coming a day early and stay a day longer. Local accommodations can be recommended for these two additional nights.

![Image 21](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/5e4ba476-b894-4d24-8746-b1a6819da77e/CR+group+tables+by+pool+2.jpg)

All bookings are final with no refunds. We require a $1,000 USD deposit at sign up which is non-refundable. The remaining balance of your retreat price will be due March 31st, 2025. There is no refund after the balance is paid.

In case of illness or force majeure, we will do our best to find a solution/have another participant take the space and trip insurance is available through our travel agent, Michelle Corbeil from Travel Only. It is possible to give your space to a friend, just inform us at least 1 week before the retreat takes place via email at [retreats@lostnfoundyoga.com](mailto:retreats@lostnfoundyoga.com).

![Image 22](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/6ea7a1e7-6a28-447c-8dc7-fbc2e565df89/sandraseibtfotografie-9.jpg)

When signing up for a retreat you agree to our general terms and conditions. Have any questions? Please write us an email at [**retreats@lostnfoundyoga.com**](mailto:retreats@lostnfoundyoga.com).

Location: Olhão, Portugal

Venue: Casa Rosa Villa

Check-in: 4pm

Check-out: 10am

Please note: Early check in is not possible. If your flights do not match our check in time, nor our transportation times, we recommend staying a night at an alternate location in Olhão before or after the retreat.

![Image 23](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/66563586213fc953da434c65/29ba9272-a8fc-4959-8ca7-89cd60eca1e1/sandraseibtfotografie1-24.jpg)

## Questions?

Contact us with questions about the classes and retreat programming at [**retreats@lostnfoundyoga.com**](mailto:retreats@lostnfoundyoga.com)**.**

Bookings will be made through our travel partner, Michelle Corbeil, an affiliate of TravelOnly, 202-325A West Street, Brantford, ON, N3R 3V6

# Yoga holidays and retreats in Portugal

Portugal is a region rich in stunning landscapes. From vibrant city life to serene coastal views and lush mountains, this area is perfect whether you’re looking to be at one with nature, or explore city culture.

[Read more](#)

On our yoga holiday in Portugal, we will explore the unique landscape of Sintra. Sintra has it’s own microclimate and boasts picturesque hills and historical sites. The town offers a range of trails that wind through its lush forests and past its historic palaces, such as the colorful Pena Palace and the Moorish Castle. On another day we include a trip to Lisbon, which is known for it’s historic architecture, charming trams and delicious food.

This yoga retreat is a great adventure holiday as Portugal has something for everyone and with yoga twice a day you will leave feeling both energised and relaxed.

![Two people taking a selfie in front of the famous Lisbon street car in the background](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/13B98CA5-5F96-431F-AD2C-6F07F1DB7DBF-min-scaled.jpeg?fit=1200%2C900&ssl=1)

# 19 Portugal Yoga Retreats That You Need to Know About [2026]

By[Jade Gershen](https://wellandgoodtravel.com/about-us/)

[![affiliate disclosure](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/Screen-Shot-2023-04-12-at-1.19.50-PM.png?resize=1024%2C75&ssl=1)](https://wellandgoodtravel.com/disclaimer-for-well-and-good-travel/) 

**Feeling overwhelmed by the endless yoga retreats in Portugal?** You’re not alone. With everything from surf-and-flow weeks to luxury countryside escapes, choosing the right Portugal yoga holiday can feel surprisingly hard. How are you supposed to know which ones are worth booking?

I just got back from Portugal — and before (and after) my trip, I spent hours digging through dozens of retreats across the country. I compared locations, styles, and vibes to find the most meaningful, unique, and *book-worthy* wellness retreats in Portugal.

This guide features the very best. Each retreat stands out for its creativity, setting, and intention.

To make it easier, I’ve grouped them by region — Lisbon, Algarve, countryside, and more — so you can jump straight to the area that fits your travel plans.

Let’s find the retreat that fits your energy, goals, and schedule!

Our Pick

![An aerial view of two people practicing yoga on top of a cliff looking out at the ocean](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/653x490-12.jpg?resize=653%2C490&ssl=1)

### ****[7-Day Yoga and Meditation Retreat](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/4elements-retreat/7-day-yoga-and-meditation-retreat-close-to-santa-cruz-lisbon?aid=7785)****

✔️ Nazare, wine tour, nature walks

✔️ Human Design, meditation, daily yoga

[**Check rates & availability**](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/4elements-retreat/7-day-yoga-and-meditation-retreat-close-to-santa-cruz-lisbon?aid=7785)

### **🧘‍♀️ Top Picks by Travel Style**

* **Best for Solo Travelers:** [7-Day Yoga and Meditation Retreat (Nazare)](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/4elements-retreat/7-day-yoga-and-meditation-retreat-close-to-santa-cruz-lisbon?aid=7785)
* **Best for Surf & Yoga:** [8-Day Amazing Surfing and Yoga Retreat](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/omassim/8-days-yoga-breakfast-and-surf-retreat-in-portugal?aid=7785)
* **Best for Inner Work & Silence:** [7-Day Silent Meditation and Yin Yoga](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/maitri-retreats/7-day-silent-zen-meditation-and-yin-yoga-retreat-in-algarve-portugal?aid=7785)
* **Best for Creativity & Connection:** [6-Day “Wild Is She” Women’s Retreat](https://bookretreats.com/r/6-day-wild-is-she-yoga-creativity-retreat-ericeira-portugal?a=b735a40e31)
* **Best Budget-Friendly Option:** [5-Day Yoga and Surf Camp (Cascais)](https://www.booksurfcamps.com/surf-cascais-surf-school-surf-camp-lisbon-portugal/5-day-yoga-and-surf-camp-in-cascais?aid=7785)
* **Best Luxury Experience:** [7-Day Six Senses Women’s Retreat (Alentejo)](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/nomadikas/6-day-six-senses-women-yoga-and-wellness-retreat-in-alentejo-portugal?aid=7785)

## **Portugal Yoga Retreats Near Lisbon Worth Booking**

The Lisbon Metropolitan Area is the smallest region on the mainland, but it’s highly urbanized and home to one of Portugal’s main airports — making it a convenient entry point.

Located along the west coast in the central-southern part of the country, this region blends city life with coastal charm. With its mix of ocean views, vibrant neighborhoods, and peaceful retreat spaces, Lisbon is one of the best places to enjoy a Portugal wellness escape.

### **1) [7-Day Yoga and Meditation Retreat](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/4elements-retreat/7-day-yoga-and-meditation-retreat-close-to-santa-cruz-lisbon?aid=7785)**

**⭐** **RATING:** 4.85/5 | 📅 **DATES:** Multiple Dates | 💳 **[BOOK NOW](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/4elements-retreat/7-day-yoga-and-meditation-retreat-close-to-santa-cruz-lisbon?aid=7785)**

![An aerial view of two people practicing yoga on top of a cliff looking out at the ocean](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/653x490-12.jpg?resize=653%2C490&ssl=1)

**📍** **Location:** Rua António Franco Nº1, Torres Vedras, Lisbon, Portugal

🚌 **Airport Transfer Included:** Yes

**💥 Highlights:**Nazaré, wine tour, nature walks, Human Design

This 4elements retreat in Portugal offers a rejuvenating one-week yoga experience designed for complete relaxation. Enjoy morning yoga sessions, guided walks, and home-cooked vegetarian meals.

The retreat includes private rooms with bathrooms, evening meditation practices, and inspiring group conversations.

Visit Nazaré—home of the world’s biggest waves, stop in the medieval town of Óbidos for a picnic, and a winery tour with wine tasting. Perfect for solo travelers, friends, or yoga enthusiasts of all levels.

> The retreat was just perfect for me. The balance of yoga, meditation and other activities was just right. The food was amazing and the hosts so welcoming. I want to go back and I have only just left.
>
> Joanne M. ([SEE MORE REVIEWS](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/4elements-retreat/7-day-yoga-and-meditation-retreat-close-to-santa-cruz-lisbon?aid=7785))

[**Check Rates & Availability →**](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/4elements-retreat/7-day-yoga-and-meditation-retreat-close-to-santa-cruz-lisbon?aid=7785)

### **2) [6-Day Rejuvenating Yoga Retreat](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/moka-surfhouse-yoga-retreat/6-day-rejuvenating-yoga-retreat-in-ericeira-lisbon?aid=7785)**

**⭐** **RATING:** 4.7/5 | 📅 **DATES:** Multiple Dates | 💳 **[BOOK NOW](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/moka-surfhouse-yoga-retreat/6-day-rejuvenating-yoga-retreat-in-ericeira-lisbon?aid=7785)**

![people sitting on yoga mats in a circular yoga shala with a skylight in the middle](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/653x490-1-1.jpg?resize=653%2C490&ssl=1)

**📍** **Location:** Moka Surfhouse and Yoga Retreat, Ericeira, Lisbon, Portugal

🚌 **Airport Transfer Included:** Available for an additional fee

**💥 Highlights:**400+ reviews, 2x daily yoga, one massage

Moka Surf House offers Portugal surf and yoga retreats with carefully curated activities to enhance well-being. Whether seeking to improve strength, flexibility, or calmness and relaxation, this retreat caters to all levels and aspirations.

The retreat takes place in an 8-walled Mongolian yurt. Each day features two yoga classes. The morning session is dynamic, drawing inspiration from Ashtanga and Vinyasa practices and the afternoon session offers a slower pace, incorporating elements of Hatha, Slow Flow, and Restorative yoga.

In your free time and at your own cost, you can take a surf lesson, ride horses, go paddleboarding, or trekking/hiking.

> “I really enjoyed my stay at moka. Great location for relaxing but can easily get into town and beaches. The accommodation was very comfortable and clean. The outside areas great for relaxing. All the yoga classes were amazing the teachers very good and friendly.”
>
> CHARLIE S. ([SEE MORE REVIEWS](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/moka-surfhouse-yoga-retreat/6-day-rejuvenating-yoga-retreat-in-ericeira-lisbon?aid=7785))

Stay in a private or shared room, or a dorm in a modern boho-style Portuguese villa. Breakfast and 4 vegetarian dinners are included.

[**Check Rates & Availability →**](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/moka-surfhouse-yoga-retreat/6-day-rejuvenating-yoga-retreat-in-ericeira-lisbon?aid=7785)

**Don’t forget travel insurance! I use and recommend [SafetyWing](https://safetywing.com/?referenceID=24981486&utm_source=24981486&utm_medium=Ambassador).**

### **3) 7 Day Winter Ashram Stay & Conscious Yoga Retreat**

**⭐** **RATING:** 4.9/5 | 📅 **DATES:** January & February ’26 | 💳 **[BOOK NOW](https://bookretreats.com/r/7-day-winter-ashram-stay-conscious-yoga-retreat-in-portugal?a=b735a40e31)**

![A group of yoga students in upward dog at a portugal yoga retreat](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/653x490-3-1.jpg?resize=653%2C490&ssl=1)

**📍** **Location:** ALMASHALA, São João das Lampas, Portugal.

🚌 **Airport Transfer Included:** No

**💥 Highlights:**2x daily yoga, breathwork, life at an Ashram

Almashala offers a winter ashram stay if you are seeking simplicity, silence, and deeper alignment.

This experience blends gentle structure with spaciousness—morning meditation at the nearby Red Temple, daily yoga and pranayama, mantra circles, and philosophy chats—while leaving time for remote work, long walks, and meaningful connection.

Life at Almashala is intentionally slow and rooted in nature, with a fireplace always burning and winter landscapes surrounding the space. Guests are invited to contribute to the rhythm of the ashram, embracing presence, gratitude, and adaptability as part of the practice.

Accommodation includes a 6-night stay with three nourishing meals per day. Food is local, vegan, gluten-free, and inspired by a sattvic, low-sugar approach—designed to support clarity, balance, and sustained energy.

This is less a retreat and more a way of living, ideal for those craving grounded community, self-practice, and space to breathe deeply.

[**Check Rates & Availability →**](https://bookretreats.com/r/7-day-winter-ashram-stay-conscious-yoga-retreat-in-portugal?a=b735a40e31)

### **4) [8-Day Amazing Surfing and Yoga Retreat](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/omassim/8-days-yoga-breakfast-and-surf-retreat-in-portugal?aid=7785)**

**⭐** **RATING:** 4.8/5 | 📅 **DATES:** Year Round | 💳 **[BOOK NOW](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/omassim/8-days-yoga-breakfast-and-surf-retreat-in-portugal?aid=7785)**

![Several people with surfboards about to enter the water in portugal](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/653x490-4-1.jpg?resize=653%2C490&ssl=1)

**📍** **Location:** Omassim Guesthouse, Palhais, Portugal

🚌 **Airport Transfer Included:** Available for an additional fee

**💥 Highlights:**2x daily yoga, 10 hrs surfing, spa treatments available

Join Omassim’s yoga and surf retreat in Portugal for an unforgettable experience combining the benefits of both practices. Yoga enhances surfing with its focus on strength, balance, flexibility, and breathwork while surfing offers yogis a chance to connect with nature and enhance focus and intensity.

Enjoy up to 12 yoga classes per week, including morning Vinyasa Flow classes and evening restorative sessions, complemented by approximately 10 hours of surfing lessons weekly.

Surfing lessons cater to different levels, ensuring personalized feedback and a “safety-first” approach.

> “I loved my stay at Omassim & have come away feeling re-energised & super positive. Lia & all the staff were v welcoming & accommodating throughout the wk. The accommodation was great- clean & with good sized rooms with balconies & a beautiful yoga Shala & zen garden by the pool. The vegetarian food was delicious & varied and there was always fruit & herbal tea available. My week was full of fun activities – surf, SUP, swimming, walking and especially loved Lia’s Vinyasa Flow yoga classes. I really liked the variety of well-being options available too.”
>
> JOANNA M. ([SEE MORE REVIEWS](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/omassim/8-days-yoga-breakfast-and-surf-retreat-in-portugal?aid=7785))

Stay in one of the two Omassim Guest Houses. Rooms are basic but comfortable, clean, and brightly colored. Choose between private, shared, or dorm. Breakfast, light lunch, and dinner are included.

[**Check Rates & Availability →**](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/omassim/8-days-yoga-breakfast-and-surf-retreat-in-portugal?aid=7785)

### **5) [6-Day ‘Wild Is She’ Yoga & Creativity Retreat](https://bookretreats.com/r/6-day-wild-is-she-yoga-creativity-retreat-ericeira-portugal?a=b735a40e31)**

**⭐** **RATING:** 5/5 | 📅 **DATES:** May & September ’26 | 💳 **[BOOK NOW](https://bookretreats.com/r/6-day-wild-is-she-yoga-creativity-retreat-ericeira-portugal?a=b735a40e31)**

![A photo of a yoga class from the instructor's perspective in an outdoor space with stone walls and ivy](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/1000_1698228275.jpg?resize=1000%2C666&ssl=1)

**📍** **Location:** Alma do Paço, Ericeira, Portugal

🚌 **Airport Transfer Included:** No

**💥 Highlights:**Daily yoga, daily creative activities, nature walks, PLAY, women only, stunning villa and yoga shala, pool

Okay, you know how much I love a good women’s retreat! This is not a recurring retreat so get in on this while you can! This retreat is at the top of my list for next time.

Reconnect with yourself and JOY through daily yoga practice, meditation, journaling, breathwork, painting, ceramics, nature walks, dance, and more.

You will do all of these things amidst 14th-century ruins – making for one of the most beautiful yoga retreat backdrops ever.

> SOPHIE ([SEE MOR](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/bron-voor-rust-geluk/7-day-ayahuasca-equine-therapy-and-yoga-holiday-in-aljezur-faro?aid=7785)[E](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/into-the-wild-portugal/7-day-rejuvenation-and-balance-yoga-retreat-in-aljezur-algarve?aid=7785) [REVIEWS](https://bookretreats.com/r/8-day-yoga-hike-adventure-holiday-retreat-in-madeira?a=b735a40e31))

Stay in a private room a beautiful and charming villa high up on the cliffs in Funchal. Enjoy three plant-based meals a day with local produce.

[**Check Rates & Availability →**](https://bookretreats.com/r/8-day-yoga-hike-adventure-holiday-retreat-in-madeira?a=b735a40e31)

## **Portugal Yoga Retreats: Alentejo**

Alentejo is Portugal’s largest region and the heart of Portuguese agriculture. You can expect to see rolling hills and plains planted with olive groves, cork forests, vineyards, and wheat fields.

The coast in the Alentejo region is vast and wild with wide open beaches and secret coves. The area is speckled with ruins and wild horses. This is a great place for peaceful yoga retreats in Portugal as well as hiking and cycling.

### **17) 7-Day Six Senses Women’s Yoga and Wellness Retreat**

**⭐** **RATING:** 5/5 | 📅 **DATES:** June 6-12, 2026 | 💳 **[BOOK NOW](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/nomadikas/6-day-six-senses-women-yoga-and-wellness-retreat-in-alentejo-portugal?aid=7785)**

![Exterior of the Six Senses hotel and retreat center in Portugal](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/653x490-7.jpg?resize=653%2C490&ssl=1)

**Location:** Fonte das Perdizes House, Portugal

🚌 **Airport Transfer Included:** No

**💥 Highlights:**LUXURY, minimalist design, sensory workshops, nature excursions

This luxury women’s yoga retreat, hosted by Nomadikas, is designed to reconnect you with your senses through yoga, mindfulness, and immersive nature experiences.

I selected this retreat because accommodations are a huge part of the experience for me. The retreat space offers a calm, design-forward environment for deep restoration and self-connection.

Days begin with grounding yoga practices followed by sensory workshops such as herbal oil making, guided plant walks, voice activation, and movement-based practices like ecstatic dance.

Unique experiences—including blindfolded dining, partner bodywork, and mindful touch—invite participants to slow down and engage fully with the present moment.

The retreat also includes beach and lagoon trips, hiking, and exploration of the surrounding estate.

Meals are thoughtfully prepared using organic, locally sourced ingredients, featuring creative Mediterranean-inspired cuisine with abundant vegan, gluten-free, and sugar-free options.

This luxury Portugal yoga retreat is ideal for women seeking a refined yet deeply embodied wellness experience rooted in nature, design, and sensory awareness.

[**Check rates and availability –>**](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/nomadikas/6-day-six-senses-women-yoga-and-wellness-retreat-in-alentejo-portugal?aid=7785)

### **18) [5-Day “Inner Recharge” Summer Wellbeing Retreat](https://bookretreats.com/r/5-day-inner-recharge-summer-wellbeing-retreat-in-portugal?a=b735a40e31)**

**⭐** **RATING:** 5/5 | 📅 **DATES:** August ’26 | 💳 **[BOOK NOW](https://bookretreats.com/r/5-day-inner-recharge-summer-wellbeing-retreat-in-portugal?a=b735a40e31)**

![Coast of Portugal with cliffs, arches, blue water, and several small boats](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/1000_1678192808.jpg?resize=1000%2C666&ssl=1)

**Location:** Monte da Orada, Costa Vicentina, Teotonio, Portugal

🚌 **Airport Transfer Included:** Available for an additional fee

**💥 Highlights:**Restorative, time to unplug, sauna & pool, 2 masterclasses

The Myalfazema Summer Wellbeing Retreat at Monte da Orada is a unique holiday experience designed for relaxation, learning, and connection.

Nestled in the woods and only 15 minutes from the ocean, this retreat offers a serene setting for daily yoga (various styles), masterclasses, guided meditations, trekking, and nourishing meals.

Enjoy nature, beach trips, reading, or simply resting, embracing the philosophy of wabi-sabi and slow living during your off-time.

> “I would definitely recommend joining a myalfazema retreat. You will be so well taken care of, with so much love and attention put into every detail. Leonor is such warm-hearted person and that really flows into everything. The yogaclasses a were amazing and so was the food and the location. Truly one of the best gifts to gift yourself.”
>
> SOPHIE ([SEE MORE REVIEWS](https://bookretreats.com/r/5-day-inner-recharge-summer-wellbeing-retreat-in-portugal?a=b735a40e31))

Your choice of a private room in a beautiful country villa. Enjoy three freshly prepared vegan meals a day that draw from Ayurvedic principles.

[**Check Rates & Availability →**](https://bookretreats.com/r/5-day-inner-recharge-summer-wellbeing-retreat-in-portugal?a=b735a40e31)

### **19) **[5-Day The Not So Serious Yoga and Wine Retreat](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/quinta-camarena/5-day-the-not-so-serious-yoga-holiday-in-cercal-alentejo?aid=7785)****

**⭐** **RATING:** 4.8/5 | 📅 **DATES:** Multiple Dates | 💳 **[BOOK NOW](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/quinta-camarena/5-day-the-not-so-serious-yoga-holiday-in-cercal-alentejo?aid=7785)**

![People sitting around a table eating family style at a yoga retreat in Portugal](https://i0.wp.com/wellandgoodtravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/653x490.jpg?resize=653%2C490&ssl=1)

**📍** **Location:** Quinta Camarena, Cercal do Alentejo, Portugal

🚌 **Airport Transfer Included:** Available for an additional fee

**💥 Highlights:**Lots of free time, garden pool, wine tasting

This retreat is for people who just want to relax, connect, and enjoy time together.

Start each morning with yoga in the open-air shala, followed by an incredible brunch. Enjoy a walk down to the ocean with the group or take off on your own to explore.

Reconvene in the evening for a different activity each night from wine tasting to a secret off-site dinner prepared by a private chef to a casual BBQ.

> “I was lucky to go with great bunch of people who made my stay fun filled. But regardless of that Quinta Camarena is a wonderful place, fabulous locally sourced food and wine, accommodation is lovely, setting is so relaxing and Amari, my yoga instructor is fabulous”
>
> ABIGAIL P. ([SEE MORE REVIEWS](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/quinta-camarena/5-day-the-not-so-serious-yoga-holiday-in-cercal-alentejo?aid=7785))

Choose to stay in a shared or private room in one of the several casitas on site. Enjoy brunch and dinner daily.

[**Check Rates & Availability →**](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/quinta-camarena/5-day-the-not-so-serious-yoga-holiday-in-cercal-alentejo?aid=7785)

## **FAQ: Portugal Yoga Retreats**

**What is Portugal known for?**

Beautiful beaches, surfing, beautiful coastlines, port wine, Madeira, Fado, and cuisine.

**What is the best Portugal yoga retreat for solo travellers?** 

I’d recommend this **[7-Day Yoga and Meditation Retreat](https://www.bookyogaretreats.com/4elements-retreat/7-day-yoga-and-meditation-retreat-close-to-santa-cruz-lisbon?aid=7785)** or this **[5-Day Yoga and Surf Camp](https://www.booksurfcamps.com/surf-cascais-surf-school-surf-camp-lisbon-portugal/5-day-yoga-and-surf-camp-in-cascais?aid=7785),** but really, all of these can be attended solo!

**What is the best time to do a yoga retreat in Portugal?**

Many Portugal yoga retreats are available year-round, but the most popular times are April–June and September–October, when the weather is warm, and crowds are lighter.

**Do they speak English in Portugal?**

Yes, English is widely spoken in Portugal, particularly in tourist areas and among younger generations. However, it is always appreciated if visitors learn a few basic Portuguese phrases.

**What currency does Portugal use?**

**Can you drink the water in Portugal?**

Yes, you can drink tap water in Portugal. The water quality is generally high, and it is safe for consumption throughout the country. However, in some older or rural areas, the taste may differ.

**Are yoga retreats in Portugal expensive?**

Prices vary widely depending on location, length, accommodations, and inclusions. You can find budget-friendly yoga holidays in Portugal and luxury wellness retreats.

## **Wrap-Up: Portugal Yoga Retreats**

To me, Portugal stands out as a top yoga retreat destination, offering many retreats catering to different skill levels and interests.

From the tranquil beaches of the Algarve to the serene countryside havens like Quinta Camarena and Monte da Orada, these retreats provide the perfect settings for relaxation, rejuvenation, and personal growth.

Whether you seek a holistic [wellness experience](https://wellandgoodtravel.com/temazcal-ceremony/), a blend of yoga and surfing, or a retreat that combines creative workshops with yoga practice, Portugal’s diverse landscape and rich cultural heritage make it an ideal place to deepen your practice and connect with nature.

Take the opportunity to unplug and recharge at one of these top yoga retreats. You deserve it!!

---

Jade Gershen is the founder of Well and Good Travel. She has lived on three continents and explored more than 20 countries in the past 10 years. U.S. based, she also shares her favorite places to go and things to do in the States. Having experienced the impacts of chronic stress Jade has a particular interest in using travel and outdoor adventure to improve well-being and shares that with her readers.
