[Explore  
retreats](/retreats)

[### Book Now](https://wildlywellretreats.wetravel.com/trips/the-art-of-slow-living-portugal-retreat-wildly-well-retreats-81468278)

## July 30th-Aug 4th 2026

## The Art of Slow Living

# MILFONTES, PORTUGAl

[### Reserve your spot](https://wildlywellretreats.wetravel.com/trips/the-art-of-slow-living-portugal-retreat-wildly-well-retreats-81468278)

Retreat to a coastal farm in Portugal for a week of slow living, movement, connection, and nature therapy. Cocoon Portugal is a 270 acre coastal farm and retreat located on the breathtaking Atlantic coast of Portugal, near the charming town of Milfontes. This retreat includes 2x daily movement practices (yoga & pilates), daily mindfulness practices, transformative breathwork class, farm to table meals and full access to the farm. Morning classes will be energizing & activating and evening classes will be a time to truly slow down and nourish your nervous system.  We’ll also enjoy beach days and visit the charming coastal town Porto Covo.

### YOGA. Pilates. breathwork. mindset

### July 30-Aug 4 2026

## The Art of slow living

Wildly Well hosts soul-enriching getaways for those who value movement, mindfulness, and community. Our mission is to create a space to allow you to re-connect with yourself, the natural world, and those around you.  
  
Our retreats are curated to create meaningful connections across the globe. We are a community of soul seekers who love to move, explore, and nourish ourselves from the inside out.   
  
We can't wait to meet you on your next adventure!

## Our Philosophy

[### RESERVE MY SPOT](https://wildlywellretreats.wetravel.com/trips/the-art-of-slow-living-portugal-retreat-wildly-well-retreats-81468278)

-5 nights of accommodation  
-2x daily movement classes (energizing pilates & nourishing yoga)  
-Mat pilates / sculpt, vinyasa yoga & yin yoga  
-Three farm-to-table meals per day  
-Daily Guided Meditation   
-Guided Journaling   
-Transformative breathwork & sound class  
-Picnic at the Beach  
-Day trip to Porto Covo & beach day  
-Yoga mats & blocks   
-A pizza night at the wood-fired oven  
-Spring water, coffee and local herbal teas available all day  
-Bicycles to explore the surroundings

## WHAT'S INCLUDED

-Domestic/ International Airfare   
-Guests can book a spot on the group shuttle to from Lisbon to reach the retreat venue for an additional cost of $120 each direction. Guests can also choose to rent a car or call an uber.  
-Uber is available at the venue if you want to explore local towns and beaches during your freetime   
-Additional activities: kayaking, surfing, massages, horseback riding  
-Alcohol-  The retreat center has an honesty bar where guests can purchase local wine, beer, and homemade chocolate   
-Accommodation outside of retreat dates   
-traveler's insurance (not required, but recommended)

## NOT INCLUDED

## Location

Cocoon Portugal is a 275 acre coastal farm + retreat, offering inspiration + community for the modern traveller. It's also pure magic, where between the oversized hammocks and the freshwater lake, you'll start to lose track of time.  
  
Cocoon is situated on the breathtaking Atlantic coast of Portugal, near the charming fishing village of Zambujiera del Mar, in the Alentejo region, which is known for its long stretches of untouched coastline and charming white-washed villages. From Lisbon, it's about two hours drive south.   
  
Cocoon is just 10 minutes drive away from Praia do Malhao, a fabulous untouched beach. Many of the nearby beaches are good for surfing, kayaking, swimming or sunbathing. There's also world-class hiking on the famed Costa Vicentina trail and secret swimming holes where you can take a refreshing dip. The charming seafront village of Vila Nova de Milfontes is also just 10 minutes drive away.

[### Take me to PORTUGAL](https://wildlywellretreats.wetravel.com/trips/the-art-of-slow-living-portugal-retreat-wildly-well-retreats-81468278)

## Pricing & Accomodation

To reserve your room a non refundable $800 deposit is required. The remaining balance is collected 90 days prior to the retreat. Prices are listed in USD   
  
Triple Room: Triple Occupancy   
Room comes with three separate beds   
$2896 USD per person   
  
Double Room: Double Occupancy  
Room comes with two separate Beds  
 $3442 USD per person   
  
Single Suite: Single Occupancy  
Single occupancy room with a private bathroom  
$3,966 USD per person

[### Reserve my spot](https://wildlywellretreats.wetravel.com/trips/the-art-of-slow-living-portugal-retreat-wildly-well-retreats-81468278)

## Meet your guides

Olivia Otten  
Born and raised in Cape Town, South Africa, Olivia Catalina was introduced to the practice of yoga at age 11.   Olivia traveled to Kerala, India at age 21 and studied a 300-hour Registered Yoga Teacher Training for Ashtanga and Vinyasa. She also completed a Yin Yoga Teacher Training Certificate with Bernie Clark and Diana Batts, a Trauma-Sensitive Yoga Certificate with TCTSY, Meditation Teacher Training with Tracee Stanley as well as a Restorative Yoga Teacher Training with Judith Lasater.  She has hosted multiple yoga and meditation workshops and shared her practice in Cape Town, London, Seychelles and Los Angeles.   Olivia has over 2000 hours of teaching under her belt. She is currently continuing her studies in Sri Vidya Yoga. She believes that mindfulness practices should be accessible to every body.

[### Join us IN Portugal](https://wildlywellretreats.wetravel.com/trips/the-art-of-slow-living-portugal-retreat-wildly-well-retreats-81468278)

Katie Mullen  
Katie is a professional dancer turned fitness instructor, based in LA. After almost 5 years teaching both group and private clients, she created The Line by Katie Mullen, a holistically minded workout and movement practice that is both freeing and fun! Katie is also a teacher for OPEN, a mindfulness studio that offers breathwork, meditation, and movement—both online to a global community and in person in Venice, CA.  
  
  
Katie offers a range of classes pilates based-toning, core work, sound and breathwork. Each workout integrates elements of breath, opposition and grounding to create a deeper connection to self, stability in the body and a balanced mindset.     
Certifications: Pre/Postnatal Performance Training Specialist - PROnatal Fitness

THE ART OF  
 SLOW LIVING

[This is your invitation to:](/blog)

-Reconnect with your intuition   
-Deep dive into self-love & deepen your connect with yourself   
-Clarity the next chapter of your life   
-Slow down & reset your nervous system   
-Let go of what no longer serves you   
-Nourish your mind, body, and soul   
-Release limiting beliefs   
-Meet a like-minded community and form bonds for life   
-Reconnect to inner joy & bliss   
-Explore the beautiful land of Portugal - as a group we will explore charming beach towns of the Alentejo coast, enjoy daily yoga, pilates meditation, breathwork, sound healing,  nourishing meals, and so much more!

## BOOK A CALL

### WANT More Info?

Interested in attending, but want more info? Book a call with one of our team members to learn more about our upcoming retreat.

[Let's Chat →](https://wildlywellretreats.as.me/schedule.php)

## Travel Logistics

AIRFARE & ARRIVAL   
Cocoon is located in the coastal Alentejo region of Portugal. The nearest town is the charming Vila Nova de Milfontes. Two airports that you can fly into are Lisbon International Airport a two hour drive to Cocoon, or Faro International Airport which is about an hour and 45 minute drive. Lisbon has a lot of international flights, whereas Faro is where many low-cost European airlines fly.  
  
Guests can book an optional group shuttle spot for transportation to and from Lisbon on July 30th and August 4th. The cost is $120 each direction.   
  
Pick up shuttle on the 30th will be 1pm from Locke de Santa Joana hotel in Lisbon. Departure shuttle will be 10am on Aug 4th from Cocoon to the Lisbon Airport.  
  
If guests would prefer to rent cars, there is also parking available at the property. Uber are also widely available in uber and at the retreat venue.   
  
The ocean is just a 10-minute drive away, and you can find some of the most gorgeous secret beaches on the planet, such as Praiado Cavaleiro and Praia Malhão.   
  
The retreat center has bikes available to explore, however, for guests that would like more freedom to explore the region we recommend that you rent a car or uber. In your freetime you can kayak, horseback ride, surf, and soak in the sunshine at the beach..  
  
PASSPORT   
For international travelers passports must have 6 months of validity at the time of entry.

# TAKE ME TO PORTUGAL

[### BOOK NOW](https://wildlywellretreats.wetravel.com/trips/the-art-of-slow-living-portugal-retreat-wildly-well-retreats-81468278)

[### Explore ALL retreats](/retreats)

## FAQS

**WHAT AIRPORT DO I FLY INTO?**

[AIRFARE & ARRIVAL   
Two airports that you can fly into are Lisbon International Airport a two hour drive to Cocoon, or Faro International Airport which is about an hour and 45 minute drive. There is an optional group shuttle that will depart Lisbon at 1pm on July 30th and also return back to Lisbon with departure from the retreat center August 4th at 11am. If a guest wants to book a spot on the shuttle it is $120 each direction.](https://www.bcferries.com/routes-fares/schedules/daily/HSB-BOW?scheduleDate=05/17/2023)

**How Do I arrive at the Retreat Center?**

[Cocoon is located in the coastal Alentejo region of Portugal. The nearest town is the charming Vila Nova de Milfontes. Two airports that you can fly into are Lisbon International Airport a two hour drive to Cocoon, or Faro International Airport which is about an hour and 45 minute drive.   
  
It is recommended guests rent a car if they would like more freedom to explore while on retreat. There is an optional group shuttle that will depart Lisbon at 1pm on July 30th  and also return back to Lisbon with departure from the retreat center August 4th at 10am. If a guest wants to book a spot on the shuttle it is $120 each direction.   
  
If you'd rather not rent a car or book the group shuttle you can always taxi to the retreat center or take can take the Rede Express Bus from Lisbon, and we will pick you up near the Cocoon Bus Station.  
  
The retreat center has bikes available to explore, however, for guests that would like more freedom to explore the region we recommend that you rent a car. In your freetime you can kayak, horseback ride, surf, and soak in the sunshine at the beach.](https://www.bcferries.com/routes-fares/schedules/daily/HSB-BOW?scheduleDate=05/17/2023)

**What is Included in the Retreat?**

-5 nights of accommodation  
-2x daily movement classes (energizing pilates & nourishing yoga)  
-Mat pilates / sculpt, vinyasa yoga & yin yoga  
-Three farm-to-table meals per day  
-Daily Guided Meditation   
-Guided Journaling   
-Transformative breathwork & sound class  
-Picnic at the Beach  
-Day trip to Porto Covo & beach day  
-Yoga mats & blocks   
-A pizza night at the wood-fired oven  
-Spring water, coffee and local herbal teas available all day  
-Bicycles to explore the surroundings

**What’s not Included in the Retreat?**

-Domestic/ International Airfare   
-Transportation to and from the retreat center (option to uber, join group shuttle, or rent a car)  
-Additional activities: kayaking, surfing, massages, horseback riding  
-Accommodation outside of retreat dates   
-traveler's insurance (not required, but recommended)

**How Do I Sign up for the Retreat?**

[To reserve your room a non refundable $800 deposit is required. The remaining balance is collected 90 days prior to the retreat. CLICK HERE TO SIGN UP](https://wildlywellretreats.wetravel.com/trips/the-art-of-slow-living-portugal-retreat-wildly-well-retreats-81468278)

**What is the deposit, booking, cancellation & Refund policy?**

Payment and Deposit  
 In order to reserve your spot on a retreat a $800 deposit is required. Full payment is due 90 days prior to the retreat.  
  
 Refunds and Cancellation  
 Our refund policy is as follows:  
  
Trip Changes  
 You can change a trip date or destination as long as it is 75 days or more before your original trip’s start date. If you do not rebook a trip immediately you will have a credit that expires in 12 months. If a guest cancels less than 75 days prior to the retreat, only their deposit may be applied towards another retreat. If a guest leaves during the retreat, there will be no refund.  
  
Cancellation & Refunds  
All payments are non-refundable should you decide to cancel your booking. We do not offer refunds. If you need to change or cancel your trip and you give us at least 75 days notice, any payments made to Wildly Well Retreats will convert into a credit that you can use within the next 12 months to book another retreat. If a guest cancels less than 75 days prior to the retreat, only their deposit may be applied towards another retreat. If a guest leaves during the retreat, there will be no refund. We highly recommend purchasing travel insurance at the time of your booking so you are protected in the event you need to cancel with less than 75 days notice.  
  
Cancellation by Wildly Well  
Wildly Well reserves the right to cancel any trip or part of the trip. In this event we will provide retreat credit, which will be valid for two years. If Wildly Well cancels a retreat for any reason, including Force Majeure, Wildly Well is not responsible for loss of funds in association with travel accommodations made by the guest.

**Can I travel Solo? Can I share a room with Someone?**

Yes of course! In fact we encourage you to come alone.

**What Food is Served on Retreat?**

The food is local, mainly plant-based, and farm-to table. From a sustainability standpoint, Cocoon does not serve red meat. They serve eggs from their own chickens, locals cheeses, and occasionally wild-caught Atlantic fish.   
  
If you have any dietary restrictions please let us know prior to retreat. You can email us at hello@wildlywellretreats.com. Gluten/ dairy free can be accommodated for.

**Can you accommodate for Vegan or Vegetarian Diets?**

Meals are mainly plant based so you are in luck! However, please let us know any dietary restrictions you have upon booking. You can email us at hello@wildlywellretreats.com. The food is local, mainly plant-based, and farm-to table. From a sustainability standpoint, Cocoon does not serve red meat. They serve eggs from their own chickens, locals cheeses, and occasionally wild-caught Atlantic fish.  
  
If you have any dietary restrictions please let us know prior to retreat. You can email us at hello@wildlywellretreats.com. Gluten/ dairy free can be accommodated for.

**Is there Wifi?**

Yes! There is wifi throughout the retreat center

**I’m new to Yoga/Pilates/meditation. Will I be welcome?**

Yes! All levels are welcome

**How many guests will be on retreat?**

Around 10-18 guests are expected to attend this retreat.

**What is the weather like? What Should I pack?**

August is a summer month in Portugal. The average temperature in Vila Nova de Milfontes in  July/ August for a typical day ranges from a high of 85°F (29°C) to a low of 64°F (18°C). Some would describe it as very warm with a gentle breeze.  
  
Pack:   
-Sun protection- hats, sunglasses, sunscreen   
-bathing suit & beach towel   
-surf suit / rashgard   
-Travel water bottle   
-Yoga attire   
-Sandals   
-Walking shoes   
-light weight flowy linens   
-beach cover ups   
-book to enjoy during freetime  
-toiletries- shampoo, conditioner, toothbrush, toothpaste

**What are additional excursions I can enjoy while on Retreat?**

Some ways you can enrich your trip include booking a massage, surf lessons, horseback riding, and sea kayaking.

**Do I need travel Insurance?**

[We highly recommend you get cancel anytime trip insurance. It is not mandatory, however, it is highly encouraged. You can read the article HERE to find the best trip insurance for you.](https://www.forbes.com/advisor/travel-insurance/best-cancel-for-any-reason-travel-insurance/)

# get in touch

We'd love to hear from you! Please fill out the form below or send a note directly to hello@wildlywellretreats.com

[Submit form](javascript:void(0))

[Book a Call](/book-a-call)[FAQS](/faqs)[Booking Terms](/terms-and-conditions)[Work With Us](/work-with-us)

## Find the Best Yoga Retreats in Lisbon

Portugal is a hot destination for many travelers for its endless sun and breathtaking ocean views.

Lisbon, the capital of Portugal, takes this coastal country to a whole new level.

The port of Portugal indeed has the same landscapes as the rest of the tiny country but is also covered with charming colorful houses, giving it a unique look and feel.

Century-old wooden trams run throughout the stone streets and the restaurants are otherworldly in both their style and quality. Or you can hop on their super-efficient Rede Expresso for a modern take on Portugal.

Course through the beautiful Rio Zezere, or visit the beautiful Sintra for an awe-inspiring quiet town. Stay for a few nights on your way to your Buddha Retreat or book a night stay as a guest in a shared room in the heart of the city.

It’s truly a mesmerizing experience to visit Lisbon…

...perhaps that is why it is one of the most popular spots in all of Europe to have a yoga retreat.

Improve your body and mind on your next yoga holiday.

## Popular Yoga Holidays Near Lisbon

Lisbon in itself is worth a visit, but you can still create the retreat of your dreams in Lisbon. You can search based on a specific yoga style, such as Iyengar yoga, vinyasa flow yoga, ashtanga yoga, yoga nidra, vinyasa yoga, or hatha yoga. (Check out [Casa Vinyasa](https://www.casavinyasa.com/en) if you're looking for a seriously intense Ashtanga yoga practice in the city.) Deepen your yoga practice with daily yoga classes, or deepen your yoga meditation practise during a yoga and meditation retreat. Stay in a retreat center that offers spa treatments, such as a massage or energy healing. Plan a surf yoga retreat or chill out by living in Lisbon time.

### [Yoga and Surf Retreats](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/yoga-and-surfing-retreats/lisbon)

Portugal is the surf capital of Europe so surf holidays are extremely popular. Yogis from around the world take advantage of this and book yoga and surf retreats all throughout the country. For those looking for the charming experience of Lisbon, there are plenty of yoga and surf courses nearby.

### [Cheap Yoga Retreats in Portugal](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/affordable-yoga-retreats/lisbon)

Portugal has traditionally been one of the more affordable countries in Europe. It’s no surprise, then, that it attracts a lot of budget-friendly travelers. Yogis looking for something on the low end of the price range can easily find affordable retreats in Portugal.

![Header Logo](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/2151332572/settings_images/4KL7vTn2TtKM9UzPf60R_Copy_of_Rustic_Organic_Flower_Frame_Script_Logo_3.png)

## 

## Mindful Collective Retreat

#### Portugal | May 28-June 2, 2026

#### SOLD OUT

 

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/6627564-3d71-f2a-facc-b4ef037d3c2_Portugal-Yoga-retreat-center-aerial-3_1_.jpeg)

## We're going to Portugal!

Join Sarah for an incredible six-day retreat at a regenerative farm along the Portuguese west coast countryside.

Let's kick off summer with a week full of hiking, mobility training, yummy yoga flows, making memories on a boat, eating delicious & local food and spending time with new (and old) friends.

Improve your range of motion & flexibility in Sarah's classes! You'll leave feeling more connected to your body *(and probably a little sore).* Go on some amazing adventures & eat insanely delicious food! Get connected with nature like never before - *we're staying on a eucalyptus farm*! Make new & beautiful memories. Make new friends. Get connected with old friends. Come alone! Come with a friend!

All levels are welcome.

## It's time you did something for yourself. You deserve it.

You won't regret this.

##### HERE'S WHAT'S INCLUDED...

### 

**INCLUDED**

6 days, 5 nights stay   
Morning & evening yoga & mobility classes (8-9 in total)  
All meals - locally sourced by a private chef  
Guided private hike + transportation  
Private Catamaran Boat Day + transportation  
Transportation to and from Lisbon

**NOT INCLUDED**

Flight to Lisbon  
Massages or any additional excursions/add-ons

#### 

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/350fc1c-571-e22-eeb1-7405264edfd_1.png)

#### STUNNING ACCOMMODATIONS

You'll be staying at a  Portuguese Family Farm - close to Lagoa de Albufeiera and Meco Beach. *Just 45 min from the airport!*

You'll be immersed in beautiful gardens and surrounding eucalyptus forests, while having the comforts you know and love. *This place is absolutely stunning.*

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/eab3d48-7dcf-6acd-e303-cfb4ca8c74c3_2.png)

#### A WEEKEND JUST FOR YOU

With a structured schedule and designated free time, you get to make the weekend exactly what you need it to be.

All classes & excursions - while included in your retreat cost - are optional. This retreat is for YOU. So you are encouraged to do what you want throughout the week.

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/4216a57-676c-527e-300c-fc133c30fa_3.png)

#### TOP TIER MOVEMENT CLASSES

Sarah has taught yoga & mobility all over the world to celebrities, local students & friends and will push you beyond your perceived limits. You'll leave feeling strong, flexible & well-connected to your body.

Classes will be for all levels - beginners are welcome! *This is not a yoga retreat!* We will be training your mobility aka your flexibility and strength. You might see *some* flows, some chill(ish) classes! But come eager to learn about your body & get to work.

## RETREAT SCHEDULE

**DAY 1**Group transportation leaves Lisbon  
Arrival & Orientation  
Opening Ceremony & Flow  
Dinner  
  
**DAY 2**Light Breakfast & Coffee  
Morning Forest Meditation  
Stretch & Breathe Class  
Breakfast  
Free Time  
Lunch  
Evening Mobility Workshop  
Dinner

**DAY 3**Light Breakfast & Coffee  
Morning Stretch & Breathe  
Private Group Hike to explore the Rechã D’Arcos  
Breakfast  
Lunch  
*Free Time*  
Evening Mobility Workshop  
Dinner

## 

**DAY 4**Light Breakfast & Coffee  
Morning Mobility Workshop  
Breakfast  
Private Boat Excursion  
Dinner

**DAY 5**Light Breakfast & Coffee  
Morning Mobility Workshop  
Breakfast  
Beach Trip  
Lunch  
Evening Stretch & Breathe  
Dinner

**DAY 6**  
Light Breakfast & Coffee  
Closing Ceremony + Flow  
Breakfast  
Check Out + Transportation back to Lisbon

*\*Schedule is subject to change, however excursions will not change*

## ACCOMMODATIONS & PRICING OPTIONS

You have the option to book a single or double room.

Spots are limited on this retreat, so pick your bed, put your deposit down and relax until it's time to go!

Once you put your deposit down you will be sent an intake form. Please fill this out as soon as you can. This is the form where you will be able to let me know if there is a specific person you wish to room with. And if you're coming alone, you'll get to meet someone new!!

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/c3d3328-a8e-5df-646-a4c6e268d631_Portugal-Yoga-retreat-center-bedroom-double-bed.jpeg)

#### Single Room

Book a single room for a little extra privacy! All single rooms are spacious with an ensuite bathroom.

*Cost: $3,150 per person*

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/18107d-22b-64e0-a0af-c5a21b1f3411_Portugal-Yoga-retreat-center-twin-rooms.jpg)

#### Double Room

Get to know someone new (or come with a friend) in this double room! All rooms are spacious with an ensuite bathroom.

*Cost: $2,600 per person*

## Getting There

We will be staying at Casas Na Ferraria about 30 min outside of Lisbon. Our opening ceremony starts at 5:30pm, and check in starts at 4pm!

**Arriving:**If you plan to go directly from the airport to the farm, you need to leave the airport by 3:15pm - so plan your flights accordingly.

If you plan to arrive to Lisbon early, Sarah will help you arrange your transportation from your hotel/accommodation to the farm.

**Leaving:**There will be a group shuttle leaving Casas na Ferraria on Tuesday (June 2nd) morning by 11am to take you either to the Lisbon airport (about 45 min) or into downtown Lisbon, based on your travel. *If you need to leave earlier, Sarah will help accommodate! But our last class & closing ceremony will be the morning of our last day (June 2nd), so keep that in mind.*

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/83f0270-8c06-6f8-a-2a1d3d67a4_672614fa9a0d087a550ba0e0_thisispaper-casa-na-ferraria-enter-arquitectura-17.jpg)

## MEET YOUR GUIDE

### Sarah Randall ***RYT-350, FRCms, Kinstretch Level II, Strength Coach***

Sarah helps her clients step out of diet culture and into an improved relationship with themselves through intuitive eating, mindful movement, and positive self-talk.

You can expect Sarah's mobility & flow classes to challenging, individualized, *even in a group setting*, and fun. Sarah creates a supportive space where you can deepen your mind–body connection, build resilience, and discover just how capable you truly are. No matter your body size, experience level, or mobility background, you’ll be guided to move with confidence and intention.

@sarahlindsrandall on Tiktok & Instagram

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/b4f74ed-736-cf7-db02-7d836adda53d_IMG_5B83107CC23D-1.jpeg)
![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/7f541-60a3-746e-e253-51a132333_6725de89f869b2c401f05411_thisispaper-casa-na-ferraria-enter-arquitectura-04.jpg)
![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/11a4733-ff0f-65cc-ef6d-dc4b3a072e4_6725de9226ad6c79d2555ceb_thisispaper-casa-na-ferraria-enter-arquitectura-11.jpg)
![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/de0a3ca-2767-5218-616b-b0038c0407_6725de8cbab831544d1585f6_thisispaper-casa-na-ferraria-enter-arquitectura-07.jpg)
![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/f1ba7c8-0457-f2b-abb-8b5e6a70264e_Portugal-Yoga-retreat-center-dinning-area.jpg)
![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/22e46-30d-d233-f5cc-d68eb5274853_yoga_toom.jpeg)
![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2161977938/settings_images/4d20c81-7d-d604-8b05-0623f2c2e50e_YOGA-RETREAT-CENTER-FOR-HIRE-PORTUGAL-.jpg)

#### Good Yoga Series Waitlist

Be the first to know all the details about the next Good Yoga Series! *Hint: It will start late September.*

# ACCOMMODATIONS

Rooms are bright and spacious, with each one opening to a tranquil courtyard, perfect for slow mornings or sunset unwinding. Designed to invite rest and ease, they offer a quiet retreat between yoga flows and salty adventures.

Choose from a triple, double, or private room, with either a shared or ensuite bathroom. All rooms are thoughtfully appointed and offer a peaceful place to return to at the end of each full, sun-soaked day.

# Portugal Retreat (July, 2026)

## A Barefoot Summer

July 11-17, 2026

Vila Nova de Milfontes, Portugal

with Kianna Miller

*Join us for a week of wellness, unwinding, and summer fun,*

***only a few spots left**!*

# Yoga + Wellness Retreat

More than a yoga retreat, A Barefoot Summer is a retreat for the soul. An invitation to unwind from life and reconnect with yourself, with others, and with the wild beauty of the world around you.

We gather together in a playful, curious community ready to awaken spirits. Each day flows with a rhythm of movement and stillness, depth and creativity, presence and joy. Whether you’re brand new to yoga or a lifelong practitioner, all levels are welcome.

Start your mornings slowly with coffee or tea on your patio, soaking in the landscape, before flowing into energizing movement practices. Afternoons are sun-drenched and open: beach hangs, pond dips, hikes, hammock naps, deep belly laughs, and workshops. As the day winds down, relax into restorative practices, enriching conversations, and a chance to bathe under the stars, before you tumble into rest.

Kick your shoes off and join us for a week of movement, connection, and nature on Portugal’s wild coast!

# OUR VILLA

Tucked away on a sprawling 275-acre farm along Portugal’s Alentejo coast, [Cocoon](https://www.cocoonportugal.com/) is a true haven for retreat seekers. Our group will enjoy private access to the grounds and villa while being just a 10 minute drive from charming villages and pristine beaches. Cocoon creates a dreamy balance of wild nature and soulful comfort.

Daily practices take place in two yoga shalas: an outdoor pine shala, nestled under a canopy of ancient trees, with the occasional sheep or goat wandering nearby, and an indoor shala featuring high ceilings and beautiful, hand-made Santa Catarina tiles.

The kitchen team lovingly crafts three nourishing meals each day, using fresh, local ingredients from their own garden and nearby farms. From vibrant breakfasts (Cocoon roasts their own coffee beans!) to satisfying dinners, expect nourishing and flavorful dishes that delight your taste buds.

*Our venue can accommodate most dietary restrictions. Please make these known to us upon booking.*

Choose from a triple, double, or private room, with either a shared or ensuite bathroom. All rooms are thoughtfully appointed and offer a peaceful place to return to at the end of each full, sun-soaked day.

# YOUR HOST

## *Kianna Miller*

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==)

Kianna is well-known for bringing sun-kissed cheeks (yes, both sets) and a little extra sand to her yoga mat. She has years of experience holding space for authentic connection and self-discovery. In the studio and around the world, her classes are welcoming and supportive.

Intuitive movement and curiosity are the core of Kianna’s teaching. Her classes open up communication between mind, body, and breath, inviting students to trust in their own experience of movement. In her energizing morning classes, beats get loud, flows get fun, and imagination runs wild. In her slower evening classes, students are encouraged to soften and witness each layer of depth in their physical, mental, and emotional bodies.

Learn more [here](https://swellyogastudio.com/about/the-team/).

# GUEST REFLECTIONS

**“the best decision”**

“Starting my travels with Kianna’s retreat was the best decision I could’ve made. It gave me space to truly rest, reconnect with myself. Every detail was filled with care, love, and intention. You can feel how much heart Kianna puts into what she creates. I’d join her again anywhere in the world!”

-Steffi

**“unforgettable”**

“Swell’s retreats perfectly balance community and personal space. The locations and activities create unforgettable experiences, and I noticed a deep, positive change in myself from my first to my second retreat. As an introvert, I felt completely comfortable and welcome attending alone. I can’t recommend it enough!”

-Hannah

**“magic”**

I literally feel changed by this retreat experience. I see nature more vividly, taste and experience food with so much more appreciation, and feel like a much more centered, calm, purposeful human. Kianna has a wonderful gift for cultivating an environment where real magic happens. Can’t wait for the next one!

-Karin

# JOIN US!

Reach out at **retreats@swellyogastudio.com** with your preferred accommodation style to join us for our summer retreat in Portugal!

*We believe deeply in the powerful healing of wellness retreats. If this retreat piques your interest but you’re feeling hesitant, please send a note our way. We are happy to chat, learn more about you, and support you in making the best decision for your current needs*.

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==)

# FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE

In line with the broader scope of the Swell Gives program, our retreat team believes in sharing the gift of holistic health with everyone.

We are proud to offer financial assistance to those who are not in a position to afford the full cost of a wellness retreat. Since the beginning, we have been steadily donating a percentage of retreat proceeds toward this program to help share the magic of transformative healing.

Please fill out the information below so we can learn more about your needs and how we can support your journey!

## RETREAT FAQ’s

You have two airport options: Lisbon (LIS) and Faro (FAO). Lisbon is about a 2-hour drive, and Faro is slightly closer at 1.5 hours, depending, of course, on how many espressos you’ve had 🙂

Guests are highly encouraged to rent a car for the freedom to explore nearby beaches, trails, and villages at your own pace. Uber is also an option for both airport transfers and local adventures. While you’re responsible for booking your own transportation, we’re happy to help connect guests arriving around the same time who’d like to share rides.

Check-in at Cocoon is between 4–6pm on July 11th, and check-out is at 10am on July 17th. *Please note: Cocoon is not able to accommodate early arrivals or extended stays before or after the retreat.*

Even better! Retreats are a beautiful way to connect with like-hearted people through movement, nature, and shared experience.

Whether you choose a private or shared room, solo travelers are absolutely welcome, and many do come on their own.

You’ll be met with a warm, welcoming community and plenty of opportunities to form meaningful connections with people from around the globe!

YES. YES. YES.

No experience necessary; just an open heart, a curious mind. Whether you’re new to yoga or new to retreats, we welcome you exactly as you are.

All of Swell’s retreats are home to anyone looking to nurture their hearts & souls through movement, connection, and nature.

Every practice is intentionally designed to meet you where you are, giving you the space to modify based on your energy, experience, and needs.

Our minds can get the best of us when we approach new things. If you find yourself hesitating, please reach out! We are more than happy to hop on a call to learn about your concerns and provide you with additional details that support you in making the best decision for *you*.

If you are a US passport holder, you can travel to Portugal for up to 90 days without a visa. Your passport must have 3 months validity from date of entry.

If you hold a passport from another country, please check your unique requirements.

Yes! Cocoon’s menu is primarily plant based and prepared with local, organic ingredients.

In addition to vegan & vegetarian diets, we can accommodate most restrictions (gluten, lactose, etc.). These must be made known to us when booking.

Nobody books a yoga retreat planning to cancel. We *highly* recommend travel insurance.

If you choose to buy insurance, we recommend your policy cover the activities of this retreat as well as unexpected cancellation, sickness, losses and all the usual risks. We suggest bringing a copy of the policy with you in case of an emergency.

30% of your retreat payment is non-refundable.

If a cancellation is made more than 8 weeks before retreat start date, you will be refunded your payment minus the 30%.

If a cancellation is made within 8 weeks of the retreat start date, the entire payment is non-refundable unless Swell is able to fill your spot. If Swell is able to fill your spot, you will be refunded your payment minus the 30%.

Cancellations must be made via email (retreats@swellyogastudio.com).

# portugal yoga retreat: space for joy

A 7-day retreat to reconnect with yourself and create space for what’s next

[Talk With Our Team](https://calendly.com/zoe-presentpracticeyoga/15min)

[Talk With Our Team](https://calendly.com/zoe-presentpracticeyoga/15min)

[Reserve Your Spot](/portugal-2026#booknow)

[Reserve Your Spot](/portugal-2026#booknow)

## the retreat:

Set on 275 acres of sun-soaked farmland along Portugal’s protected Atlantic coast, this 7-day retreat is an invitation to return to presence—and rediscover the joy in simply being. Here, among pine forests, ocean breezes, and long shared meals, you’ll be guided back to sukha—the “good space” where ease, intention, and clarity meet.

This isn’t a retreat about pushing or proving. It’s about making space: Space to listen. To move. To reflect. To reconnect with what matters most.

Through daily yoga, meditation, and self-inquiry—rooted in the Present Practice philosophy—you’ll explore the balance of sthira and sukha, effort and ease, doing and being. You’ll drop into stillness, move with purpose, and create rituals that feel like home. Our practices are designed not to escape life, but to return to it—more fully, more freely, more you.

Afternoons offer time to rest or explore: visit quiet beaches, bike the countryside, read under the olive trees, or sip coffee with new friends. We’ll gather each evening around nourishing farm-to-table meals, and close the week with a joyful wood-fired pizza night and spritz bar celebration under the stars.

By the end of this retreat, you’ll feel more grounded in who you are, more connected to your why, and more spacious in your heart and mind. This is your time to pause, to reflect, and to step forward with presence.

![People dining outdoors on a patio and at a table in front of a house with a tiled roof, surrounded by greenery.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65b7e7b223b81e6e98c3002b/c06e344a-bba5-4738-ad32-ae00ad04b403/portugal+4.jpeg)

## The Journey: Portugal’s Wild Coast

Tucked along Portugal’s southwest coast, between white-washed villages and the crashing waves of the Atlantic, lies Cocoon — a 275-acre coastal farm and retreat haven. Located in the Alentejo region, just a short drive from Vila Nova de Milfontes and Praia do Cavaleiro, this space feels both grounded and expansive — a true return to nature.

We’ll have the entire Cocoon property to ourselves, including two beautiful yoga shalas (one nestled beneath pine trees, the other light-filled and tiled in handmade Santa Catarina ceramics), hammocks strung between olive trees, peaceful walking trails, and visits from Cocoon’s charming animal friends — think peacocks, goats, and colorful chickens.

Each guest room is simple, comfortable, and surrounded by open space. With private, double, and triple occupancy options — most with ensuite bathrooms — you’ll have everything you need to rest and restore.

During the day, you’ll have the freedom to explore at your own pace:

Swim in the ocean just 10 minutes away.

Sip strong Portuguese coffee by the garden.

Bike to hidden picnic spots.

Or simply be still.

This is a retreat that invites slowness and spaciousness — and gives you the freedom to find your rhythm again.

![A wide sandy beach with a few people walking along the shoreline, waves crashing on the beach, and cliffs in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65b7e7b223b81e6e98c3002b/7aca51c6-1cfd-406a-9d05-ca830bbdd95b/portugal.jpg)

## What to Expect

**Yoga & Self-Inquiry**

Each morning begins with a grounding yoga practice, breathwork, and guided journaling — rooted in the Present Practice philosophy of presence, clarity, and intention. You’ll explore the balance of sthira and sukha (steadiness and ease), returning to your body and breath as anchors for self-awareness. Every other day includes a deeper workshop focused on ritual and intention-setting, yin and meditation, or heart-centered movement — designed to help you reconnect to your “why” and create space for what’s next.

**Nature & Slow Living**

Between practices, enjoy long, unstructured afternoons:

*Lounge on quiet beaches just 10 minutes away*

*Take scenic bike rides or wander forested farm trails*

*Read under the olive trees or nap in a hammock*

*Visit local towns like Vila Nova de Milfontes for espresso and inspiration*

*This is a space to disconnect from distraction and reconnect to your own rhythm.*

**Farm-to-Table Meals**

All meals are included and crafted from Cocoon’s garden or neighboring farms. Expect fresh fruit, ancient grains, seasonal vegetables, sustainable fish, and wood-fired pizza. Meals are shared and soulful — always nourishing, never restrictive. Dietary needs are happily accommodated.

**The Energy**

This retreat is equal parts sacred and celebratory. We’ll close the week with a joyful pizza night and spritz bar under the stars, soaking in connection and presence with your new retreat family.

You’ll leave with more clarity, deeper ease, and a spacious sense of home — in your body, your heart, and your path ahead.

![Three women practicing yoga in a sunlit room with indoor plants.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65b7e7b223b81e6e98c3002b/3d9f0c36-b217-47d6-98b4-4e2ae4463636/portugal+3.jpeg)

## itinerary overview

Each day invites presence, practice, and space to reconnect with yourself. Expect a balance of movement, reflection, stillness, and joy.

* ## 

  Arrive at Cocoon and settle into your room

  Explore the land, meet the animals, sip strong coffee in the garden

  Opening circle + intention-setting ritual

  Farm-to-table welcome dinner with the group
* ## 

  Morning yoga, meditation, and journaling

  Workshop: Intention Setting + Manifestation

  Free time to walk the farm trails, relax in a hammock, or visit the local town

  All meals included: Farm-fresh breakfast, lunch, and dinner
* ## 

  Morning practice in the pine-shaded outdoor shala

  Group journaling and guided breathwork

  Free afternoon for beach lounging, reading, or deep rest

  All meals included: Farm-fresh breakfast, lunch, and dinner
* ## 

  Morning yoga + group journaling

  Workshop: Limiting Beliefs + Mindset Reset

  Afternoon free to explore, reflect, or connect with new friends

  All meals included: Farm-fresh breakfast, lunch, and dinner
* ## 

  Morning yoga + journaling

  Free time to wander the property or visit the nearby village

  Workshop: Creating Space Through Restorative Yoga + Yogic Philosophy

  All meals included: Farm-fresh breakfast, lunch, and dinnerour camp near Tiger’s Nest
* ## 

  Morning flow + closing journaling circle

  Spacious afternoon to revisit the beach or rest under the olive trees

  Closing Cacao Ceremony before dinner — a ritual to reflect, release, and celebrate

  Farewell wood-fired pizza night + spritz bar celebration in the courtyard
* ## 

  Final morning practice + optional journaling

  Breakfast, hugs, and slow goodbyes

  Depart grounded, inspired, and full of clarity

Note: This itinerary is subject to change based on weather, group energy, and the natural flow of our shared experience. Trust that everything will unfold exactly as it’s meant to.

![A vibrant cityscape with colorful buildings along a river, boats on the water, and a bridge in the background under a blue sky.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65b7e7b223b81e6e98c3002b/1751902743787-W8TV98B0Y7EB7ALO5AJH/portugal.jpg)

![A smiling woman with long, wavy blonde hair and fair skin, standing with her arms crossed against a textured stone wall.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65b7e7b223b81e6e98c3002b/4ea2d7c4-21ec-446a-a10f-f52e3b9d0acb/hOM_headshots-9031+%281%29.jpg)

## MEET YOUR RETREAT LEADERS

**Morgan O’Hare**

Retreat Leader | Founder of Present Practice Yoga

Morgan is the founder of Present Practice Yoga and the visionary behind our global retreats. Known for her grounded presence, poetic cueing, and ability to hold deep, soulful space, Morgan’s teaching blends philosophy, embodiment, and mindfulness into every practice. She invites you to slow down, feel fully, and reconnect with your truest self — on and off the mat.

Morgan’s gift is cultivating sukha — ease, joy, and expansion. Her presence and teachings create a sense of upliftment and possibility, helping you soften, open, and rise into more of who you truly are.

Portugal is one of Morgan’s favorite places to escape to — a place where life slows down and beauty meets simplicity. With its wild coastlines, intentional pace, and timeless charm, it’s the perfect setting for the deeper work this retreat is designed to offer. Morgan has carefully crafted the programming for Space for Joy to bring you into presence through yoga, meditation, self-inquiry, and joyful connection — all rooted in the Present Practice philosophy.

On retreat with Morgan, you can expect intuitive guidance, thought-provoking journaling prompts, embodied yoga practices, and the kind of open-hearted leadership that gently brings you home to yourself.

![A smiling young man with light skin and short, tousled brown hair stands in front of a stone wall, wearing a sleeveless white shirt and showing tattoos on his neck and arm.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65b7e7b223b81e6e98c3002b/c0b6afac-ea02-4ad1-8f9b-fbf8c6ba02eb/hOM_headshots-9037.jpg)

**Carter Miles**

Retreat Co-Leader | E-RYT 500 Yoga Teacher

Carter brings a wealth of knowledge about the body, mind, and nervous system — delivered with clarity, curiosity, and presence. With an in-depth understanding of alignment, functional movement, and the energetic body, his teaching bridges science and soul in a way that helps students surpass their perceived limits with compassion and grace.

Carter brings the grounding force of sthira — the steadiness and strength that anchors transformation. His presence offers the container for true inner work, allowing students to feel safe, supported, and empowered in their process.

Together, Morgan and Carter embody the central theme of Space for Joy: the sacred balance between sthira and sukha, structure and softness, presence and expansion.

This Portugal retreat also happens to close with a special celebration: Carter’s birthday falls on the final full day of the retreat! Expect a joyful, soulful day of movement, connection, and honoring life — the Present Practice way.

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65b7e7b223b81e6e98c3002b/7817dae1-37b2-4c6d-b69c-b3da873e597a/6C6AE593-0670-41A0-8E01-D4DF6A447BBC_1_105_c.jpeg)

**Jeanne Bourguignon**

Retreat coordinator | Manager of International Retreats at Present Practice Yoga

Jeanne is the steady heartbeat behind our retreats, holding together every detail with calm precision and heartfelt care so that each journey unfolds with ease. As Retreat Host & Coordinator, she ensures guests feel supported from the moment they arrive, seamlessly weaving logistics, timing, and behind-the-scenes organization into a smooth and grounded experience.

With a natural gift for creating order and a warm, reassuring presence, Jeanne allows participants to fully relax into their practice, connection, and rest, knowing everything is thoughtfully taken care of. Alongside structure, she brings lightness and humanity to the group experience — offering a kind word, a shared laugh, or quiet support whenever it’s needed — creating a space where everyone feels genuinely welcomed, held, and at home throughout the retreat.

### FAQ

* ## 

  Not at all. All yoga, meditation, and workshops are beginner-friendly and optional. You’ll be supported and guided every step of the way, whether this is your first retreat or your fiftieth.
* ## 

  Absolutely. Many of our guests come alone and leave with lifelong friends. If you're staying in a shared room, we’ll pair you with a same-gender roommate.
* ## 

  You can fly into either Lisbon (LIS) or Faro (FAO). From there, we recommend renting a car and driving to Cocoon Portugal — it’s about a 2-hour drive from Lisbon, and slightly less from Faro. Carpooling is encouraged, and we’ll help coordinate this closer to the retreat.
* ## 

  Yes! All in-country transportation is fully included. You’ll be met at the Paro airport by our trusted guides and drivers and supported every step of the way.
* ## 

  Nope! Cocoon provides Manduka mats, blocks, straps, bolsters, and all the yoga props you’ll need.
* ## 

  Connected, curious, and open-hearted. This retreat is for anyone craving presence, joy, and a deeper connection to themselves and others. This retreat is capped at 20–24 guests — mostly solo travelers and like-hearted humans seeking connection, deep conversations, and lots of laughter along the way.
* ## 

  Retreat deposits are non-refundable and non-transferable. All other payments are non-refundable due to the nature of international travel. We recommend purchasing your own travel insurance in case Life happens.
* ## 

  Yes. Cocoon serves fresh, farm-to-table meals and is happy to accommodate most dietary needs, including gluten-free, vegetarian, and vegan. We’ll gather your preferences after booking.

![Person lying on a wooden dock by a calm lake in a rural area under clear sky.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65b7e7b223b81e6e98c3002b/825697d6-deb0-43e0-9f48-289fa8bfb402/portugal+5.jpg)

# Investment & Room Options

* #### 

  **Private Room with Ensuite**

  One guest per room / One double bed + private ensuite bathroom

  Ideal for solo travelers seeking extra space and stillness. Quiet and cozy with views of the surrounding land

  **Double Room with Ensuite**

  Two guests per room (shared with a same-gender roommate or friend/partner)

  Two single beds (or one shared bed upon request) + private ensuite bathroom

  Spacious and light-filled — perfect for connection with comfort

  **Triple Room with Ensuite**

  Three guests per room (same-gender roommates)

  Three single beds + private ensuite bathroom

  A great way to meet new friends and share the experience

  **Double Room with Shared Bathroom**

  Two guests per room (same-gender roommates)

  Two single beds + shared hallway bathroom (shared with up to 4 total guests)

  Budget-friendly and peaceful
* #### 

  Private Room with Ensuite (solo occupancy): **$3,800**

  Double Room with Ensuite (2 people: sign up solo or with a friend): **$3,000 per person**

  Triple Room with Ensuite (3 people: same-gender roommates): **$2,600 per person**

  Double Room with Shared Bathroom (2 people, shared hallway bath): **$2,600 per person**
* #### 

  + A **$500** non-refundable, non-transferable deposit is required to reserve your spot in any shared room (**$800** deposit is required for a private room)
  + Remaining balance may be paid in full or split into monthly payments — we’re happy to create a custom payment plan that works for you
  + Please note: Flights and car rentals are not included in the retreat price. We recommend guests coordinate rental cars with fellow participants for ease of travel and exploration.
* #### 

  + 7 days / 6 nights of immersive retreat programming and accommodations at Cocoon Portugal, a 275-acre coastal farm and retreat haven
  + Daily yoga, meditation, and journaling practices in indoor + outdoor shalas
  + Three themed workshops:

    → Intention & Manifestation

    → Mindset & Limiting Beliefs

    → Restorative Practice & Embodied Yogic Philosophy
  + Closing cacao ceremony and intention ritual
  + Daily farm-to-table meals — breakfast, lunch, and dinner — made from local, organic ingredients
  + Use of yoga props, sound system, and curated sacred spaces
  + Outdoor lounging areas, trails, hammocks, and animal friends
  + Free time for the beach, farm walks, journaling, and local town visits
  + Farewell pizza night + spritz bar celebration
  + Present Practice retreat journal
  + Other surprises along the way!
* #### 

  + Flights to and from Portugal (you can fly to Lisbon or Faro airport)
  + Transportation to and from Cocoon Portugal (car rentals are strongly encouraged; group carpooling will be organized)
  + Alcoholic beverages (available for purchase on site; no outside alcohol permitted)
  + Optional off-site excursions or shopping in town
  + Travel insurance (recommended)
  + Optional local staff gratuities

Retreat testimonials

* ![Two women standing outdoors with elephants in the background.]()

  ## Megan Luety

  **Kenya, 2025**

  “I joined a retreat to Kenya led by Bailey and Morgan, and it was such an amazing experience! It was wonderful having all the planning taken care of, and everyone that was on the retreat was so lovely. I loved having daily yoga led by the best teachers built into the schedule. Bailey and Morgan were always super helpful and kind, and made sure everyone felt included and comfortable. They are both such joys to be around, this experience was something I will remember forever. I've already booked my next retreat!”
* ![A smiling man standing outdoors in a natural landscape with hills, a lake, and cloudy sky in the background.]()

  ## Zhuo (Bob) Chen

  **Kenya, 2024 | Patagonia, 2025**

  "It always amazes me how a 1-week retreat with Present Practice feels as rejuvenating as a 3-week vacation, even with the long flights and early mornings. Maybe it’s magic. Maybe it’s what happens when every detail is thoughtfully orchestrated by seasoned travelers and passionate yogis. Either way, it’s good."
* ![Smiling woman in long sleeve shirt and camouflage pants standing in open vehicle with safari view, safari animals grazing in the background, and a scenic sky.]()

  ## Kat Tisdale

  **Kenya, 2024 | Thailand, 2025 | Peru, 2025**

  "In just the last year, I have been to three continents with Morgan and Present Practice for three incredible yoga retreats, all each incredibly unique and special to me. Going on a retreat with Present Practice is such a special way to travel the world, deepen your yoga practice, build a new community of incredible people, and travel without having to organize all of the logistics. Each retreat, I have felt incredibly taken care of with the amazing locations and housing options they choose, the nourishing food, and the fun packed schedule. Morgan and the Present Practice team hold the space so well. Every retreat I have come back with amazing new friendships, a deeper relationship with myself, and probably another Present Practice retreat I’m eyeing to book next :)) This is my new favorite way to travel, and I’m excited for all of the future adventures ahead with Present Practice!"
* ![A man with a shaved head and a woman in workout clothes practicing yoga on mats in a wooden room, with the man in a plank position.]()

  ## Tim Silfies

  **Sayulita, 2025**

  "Pictures and descriptions don’t do justice to the retreats Morgan and the Present Practice team leads. You have to experience one to understand.

  My first trip was to Sayulita, Mexico. The journey was relaxing when I wanted it to be, challenging when I needed it to be, and truly profound when I least expected it. (None of this was an accident. It was expertly and subtly guided by Morgan and Carter.)

  If you’re reading this, you might be debating whether to invest in one of these experiences. The only real choice-at least for me-is where to go next."
* ![A shirtless man smiling at the camera on a beach with trees and other people in the background.]()

  ## Eoin Sorohan

  **Philippines, 2023 | Guatemala, 2024**

  "The 2 international retreats that I have been a part of with Present Practice Yoga have been up there with the most memorable and impactful experiences of my life to date. These retreats go far beyond yoga, blending the opportunity for deepening your practice and self discovery, with exploring the local culture, unforgettable activities/adventures, and connecting with like-minded people. The friendships I’ve made have lasted well beyond the retreats, creating a vibrant community to enjoy back home in Austin. With all meals, accommodation, and activities included, you can fully immerse yourself in the journey without the inevitable decision fatigue that arises on a self-planned trip. If you’re considering attending a retreat with Present Practice Yoga, I would urge you to take the leap - you will not regret it!"
* ![Four young women smiling and hugging outdoors with mountains in the background.]()

  ## Holly Ediger

  **Peru, 2025**

  "There simply aren’t words to fully describe the incredible experience I had on the recent Peru retreat. The Present Practice team created such a grounding, welcoming space from day one - every class, workshop, and group activity felt intentional and supportive. The balance of yoga, cultural immersion, and true rest was exactly what I needed. What stood out most was how thoughtfully the whole team cared for every detail, big and small. I left feeling deeply restored, connected, and inspired."
* ![Women gathered around a kitchen counter, wearing matching green and white aprons with a leafy pattern, preparing food outdoors under a thatched roof with green foliage in the background.]()

  ## Amy Acosta

  **Guatemala, 2020 | Kenya, 2021 | Philippines, 2023 | Tuscany, 2024 | Thailand, 2025**

  “Present Practice retreats have become my annual promise to myself—an invitation to step out of the noise and into awe. From the shores of Lake Atitlán to the wilds of Kenya and the turquoise waters of the Philippines, each journey blends soulful yoga, meaningful connection, and pure wonder. Every retreat leaves me more grounded, more alive, and more in touch with who I am.”
* ![A woman with black hair, sunglasses, and a tan outfit standing in front of Machu Picchu with the mountain and ruins in the background.]()

  ## Rachel Herz

  **Peru, 2025**

  The Peru 2025 Yoga Retreat was an incredible experience from start to finish. What stood out to me most was the strong sense of community that formed so naturally within the group. It felt easy to connect, share, and enjoy the week together.

  The schedule struck a great balance between yoga/mindfulness sessions and adventure. I appreciated starting the days with grounding practices and then getting the chance to explore the surrounding area—whether hiking, visiting local sites, or simply taking in the scenery.

  The food was consistently excellent—fresh, nourishing, and clearly prepared with care. The location itself was stunning, with beautiful views and a peaceful atmosphere that added so much to the overall experience. The guides were knowledgeable, supportive, and genuinely enjoyable to be around.

  Overall, this retreat delivered exactly what I was hoping for: a mix of relaxation, meaningful activity, great people, and a memorable setting. I’d definitely recommend it.

[Leave a Google Review](#)

### 3 Day Fluidity Yoga Eco Retreat in Beach Paradise, Portugal

retreat-image [...] Silent meditation retreats near Lisbon and in the interior attract experienced practitioners seeking depth. One guest at a 10-day silent retreat described it as a "truly remarkable experience" that provided "lots of learning and lots of homework to take home." Portugal's quiet landscapes lend themselves naturally to this kind of inward-focused practice.

Fly into Lisbon, Porto, or Faro depending on your retreat region. Portugal is well connected to most European cities with budget airlines, keeping travel costs low.

Confirm transport from the airport to your retreat. Many hosts offer pickup, but some (especially urban programs) expect you to make your own way. The train and bus systems are reliable. [...] Pricing for a week in the Algarve runs $600 to $1,500 for standard yoga retreats, and $1,000 to $2,000 for extended detox programs with juice fasting.

### The Lisbon coast and Ericeira

The stretch from Cascais through Sintra to Ericeira combines proximity to Lisbon with Atlantic coastline. Cascais hosts massage-focused yoga retreats that guests describe as "the perfect balance of care, professionalism, and genuine transformation." Sintra offers more meditative, nature-immersed programs in the forested hills.

## Why a yoga retreat in Portugal:

Guests arrive needing a break from routine and leave describing themselves as "almost reborn," "lighter," and "reconnected." Portugal delivers this consistently, across every region.

## Why Portugal for Yoga

Portugal has quietly become one of Europe's most popular yoga retreat destinations. The combination of year-round mild climate, Atlantic coastline, affordable pricing, and a culture that genuinely values slowness makes it a natural fit for people seeking rest with depth.

The country offers distinct retreat regions. The Algarve in the south draws guests with warm weather, dramatic cliffs, and a growing number of wellness-focused venues. The Lisbon area (Cascais, Sintra, Ericeira) combines proximity to the capital with beach access and surf culture. Porto in the north has emerged as a hub for pilates, detox, and fitness-oriented retreats with a cosmopolitan edge. And the rural interior (Alentejo, Monchique) offers deep quiet for those who want true disconnection.

Pricing reflects excellent value for Western Europe. A 3 to 4 day retreat typically costs $300 to $600 including accommodation, meals, yoga, and often massage. Week-long programs range from $600 to $1,500. Detox and juice fasting retreats, which are particularly popular in Portugal, run $800 to $2,000 for 7 to 11 days.

Portugal is also one of the safest countries in Europe, which we hear matters enormously to solo travelers. Multiple guests mention choosing Portugal specifically because it felt accessible, well-connected, and easy to navigate on their own.
