### Frequently Asked Questions

### What types of yoga retreats are available in Portugal?

Portugal offers a wide range of retreat styles. The Algarve and Lagos area specializes in juice detox combined with yoga, meditation, and breathwork. The Lisbon coast (Cascais, Ericeira) focuses on surf and yoga, vinyasa, and massage-based retreats. Porto hosts fitness, pilates, and detox programs with a more urban feel.

You will also find silent meditation retreats near Lisbon, women's wellness retreats in the Alentejo, Kundalini yoga in the Algarve, and 200-hour [yoga teacher training programs](/s/ttc/portugal) in Tavira and other southern towns. Browse [all yoga retreats](/s/yoga-retreats) to see the full range.

### When is the best time for a yoga retreat in Portugal?

Portugal works year-round, which is one of its biggest advantages. Summer (June to September) offers the warmest weather and longest days, particularly in the Algarve where temperatures sit between 25 and 35 degrees Celsius. This is peak season for surf retreats on the Atlantic coast.

Spring (March to May) and autumn (September to November) offer milder temperatures, fewer crowds, and often lower pricing. One guest who came in February specifically appreciated the quiet: "I came in February, which perhaps would feel lonely to some, but was wonderful for me."

Winter retreats in the Algarve and around Lisbon still enjoy mild temperatures (12 to 18 degrees) and sunshine. The north (Porto) can be rainy in winter, so check specifics for that region.

### How much do yoga retreats in Portugal cost?

Short retreats (3 to 4 days) typically cost $250 to $500 including accommodation, meals, and daily yoga or pilates. Week-long programs run $500 to $1,200. Extended detox retreats (8 to 11 days) with juice fasting and workshops can range from $800 to $2,000.

Most programs include meals, accommodation, and all classes in the base price. Many also include massage or spa treatments. Porto-based retreats sometimes separate accommodation from the studio program, so confirm what is included before booking.

Booking typically requires a deposit with the remaining balance due 30 to 60 days before arrival.

### Is Portugal good for a first yoga retreat?

Yes. Portugal is one of the most frequently recommended destinations for first-time retreat goers, based on what people tell us. The reasons are practical: short flights from most of Europe, English widely spoken, safe and easy to navigate, and a culture that feels familiar enough to be comfortable while different enough to feel like an escape.

Multiple first-time guests describe Portugal as exceeding expectations. One wrote: "This was my first retreat experience, and I definitely want to return." Another, on her first solo trip abroad, described feeling "well looked after" throughout.

If you are new to retreats, we recommend starting with a 3 to 5 day program. Portugal has plenty of shorter options that give you a taste without a major time commitment.

### Can I combine yoga with surfing in Portugal?

Yes. Ericeira, on the coast north of Lisbon, is Europe's only World Surfing Reserve and a natural hub for surf and yoga retreats. Programs typically include morning yoga, afternoon surf lessons, and sometimes an evening restorative session.

The Algarve coast (Aljezur, Sagres) also offers surf-yoga combinations with warmer water and a more relaxed pace. One guest at an Ericeira retreat described it as "less than an hour from Lisbon" with an atmosphere that "makes you feel like at home since the beginning."

Browse surf and yoga retreats to compare programs across Portugal's coastline.

### What are juice detox retreats in Portugal like?

Juice detox retreats are one of Portugal's specialties, particularly in the Algarve around Lagos. These programs combine juice fasting with daily yoga, meditation, breathwork, and wellness workshops. They typically run 4 to 11 days.

Guests report real physical results. One guest wrote: "My main focus was to reset and cleanse my gut and change my eating habits. A more settled gut, weight loss, and relaxation. Plus I made new friends." Another described gaining "a better understanding of yoga and meditation" alongside the detox benefits.

These retreats are not casual. The fasting component can be intense. But the structure, with supportive staff and daily programming, makes it manageable. Hosts typically provide guidance on preparation before you arrive.

### Is Portugal safe for solo travelers?

Yes. Portugal consistently ranks among Europe's safest countries, and solo travelers make up a significant portion of yoga retreat guests here. One guest on her first solo trip abroad described the experience as positive from start to finish.

Retreat hosts in Portugal typically offer airport transfers or clear transport instructions. The country's public transport (trains, buses) is reliable and affordable for getting between Lisbon, Porto, and the Algarve.

Several guests mention that the retreat community itself is a big part of feeling safe. One described "magical connections along with deep peace and personal acceptance" and praised the "gently inclusive events with total voluntary contribution."

### What should I expect from accommodation at Portugal retreats?

Accommodation varies by retreat and region. The Algarve and rural areas tend to offer villa-style accommodation: boutique properties with pools, gardens, and shared or private rooms. Porto retreats sometimes operate as studio-based programs where you book your own nearby hotel.

One guest at a Porto retreat noted this distinction: "I felt that this is not a retreat but a fitness centre, as accommodation and meals are separate." This format works well for independent travelers who want more control over their schedule.

Rural retreats in the Alentejo and Monchique offer the most immersive experience, with glamping, eco-lodges, and properties surrounded by nature. One guest described "shadow work sessions" and yoga in a setting where she "felt safe" to do deeper emotional processing.

### What is the food like at yoga retreats in Portugal?

Portuguese retreat food gets consistently strong reviews. Programs typically serve plant-based or vegetarian meals made with fresh, local ingredients. The Algarve detox retreats focus on juices and raw foods, while other retreats serve full meals.

One guest described the food at a rural retreat as "exceptional and plentiful, made even more special as they grew lots of it." Another at a Porto program praised the cuisine prepared "with real care" using local olive oil.

Portugal's food culture is a genuine asset. Even simple retreat meals benefit from the country's tradition of fresh seafood, seasonal produce, and quality ingredients.

### What is the cancellation policy?

Each retreat sets its own cancellation terms, displayed on the listing page. The standard structure is a deposit at booking with the remaining balance due 30 to 60 days before arrival.

BookRetreats.com offers a 72-hour free cancellation policy on every single retreat on the site. If your plans change within that window, you receive a full refund.

Portugal's weather is generally reliable, but if your retreat is affected by unusual circumstances, reaching out to the host directly is the best first step for rescheduling.

## Yoga Retreats in Portugal: What the Reviews Reveal About Every Region

![Ally's avatar](/cdn-cgi/image/width=1200,quality=65,f=auto,sharpen=1,fit=cover,gravity=auto/images/work-with-us/fifth-team-mate.jpg)

## Who Comes to Portugal for Yoga (and Why They Keep Coming Back)

Three clear profiles emerge from the booking patterns. The first is the professional needing a reset. These guests describe intense years, career transitions, or simply hitting a wall. One guest wrote: "2025 had been a tough year and I wanted a reset before the new year started." Another came to Portugal after finishing a demanding corporate career, wanting time to "pause and reflect." They choose Portugal because it is easy to reach, easy to navigate, and delivers genuine rest without requiring a spiritual commitment.

The second is the health-focused guest, drawn specifically to Portugal's detox and wellness programs. These guests arrive with specific goals: gut health, weight management, menopause support, chronic pain. One guest came to "get rid of menopausal brain fog and take care of my body" and left understanding her body better. Another arrived after a cancer treatment wanting "some time out together to relax and reset." The Algarve's detox retreats attract people who want measurable outcomes alongside their yoga.

The third is the returning guest. Portugal has an unusually high repeat-visit rate compared to other destinations. One Ericeira surf retreat guest wrote: "I came once and had to repeat, and I will keep repeating." A Lagos detox guest described the venue as a place she felt "almost reborn" and planned to return. The combination of affordability, proximity to Europe, and personal connections with hosts makes coming back easy.

Noticeably absent from the Portugal data: the spiritual seeker looking for a profound awakening. Portugal's retreat scene is grounded, practical, and body-focused rather than mystical. If you are looking for [spiritual retreats](/s/yoga-retreats/spiritual-retreats), Bali or India may be a better fit. Portugal is for people who want to feel better in their bodies and come home rested.

## Portugal's Retreat Regions: A Practical Guide

### The Algarve and Lagos

The Algarve, particularly around Lagos, is Portugal's detox and wellness epicenter. Juice fasting retreats run 4 to 11 days and combine daily yoga, meditation, breathwork, and workshops with structured cleansing programs. Guests consistently describe real physical changes: clearer skin, better digestion, weight loss, improved sleep.

Beyond detox, the Algarve hosts smaller, intimate yoga retreats in boutique villas. One guest described a property where "Sylvia went above and beyond to look after us with nutritious meals and hospitality" in a "small and beautiful setting." The landscape here is dramatic cliffs, hidden coves, and reliable sunshine.

Pricing for a week in the Algarve runs $600 to $1,500 for standard yoga retreats, and $1,000 to $2,000 for extended detox programs with juice fasting.

### The Lisbon coast and Ericeira

The stretch from Cascais through Sintra to Ericeira combines proximity to Lisbon with Atlantic coastline. Cascais hosts massage-focused yoga retreats that guests describe as "the perfect balance of care, professionalism, and genuine transformation." Sintra offers more meditative, nature-immersed programs in the forested hills.

Ericeira is the surf-yoga capital of Portugal. Guests describe it as having a community feel where "you feel like at home since the beginning." The town is compact and walkable, with surf breaks within minutes of most retreat venues. One guest emphasized the importance of this location: "less than an hour from Lisbon" but feeling like a completely different world.

Near Lisbon, silent meditation retreats offer another dimension entirely. One guest described a 10-day silent retreat as "the most transformative experience" and praised the guide who "puts her heart into all the meditations, lectures, and Q&As."

For anyone wanting a mix of yoga and city exploration, [wellness retreats near Lisbon](/s/wellness-retreats/portugal) let you combine practice with the cultural richness of the capital.

## Insider Knowledge: What Travel Blogs Miss About Portugal

Several patterns stand out from reading hundreds of reviews that you will not find in any travel guide. First, Portugal's retreat food is genuinely excellent, not just "healthy." Multiple guests single out the cuisine as a highlight, using words like "exceptional," "scrumptious," and "made with love." Local olive oil, fresh produce, and Portuguese cooking traditions elevate even simple retreat meals.

Second, the teaching quality in Portugal skews high because many retreat hosts are small operators who teach their own programs. When you book a retreat run by someone named Claudia, Bri, or Sylvia, you are getting that specific person's attention, not a rotating roster of anonymous instructors. This personal connection shows up in the reviews again and again.

Third, Portugal's retreat scene is notably honest. Guests feel comfortable writing both positive and constructive feedback. One Porto guest pointed out that the retreat felt "more like a fitness centre" because accommodation was separate. Another noted a property where community feeling was lacking. This candor in reviews is actually a strength: it means the positive ones are trustworthy.

This is not for everyone. If you are looking for tropical landscapes, warm ocean swimming, or an exotic cultural immersion, Portugal may feel too European, too familiar. The retreat scene here is practical and results-oriented rather than transformational or mystical. For people who want to feel better in their body and return to their lives recharged, that is exactly the point.

Whether accommodation is included or booked separately (particularly relevant for Porto-based programs)

The specific retreat format: pure yoga, detox and fasting, surf-yoga, silent meditation, or fitness-focused

Small group sizes under 12 people, which consistently get the strongest reviews in Portugal

Host-led vs. multi-teacher programs (the personal host connection is one of Portugal's greatest strengths)

Proximity to the coast or nature, since many guests mention outdoor settings as a key part of their experience

Reviews from guests with similar goals: detox results, stress recovery, surf progression, or first-time retreat experience

## The Detox Factor: Why Portugal Leads in Wellness Retreats

Portugal, and the Algarve specifically, has developed a concentration of detox and fasting retreats that is unusual for Europe. The programs combine juice fasting with daily yoga, breathwork workshops, and educational sessions about nutrition and gut health.

The results guests describe are specific. One guest came to manage menopause symptoms and left with "feeling better about myself, understanding my body more, and maintaining a healthy weight." Another described her gut feeling "settled" after a week, with weight loss as a bonus. A third used the detox to "reset" after closing a chapter of his life.

What makes these programs work is the structure. You are not fasting alone in a hotel room. There is a daily schedule of yoga, workshops, group support, and free time in beautiful surroundings. The combination of physical cleansing and emotional processing creates something more powerful than either would be alone.

For those drawn to this format, browse [detox retreats in Portugal](/s/wellness-retreats/detox-retreats/portugal) to compare programs, pricing, and reviews from past guests.

I noticed something in the Portugal data that distinguishes it from other destinations. The guests who report the deepest satisfaction are not the ones who went to the most expensive or most intensive programs. They are the ones who matched the retreat format to a specific need. The career-changer who needed quiet found it in the Alentejo. The woman managing menopause chose a detox with educational workshops. The first-time solo traveler picked a friendly Cascais program with local community classes. Portugal rewards specificity. Know what you need before you browse.

## Beyond Yoga: Portugal's Expanding Retreat Scene

Portugal's retreat offerings have expanded well beyond traditional yoga. Porto's Om Academy offers reformer pilates, aerial yoga, bungee fitness, and sound baths alongside more conventional yoga classes. One guest described trying "almost every class they had on offer, from hot core pilates to bungee fitness" and called it transformative.

The Alentejo and southern coast host women's wellness retreats with elements like shadow work, cacao ceremonies, and women's circles. Glamping yoga retreats near Sao Teotonio combine outdoor living with restorative yoga and healing practices. And [teacher training programs](/s/ttc/portugal) in Tavira and the Algarve offer 200-hour certifications for those making a career change.

Silent meditation retreats near Lisbon and in the interior attract experienced practitioners seeking depth. One guest at a 10-day silent retreat described it as a "truly remarkable experience" that provided "lots of learning and lots of homework to take home." Portugal's quiet landscapes lend themselves naturally to this kind of inward-focused practice.

Fly into Lisbon, Porto, or Faro depending on your retreat region. Portugal is well connected to most European cities with budget airlines, keeping travel costs low.

Confirm transport from the airport to your retreat. Many hosts offer pickup, but some (especially urban programs) expect you to make your own way. The train and bus systems are reliable.

Pack layers and sunscreen. Portugal's coastal areas can be breezy even in summer, and the UV index is higher than many Northern Europeans expect.

If you are doing a detox or fasting retreat, follow the preparation guidelines your host sends. Several guests mention that pre-retreat preparation made a significant difference to their experience.

Bring comfortable walking shoes. Many Portuguese retreats include coastal walks, nature hikes, or town exploration as part of the program.

Consider extending your trip by a day or two for independent exploration. Lisbon, Porto, and the Algarve coast are all worth experiencing outside the retreat container.

## Find the Right Yoga Retreat in Portugal

Portugal does not shout about what it offers. It does not need to. The reviews speak clearly: guests arrive tired, stressed, or needing change, and they leave feeling lighter, clearer, and often making plans to return. The country's combination of reliable climate, excellent food, genuine warmth, and accessible pricing makes it one of Europe's strongest retreat destinations.

Whether you are drawn to [detox and juice fasting in the Algarve](/s/wellness-retreats/detox-retreats/portugal), surf and yoga on the Atlantic coast, silent meditation near Lisbon, or a pilates and fitness program in Porto, Portugal has the program and the setting to match. Browse yoga retreats in Portugal, read verified reviews from guests who have been there, and book the retreat that fits your needs.

## Find the Best Yoga Retreats in Portugal 2026

*“Wet or fine, the air of Portugal has a natural happiness in it, and the people of the country should be as happy and prosperous as any people in the world.”* - H.G. Wells

Do you think that the [perfect vacation exists](https://bookretreats.com/v/vacation-packages)? What is the perfect vacation, anyway?

Well, imagine this...

An untouched beautiful beach, your toes in the sand, the heat of the sun gently kissing your shoulders, the sound of the waves lapping at your feet, your muscles whispering hints of exhaustion after your morning yoga practice, and a new friend seated next to you, talking surf and mindfulness.

Sounds pretty ideal, right?

That, my friends, makes finding the best yoga retreat in Portugal the perfect vacation (at least from this writer's perspective).

Portugal is the California of Europe, offering everything one could hope for in one single stretch of land.

The difference between Portugal and [California](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/california), though? The European charm, that Portuguese accent, and the low prices.

Portugal is a popular [yoga retreat](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats) destination because it is brimming with activities and a laid-back vibe.

## **Book a Yoga Holiday in Portugal**

[Practice yoga and meditation](https://bookretreats.com/s/meditation-retreats) in the endless sunshine on the beach, or head down for some world-renowned surfing. You can easily find [yoga retreats in Portugal](https://bookretreats.com/blog/10-top-yoga-retreats-portugal) based on your favorite yoga style, meals, or outdoor activities. Choose from ashtanga yoga, vinyasa flow yoga, hatha yoga, and more. Then take your yoga session to the beach for some [surf and yoga](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/yoga-and-surfing-retreats). The ultimate [yoga vacation](https://bookretreats.com/blog/our-top-7-european-vacation-packages) awaits you.

### **Popular Destinations**

Anyone that heads to Portugal usually hits up the same two destinations as every other traveler: [Lisbon](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/lisbon) and Algarve. Both are right on the coast, so they are perfect destinations for lots of activities. A [yoga and surf retreat](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/yoga-and-surfing-retreats/portugal) will likely be in one of these two spots as well as most [luxury yoga retreats in Portugal](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/luxury-retreats/portugal).

[Spiritual retreats in Portugal](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/spiritual-retreats/portugal) are also surprisingly popular, though once you see the views you will understand why.

A Vinyasa yoga retreat is very popular in Portugal, so you will likely find them in most locations.

As far as totally enjoying the infinite beauty that Portugal has to offer, check out Costa Vicentina. Vicentine Coast Natural Park is a natural park protected by the government, meaning that you have pristine beaches and incredible views for miles. Or head to Central Portugal to visit Rio Zêzere near Pedrógão Grande, where you will be swept away by the jungle-like beauty in this arid climate.

Check out our [Portugal Travel Guide](https://bookretreats.com/g/destinations/portugal-travel-guide) for more information!

## 

## **Top Yoga Holidays in Portugal**

Portugal is a tiny strip of land on the eastern coast of Spain. That means that there is lots of sunshine, endless waves, and all things holiday mode.

If you're not really sure what to look for there, then I can hook you up with some favorites from this website.

You just gotta figure out what you want, first.

Maybe you are dying to take surfing lessons during your yoga holidays, and so you'd like a surf yoga retreat.

Or if you just want to hit a reset button in your daily life, then a yoga meditation retreat might be just what you need for one of your 3-day breaks.

Can't you just picture it?

Let's see which one is best for you...

### **[Yoga and Meditation Retreats](https://bookretreats.com/s/meditation-retreats/portugal)**

Listen, daily life gets a little rough for all of us sometimes. It sucks, but it's just how life is (or don't you know that already?!). Sometimes we need to take a day trip out of town for some fresh air and a new perspective. A yoga and meditation retreat is like that for your brain, but better. You can spend a week on the beautiful beaches of the dreamy Portuguese coast as you deepen your meditation practice.

Take the time to [improve your mental health and wellbeing](https://bookretreats.com/s/wellness-retreats/portugal) during a yoga holiday in Portugal.

### **[Yoga and Surfing Retreats](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/yoga-and-surfing-retreats/portugal)**

All those beautiful beaches in Portugal also have endless waves coming in. As you can imagine, Portugal is a pretty popular surf spot in Europe. If you already know how to surf, then you will really enjoy the opportunity to surf in Portugal. And if not? Then you will love trying a surf lesson (or 10), that are included in surf yoga retreats.

After a week of surfing lessons, you'll be feeling like a pro!

### **[Luxury Detox Retreat](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/detox-retreats/portugal)**

Not all detoxes have to be SO awful! Add detox into a luxury yoga retreat, to soften the experience.

Sometimes they can be pretty incredible. There are a lot of different spa centers that offer a programmed detox retreat to guests throughout the year. These are usually set in nature, include vegetarian meals, and physical exercise (like hatha yoga, duh). Some of the more extreme detoxes will include a juice detox and only very gentle yoga classes, like yoga nidra, yin yoga, or restorative yoga. Either way, they'll likely include spa treatments...you know, for the flushing of toxins.

Sounds like an amazing vacation, too.

### **[Yoga Teacher Training](https://bookretreats.com/s/ttc/portugal)**

Why not make your yoga holidays more life changing this year? Go to a yoga teacher training and immerse yourself in the yoga lifestyle. Learn about the different styles of yoga and how it was intended to be a part of our lives. Meet like minded people who will become lifelong friends. Attend workshops on interesting yogic things like pranayama, yoga massage, yoga and meditation, and how to prepare vegetarian meals. You can choose any yoga style that interests you, like hatha yoga, yoga Nidra, Iyengar yoga, yin yoga, or even Jivamukti yoga. Attend daily yoga sessions, spend time studying yoga, and relax into the rhythm of a TTC.

Spend your time in a yoga studio for a month and then go home a [totally changed person](https://bookretreats.com/s/wellness-retreats/transformation-retreats).

## **FAQ**

### **What are the best months of the year to visit Portugal?**

The best time to visit Portugal is Spring and Fall, when the weather is just right. March, April, and May are the best months in the Spring, and September to October are the best months in the Fall.

### **What makes a 'best yoga retreat' in Portugal? Cheap or luxurious?**

Though Europe tends to have a major price tag behind it, Portugal has quite a few [affordable yoga retreats](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/affordable-yoga-retreats/portugal). You are likely to find a retreat center, where a booking option is a ‘shared room’ as well as private options. And of course, you have a fair pick of [luxury yoga retreats](https://bookretreats.com/s/yoga-retreats/affordable-yoga-retreats/portugal), with all the amazing views and perfect weather. No question, however, that a Portugal yoga retreat provides great value for the money.

### **Is Portugal easy to visit for a yoga and wellness retreat? And how long can I stay for a good yoga experience?**

In order to visit Portugal, you need to have a valid passport for at least the following six months. Remember that Portugal is a part of the Schengen Agreement. This agreement allows you to visit any of the countries within the agreement without needing a new stamp on your passport.

The catch? You're only allowed to be in those countries for a total of 90 days, all together. So, plan accordingly for Portugal. It's a great place, on and off the yoga mat.

## **What Are the Comprehensive Health Benefits of Regular Yoga Practice?**

Regular [yoga](https://bookretreats.com/g/yoga) practice offers extensive health benefits, improving physical, mental, and emotional well-being. According to a 2020 study, participants engaging in daily yoga sessions reported a 25% increase in overall life satisfaction and stress reduction. This practice is not just limited to general wellness; specific types like [yoga for weight loss](https://bookretreats.com/g/yoga/yoga-for-weight-loss) and [yoga for back pain](https://bookretreats.com/g/yoga/yoga-for-back-pain) cater to distinct health needs, demonstrating significant improvements in body weight management and spinal health respectively. For prenatal care, [prenatal yoga](https://bookretreats.com/g/yoga/prenatal-yoga) has shown to reduce pregnancy-related discomforts by 30%. Yoga's adaptability makes it inclusive for all age groups and fitness levels, with tailored approaches like [yoga for seniors](https://bookretreats.com/g/yoga/yoga-for-seniors) and [yoga for children](https://bookretreats.com/g/yoga/yoga-for-children), enhancing accessibility and ensuring it is a beneficial practice for everyone.

## FAQs

* #### 

  Mekayoga offers a transformative experience designed to rejuvenate your mind, body, and spirit through the practice of yoga, meditation, and wellness. Releasing tension and stress, recharging your energies, and enjoying good food, inspiration and sunshine.
* #### 

  We are open to individuals of all levels, from beginners to advanced practitioners. Whether you're new to yoga or a seasoned yogi, we are always ready to guide you to the next step of your journey.
* #### 

  Our weeks take place in a comfortable authentic villa, in Portugal’s most stunning Nature Reserve Costa Vicentina, on the edge of Vila do Bispo, in Algarve. Impressive beaches, black cliffs, crystal clear water, and picturesque villages. A serene hidden paradise. Join Meka Yoga Retreat Algarve to get the benefits of these stunning, peaceful surroundings!
* #### 

  We offer a variety of rooms, to meet all preferences and budgets, ranging from shared rooms with shared bathrooms to single/double ensuites. Rest assured, all rooms are clean, comfortable, and conductive to relaxation.
* #### 

  Each day is thoughtfully curated to provide a balance of yoga sessions, meditation, nature, nourishing cuisine, and free time for exploration, surf or relaxation. Our experienced instructors guide you through a schedule designed to nourish your body and soul.

* #### 

  We embrace a holistic approach, offering a blend of Hatha, vinyasa, yin, and restorative practices. Our diverse instructors bring their unique styles and expertise to create a well-rounded and enriching experience.
* #### 

  Absolutely! Our sanctuary caters to individuals of all levels, including beginners. Our instructors are skilled at providing modifications and adjustments to accommodate varying skill levels, ensuring everyone feels supported and challenged at their own pace.
* #### 

  Yes, we encourage you to take advantage of any free time to explore the natural beauty and cultural attractions of the retreat location. Whether you're drawn to hiking, sightseeing, or simply relaxing on the beach, there's plenty to discover beyond the mat.
* #### 

  We recommend packing comfortable yoga attire, sunscreen, insect repellent, a refillable water bottle, a journal for reflection, and any personal items you may need. Detailed packing lists will be provided upon booking to ensure you're well-prepared for your retreat experience in the Algarve.
* #### 

  To reserve your spot, simply visit our website and select the retreat date and room that suit you best. Follow the prompts to complete your booking, and we'll take care of the rest. Spaces fill up quickly, so we recommend securing your spot as soon as possible to avoid disappointment.

[Accommodation →](https://mekayoga.com/portugal-algarve/sagres/yoga-retreat/accommodation)

[Accommodation →](https://mekayoga.com/portugal-algarve/sagres/yoga-retreat/accommodation)

hits.title: Yoga Retreat May 2026 Central Portugal
hits.snippet:
Highlights include:

   Movement and alignment through yoga sessions 
   Guided shamanic journeys to explore consciousness and inner landscapes 
   Breathwork and meditation to foster clarity and presence 
   Community ceremonies that deepen group connection and shared intention. 
   Trance Danceto go into the body 

Whether you’re new to shamanic practices or already familiar with them, this program is designed to leave you feeling grounded, inspired, and more in tune with your deepest self.

What Makes This Yoga Retreat May 2026 Special [...] Book Your Spot Today

If you’re seeking a transformational yoga retreat in May 2026, this retreat in Portugal offers the perfect combination of movement, meditation, and relaxation in a peaceful setting. Spaces are limited, so be sure to reserve your place early.

Visit Yoga Evolution Retreats to learn more and secure your booking. Take this opportunity to reconnect with yourself and embark on a journey of self-discovery and well-being

  

   What's included in your stay with us [...] Discover more details and secure your booking at _Yoga Evolution Retreats_ — and give yourself the gift of renewal this May.

Image 6: May Yoga Retreats 2026

In addition to the yoga and qigong classes, the retreat will offer a variety of other activities to help you connect with nature and revitalise your body and mind. These may include guided herbal walks, massage treatments, gong sound healing, and healthy soap making.

And of course, there will be plenty of time to simply relax and recharge. Whether you choose to spend your free time reading in a cosy nook, swimming in a natural salt water pool, or simply gazing out at the stunning views, you'll find plenty of opportunities to decompress and unwind.

17–23 May 2026 — Shamanic Retreat — [Read more here](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/shamanic.html)

**31 May – 6 June 2026 — Late Spring Yoga Retreat [Read about the practices here](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/evolutionary-yoga.html)**

[View our yoga retreat june 2026 retreats here](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/june.html)

* * *

**Yoga Retreat May 2026: Transform Your Mind, Body & Spirit in Portugal**

****

Are you dreaming of a **yoga retreat May 2026** that helps you unwind, deepen your practice, and reconnect with nature? Look no further than _Yoga Evolution Retreats_ in central Portugal — an immersive wellness experience designed for every level of yogi. With two unique retreat options throughout May 2026, this serene destination offers more than just yoga: it’s a holistic journey into well-being, presence, and self-discovery. 

**Why Choose a Yoga Retreat in May 2026?**

****

May is one of the most beautiful months to experience a retreat in Portugal. Spring brings vibrant greenery, mild weather, and longer daylight — ideal conditions to practice yoga outdoors, explore nature, and embrace mindful living. A **yoga retreat in May 2026** gives you the space and guidance to disconnect from daily stress and focus on personal growth, movement, and tranquility.

_Yoga Evolution Retreats_ combines traditional practices like Hatha, Yin, and Somatic Yoga with complementary methods such as Qigong, meditation, and sound healing. Set amidst the peaceful hills of the Portuguese countryside, this centre offers a nurturing environment to deepen your practice while surrounded by nature’s beauty.

****

[![Image 5: Yoga Retreat May 2026](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/images/Yoga-Retreat-May-2025-1.webp)](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/may.html)

[Getting here from Lisbon](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/lisbon.html)&[Getting here from Porto](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/porto.html)

What to Expect at the Yoga & Qigong Retreat

The three retreats provide a thoughtfully structured blend of yoga, energy work, breathwork, and meditation designed to balance your body and mind while creating deep relaxation and inner peace.

**April 26 to May 2, 2026 — Ashtanga & Yin Yoga Retreat**

****

This weeks offering is a transformative week of daily **Ashtanga yoga, Yin yoga, meditation, and holistic practices** (including shamanic drum journeys and gong baths) set in a peaceful forested valley. The retreat runs **26 April – 2 May 2026** and focuses on strength, flexibility, inner peace, and connection with nature.****

**10–16 May: Qigong & Yin/Somatic Yoga Retreat**

****

The **10–16 May 2026** retreat combines the gentle and strengthening movement of Qigong with restorative Yin and Somatic Yoga practices. Qigong — an ancient energy practice — supports body awareness and vitality, while Yin and Somatic Yoga focus on releasing deep-seated tension and enhancing flexibility.

Participants can expect:

*   **Daily Qigong sessions** to open and harmonize energy pathways 
*   **Yin and Somatic Yoga classes** focusing on mindful movement and deep stretching 
*   **Meditation and breathwork practices** aimed at calming the nervous system 
*   **Gong healing sessions** and other sound therapies to support deep relaxation. 

This week is perfect for those seeking a balance between physical rejuvenation and internal reflection — ideal if your goal is to slow down, recharge, and resynch with your inner rhythm.

**17–23 May: Shamanic & Yoga Retreat**

****

The **17–23 May 2026** program offers an enriching blend of Qigong and shamanic practices that support emotional release, energetic cleansing, and spiritual connection. This retreat invites participants to go deeper into both physical and metaphysical aspects of well-being.

Highlights include:

*   **Movement and alignment through yoga sessions** 
*   **Guided shamanic journeys** to explore consciousness and inner landscapes 
*   **Breathwork and meditation** to foster clarity and presence 
*   **Community ceremonies** that deepen group connection and shared intention. 
*   **Trance Dance**to go into the body 

Whether you’re new to shamanic practices or already familiar with them, this program is designed to leave you feeling grounded, inspired, and more in tune with your deepest self.

**What Makes This Yoga Retreat May 2026 Special**

****

Both retreats take place at a beautifully peaceful centre nestled in the forested hills of central Portugal. The natural setting — complete with hammocks under shade trees, tranquil walking paths, and a salt-water swimming pool — enhances the experience by encouraging participants to slow down and soak in the beauty of spring. Yoga Evolution Retreats

During your stay, you’ll enjoy:

*   **Two daily classes** designed for all experience levels 
*   **Nutritious vegetarian meals** prepared to nourish body and spirit 
*   **Optional activities** such as herbal walks, massage 
*   **Quiet time to reflect, journal, or explore nature trails** at your own pace. 

The combination of structured sessions and restful free time makes these retreats ideal whether you’re seeking transformation, relaxation, or simply a chance to reset your routine.

**Who Should Attend?**

****

This **yoga retreat May 2026** is suitable for people of all levels — from beginners curious about yoga and Qigong or shamanism to experienced practitioners seeking a deeper immersion. The expert instruction and supportive environment help everyone feel welcome and encouraged throughout the week.

**Reserve Your Spot Today**

****

With only limited spaces available for 10–16 May and 17–23 May 2026, planning ahead is essential. A **yoga retreat in May 2026** at Yoga Evolution Retreats is more than a holiday — it’s an invitation to pause, breathe, and transform.

Discover more details and secure your booking at _Yoga Evolution Retreats_ — and give yourself the gift of renewal this May.

![Image 6: May Yoga Retreats 2026](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/images/May-Yoga-Retreat-2025.webp)

In addition to the yoga and qigong classes, the retreat will offer a variety of other activities to help you connect with nature and revitalise your body and mind. These may include guided herbal walks, massage treatments, gong sound healing, and healthy soap making.

And of course, there will be plenty of time to simply relax and recharge. Whether you choose to spend your free time reading in a cosy nook, swimming in a natural salt water pool, or simply gazing out at the stunning views, you'll find plenty of opportunities to decompress and unwind.

Spaces for this retreat are limited, so be sure to book early. Whether you're looking to deepen your yoga practice, experience the benefits of qigong, or simply take a break from the stresses of daily life, this retreat is the perfect opportunity to slow down, reconnect, and rejuvenate.

Accommodation & Pricing

Yoga Evolution Retreats provides various accommodation options to suit different preferences and budgets:

Single Room: £650

Twin Room (per person): £600

Double Room (per person): £600

Eco Caravan: £550

En-suite Room (per person): £750

Room With A Veranda - £850 (per person) Or £950 (per person) with private facilities

All packages include six nights of accommodation, two daily yoga classes, guided meditation, three nutritious vegetarian meals per day, and access to retreat facilities such as a saltwater swimming pool and relaxing hammocks.

[View our guest rooms here](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/guest-rooms.html)

Nourishing Meals for a Complete Experience

Nutrition plays a vital role in overall well-being, and this retreat ensures that you are well taken care of with delicious meals. Enjoy a variety of delicious vegetarian dishes, homemade cakes, and healthy desserts like raw chocolate, all prepared by our full time Chef.

Book Your Spot Today

If you’re seeking a transformational yoga retreat in May 2026, this retreat in Portugal offers the perfect combination of movement, meditation, and relaxation in a peaceful setting. Spaces are limited, so be sure to reserve your place early.

Visit Yoga Evolution Retreats to learn more and secure your booking. Take this opportunity to reconnect with yourself and embark on a journey of self-discovery and well-being

    *   6 nights accommodation

    *   Extra help with your practice if you feel you need clarification with any aspect the many practices we teach.

# RETIRO YOGA “PAÑCA KRAMA”

### com: Simão Monteiro

    12 Junho, 2026 
    16:30 
   Retiro do Bosque Country House | Minde - Parque Natural Serras Aire e Candeeiros

Image 2

Idealizar, construir e experimentar sequências de prática sempre foi uma paixão minha desde que comecei a praticar yoga. Neste retiro irei partilhar cinco sequências únicas, Pañca Krama, que são um resultado de explorações pessoais dos últimos tempos. [...] Agravamento de 40€ a partir de 1 de Maio.

Mais informações, inscrição e forma de pagamento:geral@yogamandir.pt

##### a

# RETIRO YOGA “PAÑCA KRAMA”

### com: Simão Monteiro

*    12 Junho, 2026 
*    16:30 
*   [Retiro do Bosque Country House | Minde - Parque Natural Serras Aire e Candeeiros](https://maps.app.goo.gl/2FQPooCpRyRRVJTb6)

![Image 2](https://www.yogamandir.pt/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Retiro-Yoga-Junho-2026-site-1024x482.jpg)

Idealizar, construir e experimentar sequências de prática sempre foi uma paixão minha desde que comecei a praticar yoga. Neste retiro irei partilhar cinco sequências únicas, Pañca Krama, que são um resultado de explorações pessoais dos últimos tempos.

Cada sequência terá uma dinâmica e uma intensidade únicas: “Ādi”, moderada e focada nos fundamentos; “Agni”, tradicional e enérgica; “Viparīta”, acrobática e desafiante; “Rātrika”, introspectiva e subtil; “Vāyu”, fluida e expansiva. Nestas cinco sequências abordaremos as seguintes técnicas: rotina articular, ṣaṭ karma (purificações), _āsana_(posições), relaxamento, _prāṇāyāma_(regulação da respiração) e meditação.

No sábado à tarde faremos uma importante reflexão acerca do yoga fora do tapete de prática. Em cada prática são criadas as condições propícias para estarmos connosco mesmos, enquanto exercitamos e refinamos o corpo e mente. Mas o yoga não se reduz ao que acontece em cima do tapete. Quando a prática termina, o yoga continua. De que forma?

Para além dos momentos de prática e reflexão haverá tempo para descansar, desfrutar da natureza em redor e conviver com pessoas com um interesse comum pelo autoconhecimento.

### **Programa previsto**

12 de Junho, sexta-feira

16:30 – Chegada à Retiro do Bosque Country House.

17:30 – Prática “Ādi Krama”: sequência de intensidade moderada com posições e técnicas fundamentais do yoga.

19:30 – Jantar.

21:00 – Boas-vindas e apresentação do retiro. Sat saṅga e kīrtan.

22:00 – Descanso.

13 de Junho, sábado

8:00 – Prática “Agni Krama”: sequência focada no centro do corpo com vários exercícios de contracção, força e compressão para gerar calor interno.

11:30 –Brunch.

13:00 – Tempo livre, descanso, caminhada…

16:00 – Reflexão “Yoga fora do tapete de prática”.

17:00 – Prática “Viparīta Krama”: sequência de posições invertidas, com suas devidas progressões e alternativas.

19:00 – Jantar.

20:30 –Sat saṅga e kīrtan.

21:30 – Prática “Rātrika Krama”, sequência noturna.

22:30 – Descanso

14 de Junho, domingo

8:00 – Prática “Vāyu Krama”: sequência dinâmica que colocará à prova o nosso equilíbrio e capacidade de adaptação rápida, sem perdermos o foco.

11:30 – Brunch.

14:00 – Sat saṅga de encerramento.

15:00 – Fim do retiro.

**Com Simão Monteiro**

![Image 3: semana intensiva 4](https://www.yogamandir.pt/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/semana-intensiva-4-qxvpp5p7eovlnymdxqjvvsf6hyo75xwfc9km7151qw.png)

Dedico-me à prática e ao estudo do _yoga_ desde 2001. Dos vários professores com quem aprendi e continuo a aprender destaco: Andrés Wormull, Billy Konrad, Mark Robberds, Pedro Kupfer, Tomás Zorzo e Xico Rodrigues.

Completei o programa de certificação do _Functional Range Conditioning_(FRCms).

Fiz várias viagens à Índia para estudar _vedānta_ com o Swami Paramarthananda com quem continuo a aprender, escutando regularmente os seus ensinamentos. Tenho a boa fortuna de ter uma relação próxima de amizade com o Miguel Homem: um irmão e um exemplo como professor. Destaco ainda a clareza dos ensinamentos transmitidos pela professora Gloria Arieira e da capacidade inigualável da Ganga Mira para apontar para a realidade de quem somos.

Ensino _haṭha yoga_ em aulas online e presenciais na zona de Cascais, onde trago para as aulas os ensinamentos dos textos antigos bem como novos conhecimentos dos tempos modernos, sempre com a intenção de ajustar a prática às necessidades e capacidades do praticante.

Conduzo regularmente cursos intensivos e retiros sobre _yoga_ e _vedānta_ passando adiante tudo aquilo que aprendi com os meus professores e mestres, comprometido com a Tradição Védica e a sua visão única e libertadora.

Sobre a Retiro do Bosque Country House

![Image 4: IMG_1916](https://www.yogamandir.pt/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/IMG_1916-scaled-qkvb8z5vlfptz5uyxaj2v4mlsabr0j8vlr008ojitw.jpg)

![Image 5: IMG_0892](https://www.yogamandir.pt/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/IMG_0892-scaled-qkvb94swqfxjwtms0cyua37dcljyapv9miwx4cb5sk.jpg)

![Image 6: IMG_2548](https://www.yogamandir.pt/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/IMG_2548-scaled-qkvb9cbm947uhpbusg7uu1b23oiw0ap4bk4syk00es.jpg)

![Image 7: piscina](https://www.yogamandir.pt/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/piscina-scaled-qkvbp0as5pnuywpflf2dyq74i6dwqeaicfa8sxg1r6.jpg)

“Situada em pleno Parque Natural das Serras de Aire e Candeeiros, com uma vista singular sobre o polje de Minde e Mira d’Aire (zona RAMSAR), a Retiro do Bosque Country House é o local ideal para entrar em sintonia com a Natureza.

A casa está inserida num pequeno bosque repleto de espécies autóctones: um centenário carvalho cerquinho, freixos e figueiras, à sombra dos quais poderá relaxar numa das espreguiçadeiras, a ler um bom livro ou a ouvir o canto de melros, poupas e tordos.

Reconstruída a partir de uma casa de família, mistura as raízes ancestrais de uma vila com quase 900 anos e uma simplicidade moderna que o fará sentir-se acolhido como se estivesse em sua casa.“

![Image 8](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/5768dd_352c15c509e647da9a8a2cc5a3befe81~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_146,h_130,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_auto/5768dd_352c15c509e647da9a8a2cc5a3befe81~mv2.jpg)

Valor do retiro (inclui alojamento, aulas e refeições):

*   Quarto triplo ou quádruplo: 195€
*   Quarto duplo: 220€

A alimentação será vegetariana e estará a cargo da _chef_ Rute Pinheiro (Instagram: @cozinha_natural_by_roots).

Nota:o retiro poderá ser pago em duas prestações.

Agravamento de 40€ a partir de 1 de Maio.

Mais informações, inscrição e forma de pagamento:geral@yogamandir.pt

hits.snippet: uma mensagem privada! 📩 Fisioterapeuta Karen Neves 6928-OF ​#FisioterapiaPelvica #SaudeDaMulher #saudepelvica [...] todas elas são válidas se nunca nos esquecermos do real propósito de estarmos ali. Eu costumo dizer aos meus alunos que não olhem para o lado durante as práticas e isso tem um motivo, copiar a postura da pessoa do lado nunca vai ser a melhor forma de adaptala ao seu corpo. Somos iguais em muitos sentidos, mas nossos corpos se movimentam e possuem limitações totalmente individuais. Evitem fazer comparações, evitem querer chegar a alguma determinada postura no Yoga que dificilmente vai se adaptar ao seu corpo, assim as lesões acontecem e assim o real.proposito do yoga se perde. Concentre-se na sua pratica e faça o melhor que consegue, com o corpo que tens nessa existência. Namastê A série da parede é uma adaptação que faço com o que aprendi com o querido Professor @marcosrojoyoga [...] Image 12: Alguns trechos da última edição do Retiro Zen Yoga Portugal. Participe connosco de mais uma edição, desta vez em Fátima. 🇵🇹🙏 Retiro Zen Yoga 2026 📅 12 a 14 de junho 📍 Fátima – Casa dos Capuchinhos 🛏️ Quartos duplos e triplos Serão três dias de imersão com muito Yoga, meditação, bhajans, partilha e aquela energia especial que só quem já participou sabe explicar 💛 ✨ Teremos a participação especial da querida @monjacoen , com as suas palestras e meditações sempre profundas e transformadoras. 🧘‍♀️ Aulas de Yoga com os Professores Thiago Leão, Fernando Augusto, Jane Gomes e Karen Neves. 🎶 Bhajans com Prof. Fernando Augusto e Beatriz Quirino. [![Image 11: Esta última semana praticamos a série da parede, uma forma diferente de utilizarmos posturas do Yoga com a ajuda da parede para nos apoiar e para ajustar alguns movimentos que nem sempre conseguimos fazer no tapetinho apenas. Existem muitas formas de praticar Yoga e (quase) todas elas são válidas se nunca nos esquecermos do real propósito de estarmos ali. Eu costumo dizer aos meus alunos que não olhem para o lado durante as práticas e isso tem um motivo, copiar a postura da pessoa do lado nunca vai ser a melhor forma de adaptala ao seu corpo. Somos iguais em muitos sentidos, mas nossos corpos se movimentam e possuem limitações totalmente individuais. Evitem fazer comparações, evitem querer chegar a alguma determinada postura no Yoga que dificilmente vai se adaptar ao seu corpo, assim as lesões acontecem e assim o real.proposito do yoga se perde. Concentre-se na sua pratica e faça o melhor que consegue, com o corpo que tens nessa existência. ## Workshops

Os workshops são uma forma de, num curto espaço de tempo e de uma forma intensiva, aprofundar conhecimentos e técnicas e dotar os participantes da autonomia necessária para cuidarem da sua saúde e potenciarem o seu próprio bem-estar. 

» Técnicas de meditação

» Nutrição e ayurveda

» Respiração consciente

» Yoga diária em casa

» Outros

## Próximos retiros de Yoga

Image 5 ### Retiro de Yoga NATURA Ilha do Pico, Açores 27 Abril-2 Maio 2026 Este retiro é um convite à comunhão com a Natureza e a ouvires o teu silêncio interno. Não faltarão as práticas de yoga numa maravilhosa sala sobre o mar, meditações guiadas, caminhadas e uma desafiante subida ao Pico, a montanha mais alta de Portugal! Image 7: Retiro de Yoga Arrábida ### Full Moon Arrábida Retreat Convento da Arrábida 2026 – Data a anunciar Entre o azul do mar e o verde da serra encontram-se praias paradisíacas de areia branca e água azul turquesa. No cimo da serra fica o Convento da Arrábida, um local mágico com vistas de tirar o fôlego a qualquer um. Avisa-me da nova data

Receber informação sobre próximos eventos

Porto, Portugal [...] Image 3: retiro de yoga

## Retiros de Yoga

Um retiro é o que o seu nome indica. É decidir afastar-se e fazer uma pausa. É dar descanso ao corpo para que este se acalme. E quando o corpo se acalma também a mente se acalma. E a transformação acontece.

» Nutrimos o corpo com uma alimentação saudável e saborosa

» Movemos o corpo de forma lenta e consciente através da prática de yoga

» Acalmamos a mente usando técnicas de meditação

» Conectamo-nos com a Natureza relembrando que fazemos parte dela

» Conhecemos pessoas novas

» Partilhamos experiências

# Retiros de Yoga em Portugal • Samadi Bliss - Yoga & Ayurveda
[Saltar para o conteúdo](https://www.samadibliss.com/retiros-de-yoga-meditacao-workshops/#content "Saltar para o conteúdo")

[![Image 1: Samadi Bliss](https://www.samadibliss.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/logo-samadibliss.png)](https://www.samadibliss.com/ "Samadi Bliss")

Menu

*   [RETIROS DE YOGA](https://www.samadibliss.com/retiros-de-yoga-meditacao-workshops/)
*   [AULAS DE YOGA](https://www.samadibliss.com/aulas-de-yoga/)
*   [TERAPIAS](https://www.samadibliss.com/ayurveda/)
*   [SOBRE MIM](https://www.samadibliss.com/susana-barbas-sobre-mim/)
*   [BLOG](https://www.samadibliss.com/blog/)

![Image 2: retiros workshops yoga](https://www.samadibliss.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/yoga-retiros-workshops.jpg)

# Retiros de Yoga e Workshops

Vivemos a um ritmo alucinante num mundo que quer tudo para ontem. Andamos cansados, com falta de energia, desmotivados e, por vezes, parece que já nem conseguimos pensar direito. Nestes tempos ditos modernos, desacelerar é um luxo. Mas é algo absolutamente imprescindível para termos saúde e qualidade de vida.

E por muito que se coma de forma saudável ou se pratique exercício físico, se não existir harmonia na ligação corpo/mente a situação não vai melhor.

![Image 3: retiro de yoga](https://samadibliss.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/retiro-yoga-sala-768x512.jpg)

## Retiros de Yoga

Um retiro é o que o seu nome indica. É decidir afastar-se e fazer uma pausa. É dar descanso ao corpo para que este se acalme. E quando o corpo se acalma também a mente se acalma. E a transformação acontece.

» Nutrimos o corpo com uma alimentação saudável e saborosa

» Movemos o corpo de forma lenta e consciente através da prática de yoga

» Acalmamos a mente usando técnicas de meditação

» Conectamo-nos com a Natureza relembrando que fazemos parte dela

» Conhecemos pessoas novas

» Partilhamos experiências

» Olhamos para dentro

» Transformamo-nos

![Image 4: alimentacao ayurvedica](https://samadibliss.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/alimentacao-ayurveda-768x512.jpg)

## Workshops

Os workshops são uma forma de, num curto espaço de tempo e de uma forma intensiva, aprofundar conhecimentos e técnicas e dotar os participantes da autonomia necessária para cuidarem da sua saúde e potenciarem o seu próprio bem-estar. 

» Técnicas de meditação

» Nutrição e [ayurveda](https://samadibliss.com/ayurveda/)

» Respiração consciente

» [Yoga](https://samadibliss.com/yoga/) diária em casa

» Outros

## **Próximos retiros de Yoga**

[![Image 5](https://www.samadibliss.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/retiro-yoga-natura-abr24.jpg) ### Retiro de Yoga NATURA **Ilha do Pico, Açores** 27 Abril-2 Maio 2026 Este retiro é um convite à comunhão com a Natureza e a ouvires o teu silêncio interno. Não faltarão as práticas de yoga numa maravilhosa sala sobre o mar, meditações guiadas, caminhadas e uma desafiante subida ao Pico, a montanha mais alta de Portugal! Saber mais](https://www.samadibliss.com/retiro-de-yoga-natura/)

[![Image 6: Retiro de Yoga SUPER DETOX](https://www.samadibliss.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Retiro-SUPER-DETOX.jpg) ### Retiro de Yoga e Ayurveda SUPER DETOX **Cabeceiras de Basto** 30 Maio-4 Junho 2026 Este retiro é um convite a desintoxicar o corpo e a mente, usando práticas de yoga para esse fim e com refeições baseadas nos princípios da Ayurveda e apropriadas ao detox. Serão seis dias num formato intimista, para um máximo de 9 participantes. Saber mais](https://www.samadibliss.com/retiro-yoga-super-detox/)

[![Image 7: Retiro de Yoga Arrábida](https://www.samadibliss.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/retiro-yoga-serra-arrabida.jpg) ### Full Moon Arrábida Retreat **Convento da Arrábida** 2026 – Data a anunciar Entre o azul do mar e o verde da serra encontram-se praias paradisíacas de areia branca e água azul turquesa. No cimo da serra fica o Convento da Arrábida, um local mágico com vistas de tirar o fôlego a qualquer um. Avisa-me da nova data](https://mkt.samadibliss.com/w/1e5e79lVe7d1I8tz7Qe8acca7b6e)

[Receber informação sobre próximos eventos](https://mkt.samadibliss.com/w/1e5e79lVe7d1I8tz7Qe8acca7b6e)

    *   [Português](https://meditarlisboa.pt/retiro-2026/)
    *   [English](https://meditarlisboa.pt/en/retreat-2026/)

## Retiro 2026

Informations and registration for the May 2026 retreat

Retreat 2026

The retreat will take place at the [Nossa Senhora de Fátima seminar](https://maps.app.goo.gl/BptbmioPjhxDLCVk9) on the 1st, 2nd and 3rd May (Friday to Sunday). May 1st is a national holiday.

Our retreat is still free and open to everyone. You can take part in just one session, a few hours or all the days of the program. However, for those who want a more immersive experience, we encourage you to stay in the space for the duration of the retreat.

Activities:

*   guided meditation and detailed instructions
*   recitation practice
*   lectures
*   prostration practice
*   tea sessions with Buddhist monks

Please note that accommodation on site (hotel) is not included and has an associated cost, which is non-profit for our organization. This option is ideal for those looking to truly immerse themselves in the retreat experience.

Participants can register in 3 ways:

*   4-night registration
    *   Check in 1 day before (day 30)
    *   Checkout 1 day later (day 4)
    *   Full board: accommodation, breakfast, lunch and dinner

*   2-night registration
    *   Check-in at the beginning of the retreat (day 1)
    *   Checkout on the last day of the retreat (day 3)
    *   Full board: accommodation, breakfast, lunch and dinner

*   Free registration
    *   No charge
    *   Accommodation and meals are at the expense of the participant

[https://meditarlisboa.eventbrite.pt](https://meditarlisboa.eventbrite.pt/)

### Schedule

| Start | May 1 (Friday) | May 2 (Saturday) | May 3 (Sunday) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 5:00 |  | Meditation | Meditation |
| 6:00 |  | Bowing meditation | Bowing meditation |
| 7:00 |  | Breakfast | Breakfast |
| 8:00 | Great Compassion Repentance | Meditation | Instructional Talk |
| 9:00 | (1h40) | Reciting Buddha’s name | Reciting Buddha’s name |
| 9h40 |  | Meditation | Meditation |
| 10:00 | Opening Talk |  |  |
| 11:00 | Stretching + meditation | Meditation | Meditation |
| 12:00 | Instructional Talk | Instructional Talk | Instructional Talk |
| 13:00 | Lunch | Lunch | Lunch |
| 14:30 | Stretching | Stretching | Stretching |

| 16:00 | Mantra recitation | Mantra recitation | Mantra recitation |
| 17:00 | Meditation | Meditation | Closing + Transference |
| 18:00 | Bowing meditation | Bowing meditation |  |
| 19:30 | Dinner | Dinner |  |

| 21:30 | Meditation | Meditation |  |
| 23:00 | Go to Sleep | Go to Sleep |  |

### Team

![Image 3](https://meditarlisboa.pt/images/master-2022-photo_orig.png)

### Master Yong Hua

Master YongHua is the founder of Bodhi Light International (BLI)—a non-profit religious organization dedicated to benefiting all living beings through the teachings of Mahayana Buddhism. Through BLI, Master YongHua has been offering free programs and retreats for over 15 years. In 2012, he established the Lu Mountain Temple, which became BLI's base in Rosemead, California. In 2018, BLI's operations were moved to a new facility—Wei Mountain Temple—also located in Rosemead, California. Wei Mountain Temple currently offers Chan meditation programs every Saturday and Buddhist Dharma assemblies every Sunday. Master YongHua also gives lectures on Mahayana Sutras every weekend.

![Image 4](https://meditarlisboa.pt/images/XX_chan_profile.jpg)

### Master Xian Xin

Master XianXin is a Buddhist nun with over a decade of monastic training under the guidance of Master Yonghua, founder of American Wei Yang. Since leaving the home life, she has been dedicated to teaching Chan meditation at Bodhi Light International (BLI) temples and through online programs worldwide. She mentors students from beginner to advanced levels, empowering them to discover their inner self and transform limiting patterns through Chan practice. Her practical and compassionate teachings have helped students cultivate resilience, inner peace, and a happier, more balanced life.

![Image 5](https://meditarlisboa.pt/images/XP_chan_profile.jpg)

### Venerable Xian Pu

Venerable XianPu is a Buddhist nun under the guidance of Master Yonghua since 2022. Using her experiance in teaching Hatha yoga, she will guide yoga sessions to prepare the body and mind to have more stable meditation practice. She currently leads meditation class for Europeans. She is approachable, warm, and creates an atmosphere of trust, making it easy for people to share their concerns. She listens attentively, uses Dharma and meditation to help others see more clearly and find wiser solutions on their personal path.

![Image 6](https://meditarlisboa.pt/images/Bruno-e-o-Mestre-YongHua.jpg)

### Bruno Silveira

Bruno Silveira specializes in digital marketing and has been practicing meditation for around 20 years. Since he found Chan meditation about 10 years ago, he has practiced more regularly and dedicatedly. He organizes weekly meditation meetings, both online and in person, promoting balance, mental clarity, increased ability to focus and concentrate.

![Image 7](https://meditarlisboa.pt/images/Miguel.jpg)

### Miguel Ping

With a degree in Computer Engineering, he began practicing Chinese martial arts before learning about Chan meditation. A disciple of Master YongHua for over 10 years, he regularly travels to the United States to practice meditation during intensive retreats.

![Image 8](https://meditarlisboa.pt/images/SilviaP.jpeg)

### Sílvia Ping

Sílvia Ping studied Art History and Design in Lisbon, where she works. She discovered Chan meditation through her brother and the Meditar Lisboa group. Since then, this practice has become essential in her life, helping her to transform her relationship with herself and the world around her. Inspired by the profound benefits she experiences on a daily basis, she shares this experience with anyone seeking personal and spiritual development - or just some peace for that restless mind we all know.

#### Meditar Lisboa

We are a group of Chan meditation practitioners who aim to promote the practice and benefits of this type of Buddhist meditation. We practice according to the instructions of Master YongHua, who became a monk under the Venerable Great Master Hsuan Hua, founder of the well-known City of Ten Thousand Buddhas.

*   [](https://www.youtube.com/@MasterYongHua)
*   [](https://www.instagram.com/meditacaochan/)
*   [](https://www.facebook.com/meditarlisboa)

# Retiro de Yoga & Ayurveda: 29 a 31 Mai. 2026

[INSCREVER](https://yogalounge.pt/download-ficha-inscricao-retiros/)

## **"Restaure o Seu Equilíbrio"**

Este retiro de três dias em Sintra é um convite à restauração completa do corpo, mente e espírito, combinando práticas de Yoga, Meditação e técnicas de Ayurveda.

Realizado em contacto com a natureza e num ambiente de cuidado e serenidade, o Retiro de Yoga & Ayurveda oferece um espaço para desconectar do ritmo acelerado da vida quotidiana, revitalizar a energia vital e promover equilíbrio interior. Durante três dias, cada participante irá experienciar práticas que harmonizam o corpo e a mente, promovendo relaxamento profundo, clareza mental e renovação da vitalidade.

As sessões de Yoga e Meditação, aliadas a técnicas ayurvédicas rejuvenescedoras e alimentação consciente, proporcionam uma experiência holística, deixando-o inspirado e energizado para enfrentar o dia a dia com mais equilíbrio e bem-estar.

## **Programa do Retiro**

**Dia 1 — Chegada e Boas-Vindas**

 Acolhimento e introdução às práticas de Yoga e Ayurveda, preparando corpo e mente para a jornada de equilíbrio e revitalização.

**Dia 2 — Yoga e Ayurveda em Prática**

 Vivência de sessões de Yoga, workshops de Ayurveda e práticas restaurativas, promovendo harmonização dos doshas e revitalização do corpo e da mente.

**Dia 3 — Conexão e Equilíbrio**

 Integração das práticas vividas, reforçando a harmonia interior, conexão com a natureza e a energia vital restaurada.

![Image 4: retiro de yoga e ayurveda | yogalounge portugal](https://yogalounge.pt/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/52959619-0682-471d-be2d-f0515c400f96.png)

![Image 5: retiro de yoga e ayurveda | yogalounge portugal](https://yogalounge.pt/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/yoga_retreat-min.png)

## **O Retiro Inclui**

*   Sessões de Yoga e Meditação
*   Workshops de Ayurveda e práticas de bem-estar
*   Alojamento de 2 noites com pequeno-almoço, almoço e jantar vegetarianos
*   Águas e infusões
*   Certificado de Participação

## **A Quem se Destina**

Este retiro é indicado para quem:

*   procura restaurar o equilíbrio entre corpo, mente e espírito
*   deseja abrandar e cuidar de si de forma consciente
*   quer conhecer e aprofundar práticas e rotinas de Yoga, Meditação e Ayurveda
*   sente necessidade de relaxamento profundo e renovação da energia vital
*   é aluno, ex-aluno ou membro da comunidade YogaLounge, ou sente afinidade com esta abordagem

Não é necessária experiência prévia, apenas abertura para o processo de equilíbrio e bem-estar.

## **Informações Essenciais**

**Próxima Data**: : 29 a 31 de MAIO 2026.

Chegada partir das 16h no primeiro dia e Inicio do Retiro às 17h; Saída: às 11.30h no terceiro dia.

**Local**: Sintra, Portugal

**Vagas**: Limitadas

O retiro é orientado por [Carla Paulo](https://yogalounge.pt/sobre-a-carla/),**Professora de Yoga e Terapeuta de Ayurveda Certificada**, com vasta experiência na condução de processos de saúde, transformação e bem-estar integral.

**Nota**: Durante o retiro existirá prática de cozinha ayurveda.

O programa pode sofrer ligeiras alterações, para conforto de todos, de acordo com condições climáticas e nº de participantes.

**Nota:**Fecho das inscrições 1 mês antes do retiro.

**Valor:**390 euros. Inscrições até 2 meses antes da data de inicio do retiro tem desconto EARLY BIRD. Se trouxer um amigo tem 5% de oferta no retiro. Tem condições especiais para 4 pessoas. Encontra os valores do retiro na [ficha de inscrição.](https://yogalounge.pt/download-ficha-inscricao-retiros/)
