# 6 Retiros de yoga em Portugal:

## roteiros zen por destinos lusitanos

[Entre em contato](https://wa.me/351937087380?text=Ol%C3%A1%2C%20visitei%20o%20vosso%20site%20e%20gostaria%20de%20obter%20mais%20informa%C3%A7%C3%B5es%21)

*   Sou Brasileiro
*   Segurança e Conforto
*   Serviço Premium
*   Guest Relations

Explorar os**retiros de yoga em Portugal** pode ser a chave para encontrar equilíbrio e paz interior.

Em meio a paisagens deslumbrantes, o país oferece uma variedade de destinos perfeitos para uma imersão completa no universo do yoga.

Desde as montanhas do norte até as praias do sul, cada local proporciona uma experiência única, repleta de serenidade e conexão com a natureza.

Além disso, os retiros não são apenas sobre praticar posturas e meditação.

Eles oferecem uma verdadeira fuga do estresse diário, permitindo que você se reconecte consigo mesmo e encontre um novo ritmo de vida.

Com instrutores experientes e ambientes cuidadosamente preparados, esses retiros são ideais tanto para iniciantes quanto para praticantes avançados.

Portanto, se você está planejando uma viagem para relaxar e renovar suas energias, continue lendo este roteiro zen.

Vamos guiá-lo pelos melhores **retiros de yoga em Portugal**, destacando as particularidades de cada destino e o que você pode esperar de cada experiência.

Prepare-se para descobrir lugares incríveis onde o corpo, a mente e a alma encontram harmonia.

![Image 2: Retiros de yoga em Portugal](https://www.bem-vindo-a-lisboa.com.br/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/retiros-de-yoga-em-portugal.webp)

Retiros de yoga em Portugal

## **Cultura dos retiros de yoga em Portugal**

A cultura da**yoga em Portuga**l tem raízes profundas e uma trajetória interessante.

Inicialmente, o yoga chegou ao país através de influências externas, principalmente da Índia e de outros países onde a prática já estava consolidada.

Nos anos 70 e 80, alguns pioneiros portugueses, apaixonados pelo yoga, começaram a difundir a prática em centros urbanos como **Lisboa** e **Porto**.

Com o passar dos anos, a procura por uma vida mais equilibrada e a busca por bem-estar aumentaram significativamente.

Isso levou ao crescimento de estúdios de yoga e à popularização dos **retiros de yoga em Portugal**.

Além disso, a beleza natural do país, com suas praias paradisíacas, montanhas tranquilas e florestas serenas, criou o cenário perfeito para esses retiros, que começaram a atrair tanto praticantes locais quanto internacionais.

Outro fator importante na consolidação desses retiros foi o desenvolvimento do **Turismo de Saúde e Bem-Estar**.

**Portugal** se destacou como um destino ideal para quem busca relaxamento e rejuvenescimento, integrando a prática de yoga a outras atividades de bem-estar, como massagens terapêuticas, alimentação saudável e meditação.

Ao longo dos anos, muitos instrutores renomados e centros especializados estabeleceram-se em **Portugal**, criando uma comunidade vibrante e acolhedora.

Hoje, os **retiros de yoga em Portugal** são reconhecidos pela qualidade dos ensinamentos e pela experiência transformadora que proporcionam.

De norte a sul, é possível encontrar uma variedade de retiros que atendem diferentes necessidades e níveis de prática, consolidando o país como um verdadeiro santuário para os amantes do yoga.

![Image 3: Retiros de yoga em Portugal](https://www.bem-vindo-a-lisboa.com.br/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/retiros-de-yoga-em-portugal-1.webp)

Retiros de yoga em Portugal

**| Leia também:**[**Turismo de saúde e bem-estar em Portugal: uma jornada de autocuidado e equilíbrio**](https://www.bem-vindo-a-lisboa.com.br/blog/turismo-de-saude-e-bem-estar-em-portugal/)

## **Benefícios para os praticantes de yoga**

Participar de **retiros de yoga** oferece uma série de benefícios que podem transformar a vida dos praticantes.

Em primeiro lugar, a prática regular de yoga ajuda a melhorar a flexibilidade e a força muscular.

As posturas, conhecidas como _asanas_, trabalham diversos grupos musculares, promovendo um corpo mais forte e flexível.

A combinação de respiração consciente, meditação e _asanas_ também ajuda a reduzir os níveis de estresse e ansiedade.

Ao praticar yoga, os participantes aprendem a focar no momento presente, o que contribui para uma sensação geral de bem-estar e calma interior.

Outro benefício importante é a melhoria da qualidade do sono.

Muitas pessoas que participam dos **retiros de yoga em Portugal** relatam um sono mais profundo e reparador.

Isso se deve ao relaxamento promovido pela prática, que ajuda a equilibrar o sistema nervoso e a preparar o corpo para um descanso adequado.

A yoga também pode melhorar a saúde cardiovascular.

As posturas e a respiração profunda aumentam a circulação sanguínea e a oxigenação das células, o que beneficia o coração e os vasos sanguíneos.

Além disso, a prática regular de yoga pode ajudar a reduzir a pressão arterial e a melhorar a saúde geral do sistema cardiovascular.

Por fim, os **retiros de yoga**promovem um senso de comunidade e conexão.

Participar de um retiro oferece a oportunidade de conhecer pessoas com interesses semelhantes, criando laços e compartilhando experiências.

Esse aspecto social é fundamental para o bem-estar emocional e pode enriquecer ainda mais a prática de yoga.

Com todos esses benefícios, fica claro por que os **retiros de yoga em Portugal** se tornaram tão populares.

Eles oferecem uma experiência holística que nutre o corpo, a mente e a alma, proporcionando uma transformação completa para os praticantes.

Retiros de yoga em Portugal

## **Retiros de yoga em Portugal**

Em **Portugal**, você encontra uma variedade de retiros, cada um com suas particularidades e encantos únicos.

Desde os tranquilos campos do**Alentejo** até as deslumbrantes praias do **Algarve**, os destinos lusitanos oferecem algo para todos os gostos e necessidades.

Portanto, prepare-se para descobrir os melhores **retiros de yoga em Portugal** e planejar sua próxima aventura zen.

### [**Casa Ganapati – Yoga e Vedãnta, Porto**](https://casaganapati.com/)

Outro local de destaque entre os **retiros de yoga em Portugal** é a **Casa Ganapati – Yoga e Vedãnta**, situada no coração do**Porto**.

Este espaço é dedicado à prática de yoga e ao estudo do _Vedãnta_, oferecendo uma abordagem holística que combina técnicas tradicionais com ensinamentos espirituais profundos.

Na **Casa Ganapati**, os retiros são cuidadosamente planejados para proporcionar uma experiência de imersão completa. Os programas incluem aulas de yoga para todos os níveis, desde iniciantes até praticantes avançados.

As práticas são conduzidas por instrutores experientes, que guiam os participantes através de posturas, respiração e meditação, promovendo um equilíbrio entre corpo e mente.

Além das sessões de yoga, a **Casa Ganapati** oferece workshops de _Vedãnta_, que exploram a filosofia indiana e sua aplicação na vida cotidiana.

Esses workshops ajudam os participantes a aprofundar seu entendimento espiritual e a encontrar respostas para questões existenciais, promovendo uma transformação interior significativa.

Em resumo, os **retiros de yoga em Portuga**l na **Casa Ganapati** são uma excelente escolha para quem busca uma experiência profunda de autoconhecimento e bem-estar.

Com uma combinação de práticas físicas e ensinamentos espirituais, esses retiros oferecem uma jornada enriquecedora que nutre o corpo, a mente e a alma.

![Image 6: Casa Ganapati - Yoga e Vedãnta, no Porto](https://www.bem-vindo-a-lisboa.com.br/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/retiros-de-yoga-em-portugal-4.webp)

Casa Ganapati – Yoga e Vedãnta, no Porto

### [**Yoga Lounge, Lisboa**](https://yogalounge.pt/)

Na vibrante cidade de **Lisboa**, a **Yoga Lounge** oferece uma experiência única para quem busca **retiros de yoga em Portugal**.

Este centro é conhecido por combinar a prática tradicional de yoga com abordagens modernas de saúde e bem-estar.

A **Yoga Lounge** proporciona uma variedade de programas que atendem tanto iniciantes quanto praticantes experientes.

Entre os serviços disponíveis, destacam-se as sessões de _mindfulness_ e meditação, que ajudam a aliviar o estresse e a promover o equilíbrio mental.

Além disso, a **Yoga Lounge** oferece cursos de saúde integrativa, que incluem desde massagem ayurvédica até coaching holístico e detox ayurvédico, conhecido como _Panchakarma_​.

Outro ponto forte da **Yoga Lounge**é a ênfase na nutrição e alimentação saudável, com sessões de orientação nutricional e programas de jejum terapêutico.

Esses serviços são complementados por cursos especializados que abordam a nutrição ayurvédica e outras práticas alimentares saudáveis, proporcionando uma abordagem completa para o bem-estar​​.

E para aqueles interessados em uma abordagem mais profunda, a **Yoga Lounge** oferece também sessões de coaching em saúde mental, focadas na prevenção do burnout e na gestão do estresse.

Esta combinação de yoga, meditação e saúde holística faz da **Yoga Lounge** um destino perfeito para quem busca o melhor dos **retiros de yoga em Portugal**, especialmente na região de **Lisboa​**.

![Image 7: Yoga Lounge, em Lisboa](https://www.bem-vindo-a-lisboa.com.br/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/retiros-de-yoga-em-portugal-5.webp)

Yoga Lounge, em Lisboa

### [**Herdade da Matinha, Alentejo**](https://www.herdadedamatinha.com/)

A **Herdade da Matinha**, localizada no **Alentejo**, é um dos destinos mais encantadores para **retiros de yoga em Portugal**.

Este local oferece uma combinação perfeita de práticas de yoga, contato com a natureza e uma atmosfera de tranquilidade.

Na **Herdade da Matinha**, os retiros de yoga incluem aulas diárias para todos os níveis de praticantes.

Os instrutores, experientes e acolhedores, guiam as sessões em um ambiente que promove a paz interior e a conexão com o corpo e a mente.

Além das práticas de yoga, o local oferece meditação guiada, caminhadas pela natureza e oficinas de bem-estar.

O centro também se destaca pelas suas acomodações confortáveis, que variam entre quartos charmosos e suites luxuosas, todas decoradas com um toque rústico e acolhedor.

As refeições são preparadas com ingredientes orgânicos e locais, enfatizando uma dieta saudável e balanceada que complementa perfeitamente a prática de yoga.

Além disso, a **Herdade da Matinha** oferece massagens relaxantes e tratamentos de spa, proporcionando uma experiência completa de relaxamento e revitalização.

As paisagens naturais ao redor da herdade, com suas trilhas e espaços ao ar livre, são ideais para momentos de reflexão e conexão com a natureza.

Portanto, os **retiros de yoga em Portugal** na **Herdade da Matinha** são ideais para quem busca uma experiência de bem-estar integral, combinando práticas de yoga, alimentação saudável e um ambiente tranquilo.

Herdade da Matinha, no Alentejo

### [**Quinta da Calma, Algarve**](https://quintadacalma.com/)

Entre os**retiros de yoga em Portugal**, a **Quinta da Calma**, localizada no **Algarve**, se destaca como um refúgio de tranquilidade e bem-estar.

Este centro oferece uma ampla gama de serviços destinados a promover a saúde física, mental e espiritual dos participantes.

Na **Quinta da Calma**, os retiros incluem uma variedade de aulas de yoga adaptadas a diferentes níveis de experiência.

As sessões são conduzidas por instrutores qualificados que utilizam técnicas tradicionais para proporcionar uma experiência completa de relaxamento e rejuvenescimento.

Além de yoga, o centro oferece aulas de tai chi, biodanza e meditação, garantindo uma abordagem holística para o bem-estar​​.

Os retiros na **Quinta da Calma** também são conhecidos por suas terapias e tratamentos.

Os participantes podem desfrutar de massagens terapêuticas, sessões de acupuntura e tratamentos de reiki, todos realizados por terapeutas experientes.

Esses serviços são projetados para complementar a prática de yoga, ajudando a liberar tensões e a promover a cura interna​.

A alimentação na **Quinta da Calma** segue princípios de nutrição saudável, com refeições preparadas com ingredientes frescos e locais.

A dieta é pensada para apoiar a prática de yoga e promover a desintoxicação do corpo, contribuindo para uma experiência revitalizante.

Além das práticas e terapias, a **Quinta da Calma**oferece um ambiente sereno e natural, ideal para a prática de yoga.

Com apenas 15 quartos, o centro garante um ambiente intimista e tranquilo, permitindo que os participantes se sintam verdadeiramente conectados à natureza e a si mesmos.

Em resumo, os **retiros de yoga em Portugal** na **Quinta da Calma** são uma excelente opção para quem busca uma fuga do cotidiano e deseja mergulhar em uma experiência de bem-estar profundo no coração do **Algarve**.

## Yoga & Meditação - Shakti Yoga Dance Tantra para mulheres Formações - Retiros - Terapias

  Encontre a sua essência - Siga o seu coração - Ouça a sua voz interior.   
​Trate do seu corpo com a Padma

[Nossas próximas Formações](/formacoes.html)

## A minha religião é o amor! Viva com seu coração.  Aprenda a tomar conta de si mesmo. Amar-se a si e amar os outros. É  tempo de cuidar de si! Você merece! Venha relaxar e ter tempo para si com Yoga, workshops e/ou terapias!

IMG_3597_edited.jpg

QUEM TE VAI GUIAR

# Olá, sou a Paula

"A Quintinha do Mar nasceu num momento em que eu também precisei de parar e escutar o corpo. Foi a partir daí que este espaço começou a ganhar forma. Um lugar onde o tempo abranda e onde existe cuidado para voltar ao corpo, acalmar a mente e perceber o que é essencial.

​​​ [...] IMG_4825.jpg

FAQ'S

# Perguntas

Este retiro é para quem sente a necessidade de parar e criar espaço, mesmo sem saber exatamente o que procura. Pode ser cansaço, confusão, ansiedade, uma fase de transição ou simplesmente a sensação de que algo já não está alinhado. Não é preciso estar em crise nem ter um objetivo definido para vir. O mais importante é a disponibilidade para escutar o que surge, estar presente no processo e cuidar de si com honestidade. Aqui não há pressa nem expectativas externas. Podes chegar como estás. O caminho constrói-se a partir daí.

A diferença entre os retiros está no tempo disponível para cuidar, integrar e levar o processo para a vida.

O Brisa (2 dias) é uma pausa breve, ideal como primeiro contacto, para descansar, abrandar e voltar a sentir o corpo. [...] 15–21 dias

Um caminho só teu

Voltar ao essencial

Este retiro é desenhado de forma totalmente personalizada, à medida das tuas necessidades.  
 A duração, o ritmo, as práticas, as terapias e os temas acompanham o momento que estás a viver.

Quero perceber qual retiro faz mais sentido

ABORDAGEM

# A Experiência

Mais do que um conjunto de atividades, cada retiro é um tempo cuidado, guiado pela escuta do corpo, num lugar seguro.

Frame 1.png

Alojamento

Quartos simples e silenciosos, rodeados de natureza, partilhados ou privados, pensados para a introspeção e o repouso.

Frame 2.png

Práticas de Cuidado

Momentos de silêncio, presença, respiração, meditação e escuta interior.  
 Não há exigências, apenas convite à experiência.

_MG_9164.jpg

_MG_9070.jpg

12.png

Caminhadas Suaves

top of page

![Frame 4.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_d24d08ef74ec4c3790538657ea7ca868~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_56,h_56,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Frame%204.png)



## RETIROS DE CUIDADO FÍSICO E EMOCIONAL

# Quintinha do Mar

Se sentes falta de direção, energia ou clareza, aqui encontras um lugar seguro para abrandar e reorganizar corpo, mente e emoções

[Quero começar por aqui](https://www.quintinhadomar.com)

![_MG_9280.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/13c60c_871ccfc5a4894b9d967c542e7a339369~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_0,y_498,w_3122,h_4240/fill/w_472,h_571,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/_MG_9280.jpg)

O NOSSO ESPAÇO

# Há lugares que não precisam de se explicar. Sentem-se.

A Quintinha do Mar nasceu para acolher quem anda cansado de estar cansado. Para quem precisa de parar sem justificar, de descansar sem ter de melhorar, de estar sem ter de fazer. 

Aqui, o tempo abranda naturalmente. O silêncio não pesa. A natureza envolve o corpo. E o cuidado acontence de forma simples, humana e presente.

Sem dogmas nem pressas, nem expectativas sobre quem deves ser. Há um espaço seguro para chegares como estás e tempo para voltares a sentir-te em casa dentro de ti.

max. participantes

tipos de retiros

∞

personalizado

OS NOSSOS RETIROS

# Cada retiro é um caminho diferente

Quanto mais tempo mais profunda a tua transformação.

![ChatGPT Image 12_12_2025, 17_24_14.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_92e338a3f3cd4163b99c6a7aa94c7bcb~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_107,y_356,w_191,h_291/fill/w_71,h_104,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/ChatGPT%20Image%2012_12_2025%2C%2017_24_14.png)

# Brisa

2 dias

A porta de entrada para parar

Pausa breve · Primeiro Contacto

Este é um primeiro passo para abrandar e sair do ruído do dia a dia.

Dois dias para respirar, descansar e perceber por onde começar.

![ChatGPT Image 12_12_2025, 17_24_14.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_92e338a3f3cd4163b99c6a7aa94c7bcb~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_368,y_361,w_286,h_291/fill/w_112,h_48,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/ChatGPT%20Image%2012_12_2025%2C%2017_24_14.png)

# Maré

5 dias

Sair do automático e ganhar presença

Recuperar energia · Espaço interior

Com mais tempo, surge clareza, presença e uma sensação de reorganização interior que permite voltar à vida com mais estabilidade.  
 Um espaço para abrandar e sair do piloto automático.

![ChatGPT Image 12_12_2025, 17_24_14.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_92e338a3f3cd4163b99c6a7aa94c7bcb~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_704,y_368,w_261,h_280/fill/w_87,h_111,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/ChatGPT%20Image%2012_12_2025%2C%2017_24_14.png)

7 dias

# +

# Maré

Aprofundar, integrar e enraizar o processo

Continuidade · Regresso gradual

O Maré+ aprofunda o caminho iniciado, trazendo mais

consciência e integração interior.

Uma base interna mais sólida para mudanças que se mantêm no tempo.

![ChatGPT Image 9_01_2026, 20_01_51_edited](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_096ce9ed34094f7696c28cebc11729b2~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_182,y_91,w_660,h_842/fill/w_92,h_80,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/ChatGPT%20Image%209_01_2026%2C%2020_01_51_edited.png)

# Essência

15–21 dias

Um caminho só teu

Voltar ao essencial

Este retiro é desenhado de forma totalmente personalizada, à medida das tuas necessidades.  
 A duração, o ritmo, as práticas, as terapias e os temas acompanham o momento que estás a viver.

[Quero perceber qual retiro faz mais sentido](https://forms.gle/YYKTeKayagNLZ2Lz6)

ABORDAGEM

# A Experiência

Mais do que um conjunto de atividades, cada retiro é um tempo cuidado, guiado pela escuta do corpo, num lugar seguro.

![Frame 1.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_6f73f603066e4ea0826d4800bce9ff8d~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_40,y_0,w_736,h_816/fill/w_34,h_43,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Frame%201.png)

Alojamento

Quartos simples e silenciosos, rodeados de natureza, partilhados ou privados, pensados para a introspeção e o repouso.

![Frame 2.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_40f7460426a4440786c498dd4bf47713~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_43,y_0,w_730,h_816/fill/w_43,h_48,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Frame%202.png)

Práticas de Cuidado

Momentos de silêncio, presença, respiração, meditação e escuta interior.  
 Não há exigências, apenas convite à experiência.

![_MG_9164.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/13c60c_bbed8780dd14474f86f4bc8c3135a1fa~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_876,y_0,w_3432,h_3456/fill/w_281,h_283,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/_MG_9164.jpg)

![_MG_9070.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_f58151f8e6664254a0ef8372386f2ebb~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_637,y_1875,w_2386,h_2401/fill/w_281,h_283,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/_MG_9070.jpg)

![12.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_d02b54c3bd38496a8aaecd31974d3b2d~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_43,y_0,w_730,h_816/fill/w_34,h_43,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/12.png)

Caminhadas Suaves

Entre a serra e a costa atlntica. O ritmo adapta-se ao momento. Não é preciso experiência nem condição física específica.

![1.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_1087ce553011446f98fcd14005ea03e2~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_43,y_0,w_730,h_816/fill/w_34,h_43,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/1.png)

Alimentação

De origem vegetal, progressiva, simples e leve, preparada com consciência e ajustada às necessidades de cada pessoa.

![23.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_f1f3ee274cb04ae4a07f4aa7b83ac629~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_43,y_0,w_730,h_816/fill/w_34,h_38,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/23.png)

Emoções

Observação da influência das emoções nas escolhas do dia a dia, com espaço para reconhecer padrões sem julgamento.\*

![_MG_9257.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_e3b1c3d4de274325a0c1a2eac25499cd~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_20,y_0,w_2827,h_2847/fill/w_281,h_283,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/_MG_9257.jpg)

![Frame 1.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_96125a5447654d848a2ac5ad4ab62831~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_43,y_0,w_730,h_816/fill/w_34,h_38,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Frame%201.png)

Acompanhamento

Após o retiro, mantemos contacto para apoiar a integração gradual do que foi vivido no teu dia a dia, no tempo certo.

\* Terapias extras têm um custo adicional. Por favor, contacte-nos.

AGENDA

# Próximas datas

Se nenhuma destas datas fizer sentido, ou se procuras um retiro personalizado, fala connosco.

[Quero saber mais](https://forms.gle/YYKTeKayagNLZ2Lz6)

![IMG_3597_edited.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/78c581_cfbd3006a9ec42e79661f35e49168137~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_0,y_90,w_1024,h_1357/fill/w_397,h_526,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/IMG_3597_edited.jpg)

QUEM TE VAI GUIAR

# Olá, sou a Paula

"A Quintinha do Mar nasceu num momento em que eu também precisei de parar e escutar o corpo. Foi a partir daí que este espaço começou a ganhar forma. Um lugar onde o tempo abranda e onde existe cuidado para voltar ao corpo, acalmar a mente e perceber o que é essencial.

​​​

Com o tempo, fui desenvolvendo uma forma própria de acompanhar estes processos, baseada na escuta do corpo, das emoções e no respeito pelo ritmo de cada pessoa.

​

O meu papel é guiar com presença, criar segurança e cuidar do espaço para que cada pessoa reencontre o seu centro.

Se sentires que este é o momento de cuidar de ti, convidamos-te a [viver esta experiência."](https://forms.gle/YYKTeKayagNLZ2Lz6)

TESTEMUNHOS

# Histórias de quem já viveu a transformação

As palavras de quem já veio falam por si. Não há guião nem ensaio, apenas partilhas autênticas de descanso profundo, reconexão e mudanças que ficaram.

![Screenshot 2025-12-12 at 11.59.52.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/13c60c_24b72af88ed5429abc1d3dcf48632d20~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_0,y_2,w_652,h_384/fill/w_357,h_210,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Screenshot%202025-12-12%20at%2011_59_52.png)

![IMG_4825.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/13c60c_9bd20b6592864da3b25c3a8409b5da74~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_10,y_0,w_1268,h_1113/fill/w_351,h_308,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/IMG_4825.jpg)

FAQ'S

# Perguntas

Este retiro é para quem sente a necessidade de parar e criar espaço, mesmo sem saber exatamente o que procura. Pode ser cansaço, confusão, ansiedade, uma fase de transição ou simplesmente a sensação de que algo já não está alinhado. Não é preciso estar em crise nem ter um objetivo definido para vir. O mais importante é a disponibilidade para escutar o que surge, estar presente no processo e cuidar de si com honestidade. Aqui não há pressa nem expectativas externas. **Podes chegar como estás. O caminho constrói-se a partir daí.**

A diferença entre os retiros está no tempo disponível para cuidar, integrar e levar o processo para a vida.

O Brisa (2 dias) é uma pausa breve, ideal como primeiro contacto, para descansar, abrandar e voltar a sentir o corpo.

O Maré (5 dias) oferece mais espaço para reorganizar internamente, recuperar energia e ganhar clareza para o dia a dia.

O Maré+ (7 dias) permite uma integração mais profunda, consolidando o que foi vivido e preparando um regresso à vida com mais presença e estabilidade.

Não há um retiro melhor do que outro. Há aquele que faz mais sentido para o momento em que estás.

Quanto mais tempo, mais profunda pode ser a transformação.

Se sentires dúvidas, podemos ajudar-te a perceber qual se ajusta melhor a ti.

Os retiros podem acontecer em pequeno grupo ou de forma individual. Quando em grupo, são encontros intimistas, até 8 pessoas, com espaço, silêncio e respeito pelo percurso de cada um. Podem existir momentos de partilha, sempre como convite e nunca como obrigação. Se preferires não participar, basta indicares isso no momento da reserva.

Não. Tudo é pensado para quem chega pela primeira vez. As práticas são simples, guiadas e acessíveis.

O movimento é suave e adaptado ao momento. Não é preciso condição física específica nem experiência prévia.

Quando o corpo abranda, é natural que emoções apareçam. O retiro é conduzido com presença e cuidado, para que tudo o que surge possa ser vivido com segurança. É um espaço de descanso, escuta e reorganização interior, e não substitui cuidados médicos ou terapêuticos quando necessários.

O retiro é um processo completo em si.  Existe a possibilidade de acrescentar sessões terapêuticas, caso sintas que isso pode apoiar o teu percurso.  Estas sessões são opcionais e não fazem parte do programa base, sendo realizadas mediante um valor adicional.

Após o retiro, mantemos um período de contacto por WhatsApp durante sete dias para esclarecer dúvidas que possam surgir.

Se sentires que faz sentido para ti, existe a possibilidade de acompanhamento individual adicional, fora do programa base.

Reunimos aqui algumas das perguntas mais frequentes, para que possas sentir com mais clareza se este retiro faz sentido para ti.

[Pedir Informações](https://forms.gle/YYKTeKayagNLZ2Lz6)

## Is a yoga retreat in Lisbon right for you?

Discover if this transformative experience is your next step

## This is for you if:

You want to deepen your practice without feeling intimidated by advanced yogis

You crave city energy but need space to breathe and move mindfully

You're ready to travel solo but want the safety net of a structured experience

You need to press pause on stress while still feeling culturally stimulated

## Questions we hear all the time:

What if I'm not flexible enough or new to yoga?

Most Lisbon retreats welcome all levels, from complete beginners to experienced practitioners. Teachers modify poses for every body, and the focus is on personal growth, not perfect alignment.

Will I have time to explore Lisbon, or is it all yoga all the time?

The best part about city retreats is the balance. Most programs include guided walks through Alfama, time for pastéis de nata, and free afternoons to wander the trams and viewpoints at your own rhythm.

### Who are we?

We are a team of yogis who came together to put our energy into making the world a better place by connecting you with life-changing yoga retreats, meditation retreats, wellness retreats, and yoga teacher trainings. We are all about spreading love!

### Why choose us?

We aren't just a business, we are family. When you book with us, you can be sure that your experience will be full of love, security, understanding, and joy every step of the way. From helping you find the perfect retreat to taking care of you when things go wrong, we treat you like family.

hits.snippet:
Typical daily rhythms combine structured yoga and meditation sessions with free time. Here’s what you might experience on retreat:

   Two daily yoga practices tailored to all levels 
   Nutritious vegetarian/vegan meals created to fuel your body and nourish your soul 
   Nature walks and opportunities for solo reflection 
   Evening relaxation sessions to integrate the day’s experience 

There’s also the option to enjoy additional wellness experiences such as herbal walks, massage treatments, and sound baths (depending on the retreat week and schedule).

Who Should Attend?

A yoga retreat June 2026 at Yoga Evolution Retreats is ideal for: [...] Qigong for energy flow and vitality 
   Meditation for mental clarity and calm 
   Heart‑opening practices to cultivate presence and joy 
   Outdoor explorations to ground your senses in nature 

These layers of practice ensure a holistic experience that nurtures your body and mind while encouraging a deeper connection with the natural world. Whether you crave restful reflection or fresh energy for life’s next chapter, this retreat offers space for both.

Experience the Portuguese Countryside

Set on a peaceful forested property in central Portugal, the Yoga Evolution retreat center provides the ideal backdrop for a yoga retreat June 2026. Surrounded by shady trees, hammocks, and sun‑washed terraces, our retreat space invites guests to unwind and reconnect at their own pace. [...] People looking to deepen their yoga practice in a natural setting 
   Those who want to destress and restore balance after a busy spring 
   Beginners and experienced yoga practitioners alike 
   Anyone drawn to summer‑energy, outdoor movement, and mindful living 

The welcoming environment encourages participants to show up as they are, explore at their own pace, and leave feeling refreshed, grounded, and inspired.

Reserve Your Spot for June 2026

Retreat spaces, especially for summer months like June, tend to fill quickly. If you’re considering a yoga retreat June 2026 that blends physical practice, soulful reflection, and deep connection with nature, Yoga Evolution Retreats should be at the top of your list.

Yoga Retreat June 2026

**Yoga Retreat June 2026: Summer Yoga in Portugal with Yoga Evolution Retreats**

****

Are you planning a **yoga retreat June 2026** that will help you reconnect with yourself, deepen your practice, and celebrate the arrival of summer? _Yoga Evolution Retreats_ in central Portugal offers one of Europe’s most inspiring wellness experiences for this month. Nestled in tranquil forested valleys, their June retreats combine dynamic yoga practices with nature immersion, heart‑opening breathwork, and restorative sessions — perfect for yogis of all levels seeking rejuvenation, presence, and inner balance.

![Image 5: Yoga Retreat June 2026](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/images/Yoga-retreat-june-2026.webp)

**Why Choose a Yoga Retreat in June 2026?**

****

June is an ideal time for a yoga retreat in Portugal. The weather is warm and welcoming, nature is vibrant, and the long days of early summer offer ample light for both indoor and outdoor practices. Choosing a **yoga retreat June 2026** means aligning your personal transformation with the season’s natural rhythms — a time of expansion, growth, and vitality.

![Image 6: summer yoga retreat june 2026](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/images/Summer-yoga-retreat-2026-june_mi4l1s07.webp)

Whether you’re a seasoned practitioner or just beginning your yoga journey, Yoga Evolution Retreats creates a nurturing space designed to support your physical, emotional, and spiritual well‑being. Their experienced instructors guide a variety of yoga styles and mindful practices that help participants rest, recharge, and discover new layers of their practice.

**Summer Yoga Retreat: 21–27 June 2026**

****

One of the flagship **yoga retreat June 2026** programs at Yoga Evolution Retreats is the **Summer Yoga Retreat running from 21 to 27 June 2026**. This week‑long experience features a balanced combination of invigorating movement, deep relaxation, and connection with Portugal’s breathtaking natural landscapes.

![Image 7: June Yoga Retreat 2025](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/images/June-yoga-retreat-2026.webp)

During this retreat, participants can expect:

*   **Morning transformational yoga sessions** that blend Vinyasa, Somatic Yoga, and Qigong to build strength, mobility, and mindful awareness. 

*   **Restorative somatic yoga practices** in the evenings that help release tension and integrate the day’s work.  

*   **Wild swimming excursions** with picnics at scenic river beaches, inviting attendees to connect with nature in a refreshing and playful way. 

This retreat is designed for yogis who love _both_ active practice and deep restorative rest. Starting with dynamic morning flows and winding down with tranquil sessions, the week offers a complete balance of movement and stillness.

**Holistic Practices for Body & Mind**

****

The **yoga retreat June 2026** at Yoga Evolution Retreats goes beyond asana (postures). You’ll find a carefully curated schedule that supports your entire well‑being, including blendings of:

*   **Qigong for energy flow and vitality** 
*   **Meditation for mental clarity and calm** 
*   **Heart‑opening practices to cultivate presence and joy** 
*   **Outdoor explorations to ground your senses in nature** 

****

These layers of practice ensure a holistic experience that nurtures your body and mind while encouraging a deeper connection with the natural world. Whether you crave restful reflection or fresh energy for life’s next chapter, this retreat offers space for both.

**Experience the Portuguese Countryside**

****

Set on a peaceful forested property in central Portugal, the Yoga Evolution retreat center provides the ideal backdrop for a **yoga retreat June 2026**. Surrounded by shady trees, hammocks, and sun‑washed terraces, our retreat space invites guests to unwind and reconnect at their own pace.

Typical daily rhythms combine structured yoga and meditation sessions with free time. Here’s what you might experience on retreat:

*   **Two daily yoga practices** tailored to all levels 
*   **Nutritious vegetarian/vegan meals** created to fuel your body and nourish your soul 
*   **Nature walks and opportunities for solo reflection** 
*   **Evening relaxation sessions to integrate the day’s experience** 

****

There’s also the option to enjoy additional wellness experiences such as herbal walks, massage treatments, and sound baths (depending on the retreat week and schedule).

**Who Should Attend?**

****

A **yoga retreat June 2026** at Yoga Evolution Retreats is ideal for:

*   People looking to deepen their yoga practice in a natural setting 
*   Those who want to destress and restore balance after a busy spring 
*   Beginners and experienced yoga practitioners alike 
*   Anyone drawn to summer‑energy, outdoor movement, and mindful living 

The welcoming environment encourages participants to show up as they are, explore at their own pace, and leave feeling refreshed, grounded, and inspired.

**Reserve Your Spot for June 2026**

****

Retreat spaces, especially for summer months like June, tend to fill quickly. If you’re considering a **yoga retreat June 2026** that blends physical practice, soulful reflection, and deep connection with nature, Yoga Evolution Retreats should be at the top of your list.

Don’t miss your chance to join the **21–27 June 2026** Summer Yoga Retreat in Portugal — a week that promises transformation, relaxation, and a renewed sense of vitality.

[Read More About this retreat yoga retreat June click here](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/summer-yoga-retreat.html)

* * *

Accommodation and Pricing on Our June Yoga Retreats 2026:

Yoga Evolution Retreats offers a variety of accommodation options to suit different preferences:

- Single Room: £650

- Twin Room: £600 per person

- Double Room: £600 per person

- Single/Double En-suite: £750 per person

- Room with Veranda: £800 per person (£950 with private facilities per person)

- Eco Caravan: £550

All packages include six nights of accommodation, two daily yoga classes with meditation (totaling 11 classes), three delicious vegetarian meals per day (with desserts ranging from raw chocolate to homemade raw cakes), and additional support for your practice as needed. Our diet here is vegan/vegetarian and mostly organic but if you need extra protein then we provide eggs and tuna.

[View Accommodation Options, Click Here](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/guest-rooms.html)

* * *

[Getting here from lisbon](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/lisbon.html)&[Getting here from porto](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/porto.html)

We welcome all levels of practice experience on all of our retreats.

* * *

**What's included in your stay with us**

*   transfers from Oleiros to the retreat center

*   6 nights accommodation
*   2 daily yoga classes with meditation - 11 classes during your stay
*   3 delicious vegetarian meals per day with a sweet to follow. sweets range from raw chocolate to healthy homemade raw cakes
*   Extra help with your practice if you feel you need clarification with any aspect the many practices we teach.

*   A day out at the river Zezere with a picnic lunch

*   We also have a raw chocolate making workshop which is donation only

**Whats optional**

*   massage

*   Organic soap and moisturiser making workshop with Freya
*   taking a walk to learn about medicinal herbs with Freya

* * *

Booking Information:

Spaces for this enriching retreat are limited. To secure your spot or for more details, visit the [booking page click here](https://www.yogaevolutionretreats.com/bookings.html).

Embrace the energy of the Summer Solstice and embark on a journey of self-discovery and renewal with the Yoga Retreat in June 2026 at Yoga Evolution Retreats. This experience promises to leave you recharged, inspired, and deeply connected to both nature and your inner self.

hits.title: Best Yoga Retreats in Portugal in June 2026 - Om Away
hits.snippet:
5. What kind of retreat experience works best in June?

   June is especially good for beach yoga, surf-and-yoga retreats, coastal wellness escapes, and programs built around movement, sunshine, and outdoor living.

6. What should I pack for a yoga retreat in Portugal in June?

   Pack light summer clothes, yoga wear, swimwear, sunscreen, a hat, and a light layer for breezier mornings or evenings by the coast. This is an inference from the June and summer conditions described in Om Away’s Portugal guides.

## Share Your Thoughts

Your email address will not be published. Required fields are marked 

## Leave a Reply Cancel reply

Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked 

Comment 

Name 

Email 

Website [...] ## Where to Go

The Algarve: Peak Season Beginning

June in the Algarve means beach season in full swing. The water’s warm, weather’s perfect, everything’s operational. But it also means rising prices and increasing crowds, especially in popular spots like Albufeira and Lagos.

Consider smaller towns or the western Algarve for slightly less intensity.

Western Coast: Better Balance

Portugal’s Atlantic coast offers excellent June conditions with fewer crowds than the Algarve. Consistent surf, warming water, spectacular beaches—without the resort town atmosphere.

Avoid Major Cities During Festivals

If you want peace, avoid Lisbon during Santos Populares and Porto around St. John’s Day. These are amazing cultural experiences but not quiet yoga retreat time.

## [Portugal](https://om-away.com/category/portugal/)

## Best Yoga Retreats in Portugal in June 2026

June is when summer truly begins in Portugal, bringing long, bright days, warm ocean air, festival energy, and the kind of weather that makes outdoor yoga, beach time, and coastal retreats feel effortless. It’s a great month for travelers who want early-summer warmth and vitality, while still catching Portugal before the full intensity of peak July and August crowds.

AUTHOR

Om Away

DATE PUBLISHED

 January 17, 2026 

CATEGORY

[Portugal](https://om-away.com/category/portugal/)

## Share This Article

[![Image 4: Facebook](https://om-away.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Group-90.svg)](https://om-away.com/portugal/yoga-retreats-portugal-june/#)[![Image 5: Twitter](https://om-away.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Group-92.svg)](https://om-away.com/portugal/yoga-retreats-portugal-june/#)[![Image 6: Email](https://om-away.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Group-94.svg)](https://om-away.com/portugal/yoga-retreats-portugal-june/#)![Image 7: Copy Link](https://om-away.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/twitter-154-svgrepo-com-4.svg)

## our selection of Yoga Retreats in Portugal in June 2026

June is when Portugal stops being Europe’s best-kept secret and starts becoming everyone’s summer destination. The weather is reliably warm, the ocean comfortable, the days impossibly long. But you’re also at the beginning of high season—prices rising, crowds arriving, that relaxed vibe starting to shift.

If you can visit early June, you catch the sweet spot: summer weather before full summer chaos. By late June, you’re firmly in peak season with everything that entails.

[Learn More](https://om-away.com/retreat/8-day-juice-detox-retreat-with-yoga-for-body-mind-spirit-in-algarve-portugal/)

![Image 13](https://om-away.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/5-day-pure-mind-to-heart-detox-private-wellness-retreat-in-algarve-portugal-9.webp)

## 5 Day Pure Mind to Heart Detox Private Wellness Retreat in Algarve, Portugal

[Learn More](https://om-away.com/retreat/5-day-pure-mind-to-heart-detox-private-wellness-retreat-in-algarve-portugal/)

## Festival Month

June brings Santos Populares—Lisbon’s street festivals celebrating popular saints. Throughout the month, neighborhoods host parties with grilled sardines, music, and decorations. The energy is festive and social.

Porto celebrates St. John’s Day (June 23-24) with huge festivities, fireworks, and all-night parties. The atmosphere throughout Portugal becomes more vibrant and celebratory.

Some retreat centers in Portugal incorporate these festivals, offering cultural immersion alongside wellness practice. Others avoid the dates for people seeking maximum tranquility.

![Image 14](https://om-away.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/rikin-katyal-y5wYQKbso3g-unsplash-scaled.jpg)

**The Crowd Question**

Early June still feels manageable. Beaches have people but aren’t packed. Restaurants are busy but you can find tables. Retreat centers are filling up but not completely full.

By mid-to-late June, tourist season is clearly underway. Popular beaches get crowded. Restaurants require reservations. Everything costs more and feels busier.

This doesn’t make June bad—just different from shoulder season’s emptiness. You’re trading solitude for vibrant energy, peace for festivals, lower prices for guaranteed weather.

## Where to Go

**The Algarve: Peak Season Beginning**

June in the Algarve means beach season in full swing. The water’s warm, weather’s perfect, everything’s operational. But it also means rising prices and increasing crowds, especially in popular spots like Albufeira and Lagos.

Consider smaller towns or the western Algarve for slightly less intensity.

**Western Coast: Better Balance**

Portugal’s Atlantic coast offers excellent June conditions with fewer crowds than the Algarve. Consistent surf, warming water, spectacular beaches—without the resort town atmosphere.

**Avoid Major Cities During Festivals**

If you want peace, avoid Lisbon during Santos Populares and Porto around St. John’s Day. These are amazing cultural experiences but not quiet yoga retreat time.

**Best Retreat Types**

**Beach and Ocean Focus**

June is ideal for beach yoga, ocean swimming, SUP, surf, and any water-based activities. The conditions finally support full beach immersion without cold water compromises.

**Active and Social Programs**

June’s long days and warm weather support high-energy programs with multiple daily activities. The social festival atmosphere also works well for retreats emphasizing community and connection over solitude.

**Luxury Wellness**

June sees premium retreat offerings with full amenities. If you’re paying near-peak prices anyway, consider upgrading to luxury options with pools, spas, and beachfront locations.

![Image 15: group yoga practice on the beach during an early summer retreat](https://om-away.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/sumit-bisht-Mfen1C_0C7Q-unsplash-scaled.jpg)

![Image 16: madeira coastline in portugal during june retreat season](https://om-away.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/jose-duarte-9ja-vZpFyAo-unsplash-scaled.jpg)

## Practical Planning

Book 8-10 weeks ahead for June, especially late June. Prices are 15-20% above May levels, moving toward July/August peaks. Popular retreat centers fill months in advance for June.

Pack summer clothes—swimsuit essential, sun protection critical, light evening layers optional. The weather is predictable enough that packing is straightforward.

Flights are frequent and well-priced if booked 6-8 weeks out. Rental cars available but book ahead as demand increases.

**Who June Suits**

June works for people wanting summer warmth with slightly less intensity than July/August. For those interested in Portuguese festivals and cultural events. For travelers who don’t mind increasing crowds in exchange for guaranteed weather. For beach lovers who want properly warm water. For anyone with fixed June schedules who can’t visit shoulder season.

If you value solitude and budget prices above all else, choose different months. But if you want reliable summer weather with some festival energy, June delivers.

## FAQs: Best Yoga Retreats in Portugal in June 2026

**1. Is June a good time for a yoga retreat in Portugal?**

*   Yes, June is one of the best months because summer is starting, the weather is reliably sunny, and retreat life feels active, bright, and outdoors-focused.

**2. What is the weather like in Portugal in June?**

*   June usually brings warm, sunny days, very little rain, and comfortable early-summer conditions, especially along the coast.

**3. Why choose Portugal for a yoga retreat in June?**

*   Because June gives you long days, warm ocean air, and a vibrant summer atmosphere without yet reaching the highest heat and crowd levels of later summer.

**4. Are yoga retreats in Portugal crowded in June?**

*   Early June is usually calmer, while late June starts to feel busier as Portugal moves toward peak season.

**5. What kind of retreat experience works best in June?**

*   June is especially good for beach yoga, surf-and-yoga retreats, coastal wellness escapes, and programs built around movement, sunshine, and outdoor living.

**6. What should I pack for a yoga retreat in Portugal in June?**

*   Pack light summer clothes, yoga wear, swimwear, sunscreen, a hat, and a light layer for breezier mornings or evenings by the coast. This is an inference from the June and summer conditions described in Om Away’s Portugal guides.

### **Yoga Retreat · 1–5 June 2026 · Serra do Caldeirão, Portugal**

At the foothills of the Serra do Caldeirão, in Salir, surrounded by wild nature and open skies, we gather for a sacred pause — a space to slow down, reconnect, and remember what truly matters.

Through Vinyasa, Kundalini and Tantra Yoga, meditation, ceremonial cacao, self-inquiry, and spacious time in nature, this retreat invites you to nourish your nervous system, open your heart, and realign with your natural rhythm.

Open to all levels, this intimate retreat is an invitation to step out of doing and into being — to move, breathe, rest, and come home to yourself.

![Image 2: ✨](https://static.xx.fbcdn.net/images/emoji.php/v9/t75/2/16/2728.png) You are welcome exactly as you are ![Image 3: ✨](https://static.xx.fbcdn.net/images/emoji.php/v9/t75/2/16/2728.png)

### Yoga Retreat with Jenny Clise

Join Jenny Clise for a five-night yoga retreat on Portugal’s stunning Alentejo coast, where rolling hills meet the Atlantic. Designed for balance and renewal, each day blends movement, connection, and exploration in a peaceful retreat setting.

Mornings begin with yoga and meditation, followed by fresh, locally sourced meals. You’ll have time to move, reflect, and explore—wandering through Vila Nova de Milfontes, relaxing on Malhão Beach, or diving into special workshops and evening yoga Nidra. ## Flow Into Summer

### Yoga Retreat with Jenny Clise

Join Jenny Clise for a five-night yoga retreat on Portugal’s stunning Alentejo coast, where rolling hills meet the Atlantic. Designed for balance and renewal, each day blends movement, connection, and exploration in a peaceful retreat setting.

Mornings begin with yoga and meditation, followed by fresh, locally sourced meals. You’ll have time to move, reflect, and explore—wandering through Vila Nova de Milfontes, relaxing on Malhão Beach, or diving into special workshops and evening yoga Nidra.

As the retreat concludes, we’ll honor the summer solstice, embracing its energy and possibilities through intentional movement and reflection. Whether deepening your practice, seeking adventure, or simply stepping away from routine, this retreat offers the perfect balance of structure and freedom.

### Yoga and Workshops

#### Yin Yang

Designed to honor seasonal shifts, this practice balances movement and stillness. We begin with an energizing breath-led flow, then transition into grounding postures for deep restoration—cultivating strength in expansion and ease in surrender.

#### Arm Balance & Inversions

Build strength, balance, and confidence as you explore arm balances and inversions. With expert guidance from Jenny, you’ll master fundamentals, refine alignment, and safely push your limits—whether you’re a beginner or advancing your practice.

* * *

An initial deposit of $500 USD will secure your spot on the retreat. Please refer to all booking [terms and conditions here](https://startyouradzenture.com/terms-and-conditions/).

#### DAY 01

Welcome!

After arrival into Portugal, you’ll be whisked away and dropped off at our beautiful countryside retreat centre. After a few hours of relaxation and getting to know your new friends, we’ll share a welcome dinner and a good night’s rest follows.

#### DAY 02

Beach Day & Flow

Our first full day in Portugal together will begin with a yoga flow and a nourishing breakfast. Then, we’re off to Malhão Beach for some sun, surfing or pure relaxation. We’ll head back in time for lunch, followed by a Yin Yang yoga workshop, exploring the harmony between movement and deep relaxation, and conclude the day with a nourishing dinner.

#### DAY 03

Local Culture & Cuisine

We’ll start our morning with yoga before embarking on yet another adventure.Today, we venture to the charming town of Vila Nova de Milfontes—wander its quaint streets, explore at your own pace, and grab lunch at a local café. We’ll come together in the evening for a delicious dinner at a nearby restaurant.

#### DAY 04 

Rest, Relax & Restore

Today will be a day for restoration. We’ll start our morning with yoga and a delicious breakfast. After a playful and strengthening arm balance and inversion workshop, take time to go inward and relax on the beach, read a book, journal, or go out into the nature that surrounds the property.

We’ll gather for lunch, then later on head out for a scenic picnic, tasting local foods and delicacies.After dinner in the evening, we’ll finish the day with a relaxing Yoga Nidra workshop preparing us for a deep restful sleep.

#### DAY 05

Connections & Reflections

Another beautiful morning starts with yoga and a fresh breakfast. Late morning, we’ll head to a local vineyard for a wine-tasting experience, sampling local flavors while soaking in the stunning views. In the afternoon we’ll gather for a closing circle—sharing reflections before enjoying one last dinner together.

#### DAY 06

Gratitude & Goodbyes

Our last morning together will include yoga, and connection. We’ll end our time with breakfast and goodbye’s (or see you later’s)!

Inclusions

Exclusions

*   5-night stay in a beautiful retreat centre nestled in the Alentejo coast of Portugal
*   Daily breakfast, lunch, and dinner, with the exception of one lunch —giving you the perfect opportunity to explore one of the many charming local restaurants!
*   Daily Yoga led by Jenny featuring a blend of Slow Flow and Vinyasa
*   Daily Meditation classes including Yoga Nidra, guided visualization, breathwork and more
*   Workshops led by Jenny
*   Wine Tasting
*   Farm picnic with baskets of local cheeses, charcuterie, fruits, and baked treats
*   Visit to local beach town Vila Nova de Milfontes with beautiful bay, beach and shopping
*   Visit to Malhao beach for surfing or relaxing
*   Roundtrip Airport Transfer service to and from Lisbon International Airport

*   Airfare to/from Lisbon International airport (LIS)
*   Travel Visa not needed for US or Canadian citizens *Subject to change per government rules & regulations
*   Travel Insurance (medical & trip cancellation) is mandatory to protect you in case of any unforeseen emergencies. Proof of purchase is required before trip departure.
*   Optional/extra activities, massages, surf or SUP lessons
*   Gratuities/souvenirs – at your own discretion

Herdade da Matinha is a secluded paradise in Alentejo, Portugal, where rustic charm meets refined simplicity. Nestled among rolling hills and golden plains, just a short drive from the wild Atlantic coast, this boutique retreat offers tranquility, connection, and inspiration. hits.content:
## [My parisian life](https://myparisianlife.com/)

![My parisian life](https://myparisianlife.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/White-Aesthetic-Modern-Fashion-News-Email-Header.png)

# Travel: Wellness Yoga Retreat in Lisbon

How do you feel about yoga in general? Be really honest.

If you’re like me you may like yoga but hate (oh gosh such as strong word – I toyed with actually replacing it with dislike) self-proclaimed yogis – I tend to shun anything that has a this is how you should live persecution. And even though I enjoyed yoga in my twenties in NYC, in Paris I often found that (outside of my close group of yoga Teacher pals) it’s just a world I didn’t feel comfortable with. I felt like I was the odd man out what with my love of wine, good food including meat and obscene aversion from hideous long crotch orange cotton pants that scream – see look at me I’ve studied at the ashram India under the tutelage of such and such guru ok, maybe I’m being bit too bashful here but you get how I feel about yoga right??

So for all intents and purpose, I never do yoga with people who don’t look like me or share similar values. I’m not a puritan in any sense and enjoy a #slowlife but I’ve found its a place where so many worlds contradict; we see more elitism, separationist doctrines ( there are so many different forms of yogas, gurus) and institutionalized classism rather than a focus on having people living happier healthy (er) lives.

For years I was left asking where is the yoga for people who want to progress to their best self but without feeling the shame of prejudice and where it financially advantages to do it on a sustainable basis.

If you know me you know I’m all about democracy and sustainability in choices.

![yoga retreat lisbon ](https://i0.wp.com/myparisianlife.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/DSC_4808.jpg?resize=1100%2C736&ssl=1)

![yoga retreat lisbon ](https://i0.wp.com/myparisianlife.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/DSC_4808.jpg?resize=1100%2C736&ssl=1)

One of the best experiences of my life was this past summer in Trafaria Lisbon – 20 mins outside Lisbon is a little beach town, well rather fishing village with the cutest mix of local dilapidated hand-made homes and more fancy homes. The sound of birds chirping and dogs walking around is the scene every morning, and in the evening as we had dinner we looked out at the most beautiful deep pink sky above the softest ivory sands at your feet.

Sounds like a dream!

But this was really the scene for a week of wellness, vegetarian eating and yoga twice a day. You can see more of [my yoga retreat photos here on exposure.](https://myparisianlife.exposure.co/vegan-yoga-retreat)

![yoga wellness retreat michelle Baantna Yoga](https://i0.wp.com/myparisianlife.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/DSC_4822.jpg?resize=1100%2C736&ssl=1)

![yoga wellness retreat michelle Baantna Yoga](https://i0.wp.com/myparisianlife.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/DSC_4822.jpg?resize=1100%2C736&ssl=1)

My hat goes off to the most peaceful voice and patient bomb ass yoga teacher I know – Michelle for being so present with us and never with a judgmental energy. I tried to record our sessions a few times on my iPhone, so I could try following her voice instructions when I got back home ( I sort of “hate” going to a class to do yoga back in Paris).

??![Mardi Chef wellnes retreat lisbon ](https://i0.wp.com/myparisianlife.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/20151008_140414.jpg?resize=1100%2C619&ssl=1) ![Yanique in paris - travel blogger wellness retreat lisbon ](https://i0.wp.com/myparisianlife.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/20151008_140711.jpg?resize=1100%2C619&ssl=1)

![Mardi Chef wellnes retreat lisbon ](https://i0.wp.com/myparisianlife.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/20151008_140414.jpg?resize=1100%2C619&ssl=1)
![Yanique in paris - travel blogger wellness retreat lisbon ](https://i0.wp.com/myparisianlife.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/20151008_140711.jpg?resize=1100%2C619&ssl=1)

So fancy my surprise when I learned that :

**A.** Next trip is for June in the south of France – same small group feel with two of the most awesome people I’ve now come to call gals pals – Michelle teaching Vinyasa yoga and Mardi cooking up her yummy (SERIOUSLY YUMMY – no pasty looking bland food) vegetarian and organic dishes.

***Email me and I’ll send you the South of France Wellness PDF** ( I’ve tried putting it here – but I’m not too techy with that!). Email –**myparisianlife (at) gmail.com***

**B.** Michelle and Sebastian (they get the cute couple award!) has just launched this cool video service to do yoga at home! Follow their [Facebook page, Baantna Yoga for more details.](https://www.facebook.com/BaantnaYoga/)

Here’s what they have to say

With Baantna Yoga we hope to create and hold a place for you to experience the blissful and wholesome sensation in body & mind of exploring your practice. A place for you to stay connected to the natural simplicity of your yoga practice no more complications, pricy studios and images of a yogi lifestyle which you feel like, you cannot live up to. Instead this place where everyone for him or her self can explore what, in our eyes, yoga simply is: a beautiful practice of self-exploration and self-understanding. A practice which opens the doors to yourself, so that you can rediscover and reconnect to your human default state of contentment and happiness.

Escaping from the hectic daily routine? A place where you can completely unwind is within reach. Grab a cup of tea and take a look at our carefully curated selection of hotels and accommodations specializing in your well-being, self-reflection, healing, and personal growth.

hits.title: Wellness retreat | Terra Quinta
hits.snippet:
###### Yoga & Sun

# with Nikkie Timney

Treat yourself to a gentle and nourishing escape alongside the charming Nikkie Timney, in a yoga retreat designed for both body and mind. Each day, enjoy two yoga sessions to help you reconnect, breathe deeply, and restore your energy. In between practices, unwind with soothing massages, relax by the pool, and take time just for yourself. A truly rejuvenating experience, where well-being is also found in shared moments and simple pleasures.

​

Number of spots: 20 participants

in  English

Capture d’écran 2025-03-07 à 09.48.34.png

June 4th 9th - 2027

###### SAMADHI FLOW

# with Olivia Tüscher

Whether you are an experienced yogi or a beginner, this retreat is an opportunity to deepen your practice and explore new techniques. [...] 5 nights of yoga, sunshine and renewal just outside Lisbon

We’re returning to one of our favourite retreat venues — Terra Quinta — for an unforgettable Ashtanga & Rocket Immersion in the Portuguese sunshine.

With our signature “up to 8 hours of yoga per day”, you’ll experience everything (and more!) that you’d expect from an Ashtanga Cheshire Studio immersion.

​

Number of spots: 25 participants

in English

Nathalie Nadeau Chamane Urbaine roue.jpg

October 25 > 29 - 2026

###### POWER & ALIGNMENT

# with Nathalie Nadeau

Nathalie invites you on an inner journey — a path of transformation and release.  
Throughout the sessions, blockages dissolve, intuition awakens, and a benevolent power can finally shine through. [...] Over the course of three days, you’ll enjoy a nourishing blend of yoga, mindful walks, self-development workshops, coaching, meditation, breathwork, journaling, and sound baths..

It’s time to rest, time to realign, and time to remember what truly matters: you.

​

Limited spots: 20 participants  
Retreat language: English

Posture méditative des mains

September 19 > 23th - 2026

###### Introspection

# with Warren McCaig

Finding Your Balance

​

Throughout the retreat, participants will have opportunities for one-on-one sessions with experienced facilitators in a safe and supportive environment, designed to allow deep insights and healing to emerge.

At Terra Quinta, we offer diversified wellness retreats, bringing together a range of practices

to nourish body, mind and soul, such as:

 Meditation / Yoga / Family Constellations / Fasting / Nature Walks /

Ceramic / Arttherapy / Silence / Pilates / Sound Baths / Surfing Initiation

Each retreat is a unique journey, orchestrated by passionate and expert speakers

from the four corners of the globe.

A stay at Terra Quinta is an opportunity to disconnect from everyday life

and reconnect in a serene and enchanting setting.

Join us for a transformative and immersive experience where well-being

and personal fulfillment are at the heart of every moment.

hits.title: From Lisbon to yoga - Wolfs Yoga
hits.snippet:
Make your way to Bélem district to visit Museu de Arte Popular (contemporary & modern art), MAAT,  the Monastery ‘Mosteiro Jerónimos’ for its beautiful architecture combined with the Santa Maria de Bélem church and the ‘Torre de Bélem’. In between, you can walk to ‘Pasteis de Bélem’, the perfect place to try the most delicious ‘Pasteis de nata’ on earth. Around late lunch time, continue your journey towards the LxFactory, a cultural hub where you can find food, drinks, street art, boutique shops and a cool atmosphere of contemporary Lisbon.

Have a wonderful trip!  
 Much love, Wolfs Yoga

Lisbon City | Wolfs Yoga Retreats Portugal

Lot in Lisbon | Wolfs Yoga Retreat Portugal

### Getting there and away [...] It’s December and the sun is shining. I wear a thick sweater only and enjoy the springlike weather. It’s only a few degrees colder here then in the Algarve, where Wolfs Yoga is located.

Combine your Yoga Retreat with a city trip to Lisbon. As a solo traveller, I found it fun, easy and safe to get around. Add a few days before or after your Wolfs Yoga Retreat and enjoy the cultural experience of the capital of Portugal. It’s a beautiful city worth a visit!

Book Your Yoga Retreat

### Day 1

#### Old Town [...] If you have time left, make your way to ‘Museu Calouste Gulbenkian’, the Museum of Modern Art or go to Museu de Arte Popular (contemporary & modern art). An alternative option would be the LxFactory area, described in day 2. The day flew by and I make my way to my hotel, to have a rest and a tea before dinner. There are plenty of restaurants to choose from, but just to make sure I added a selection of vegan, vegetarian and fish restaurants for you.

Lisbon View | Wolfs Yoga Retreat Portugal

Lisbon Street Art | Wolfs Yoga Retreats Portugal

From Lisbon to yoga

### Day 2

#### Bélem and LxFactory

As I only had one and a half day, this is still about to happen, but this is what I wóuld do!
hits.content:
[![WOLFS YOGA](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIzMDAiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwIiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMzAwIDEwMCI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgZmlsbD0iI2NmZDRkYiIvPjwvc3ZnPg==)](https://wolfsyoga.com/)

# From Lisbon to yoga

## a perfect combination

![Lisbon | Wolfs Yoga Retreats Portugal](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIxNjAwIiBoZWlnaHQ9IjgwMCIgdmlld0JveD0iMCAwIDE2MDAgODAwIj48cmVjdCB3aWR0aD0iMTAwJSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxMDAlIiBmaWxsPSIjY2ZkNGRiIi8+PC9zdmc+ "Lisbon | Wolfs Yoga Retreats Portugal")

**Wandering through the narrow cobbled stone streets of Lisbon, I find a cosy café to have a freshly baked ‘pasteis de nata’ and a ‘bica’. The local Portuguese crispy custard delight with a small strong coffee. I let sink in and enjoy my impressions of this morning.**

I stay in the neighbourhood of Bairro Alto, a 10 minute stroll away from basically everything. My hotel is very comfortable and cosy, the staff simply brilliant. They make you feel home away from home and have lots of insider tips. Love it. There is a living room where you can have a rest during the day ánd they serve a delicious breakfast in the morning. And as some of you know me, I LOVE food, so that’s a big plus.

It’s December and the sun is shining. I wear a thick sweater only and enjoy the springlike weather. It’s only a few degrees colder here then in the Algarve, where Wolfs Yoga is located.

**Combine your Yoga Retreat with a city trip to Lisbon**. As a solo traveller, I found it fun, easy and safe to get around. Add a few days before or after your Wolfs Yoga Retreat and enjoy the cultural experience of the capital of Portugal. It’s a beautiful city worth a visit!

[Book Your Yoga Retreat](https://wolfsyoga.com/yoga-retreats-algarve-portugal/)

### Day 1

#### Old Town

From Rossio train station, which has a beautiful Art Deco facade, walk to **Miradouro de Graça**, a beautiful viewpoint surrounded by trees and if you’re lucky, a musician basking on the little square. It all adds up ;) From here, slowly descend into **Alfama**, the old city, strolling around its narrow windy roads. Forget about your map and follow that what you see, to decide your direction. If you prefer a beautiful fixed route, the old **tram 28**, passes through the area. You could take the tram or walk part of the route instead. **Castelo de S. Jorge** has a beautiful viewpoint worth the climb. There are plenty of nice cafes for a coffee or a tea in Alfama. End your walk at the beautiful **Sé Cathedral**, on the edge of Alfama and **the waterfront** of the Tagus river.

Close to the Sé Cathedral, lies **Praça do Comércia**, a beautiful square. Take your time to enjoy the waterfront. Breathe in the atmosphere of old Lisbon. Old ladies sell chestnuts from their small food stalls for a snack. Make your way to **‘Manteigaria’** one of the best ‘pasteis de nata’ cafes in the city. Warm, crispy, perfectly sweet and fresh out of the oven. There is only one place more recommended, which is the birthplace of this local delicacy. I’ll share the address with you below, as well as some nice café’s and restaurants.

If you have time left, make your way to **‘Museu Calouste Gulbenkian’**, the Museum of Modern Art or go to Museu de Arte Popular (contemporary & modern art). An alternative option would be the **LxFactory** area, described in day 2. The day flew by and I make my way to my hotel, to have a rest and a tea before dinner. There are plenty of restaurants to choose from, but just to make sure I added a selection of **vegan, vegetarian** and fish restaurants for you.

![Lisbon View | Wolfs Yoga Retreat Portugal](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI4MDAiIGhlaWdodD0iNTcyIiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgODAwIDU3MiI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgZmlsbD0iI2NmZDRkYiIvPjwvc3ZnPg== "Lisbon View | Wolfs Yoga Retreat Portugal")

![Lisbon Street Art | Wolfs Yoga Retreats Portugal](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI4MDAiIGhlaWdodD0iNTcyIiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgODAwIDU3MiI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgZmlsbD0iI2NmZDRkYiIvPjwvc3ZnPg== "Lisbon Street Art | Wolfs Yoga Retreats Portugal")

![From Lisbon to yoga](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI4MDAiIGhlaWdodD0iNTcyIiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgODAwIDU3MiI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgZmlsbD0iI2NmZDRkYiIvPjwvc3ZnPg== "pastel-de-nata")

### Day 2

#### Bélem and LxFactory

As I only had one and a half day, this is still about to happen, but this is what I wóuld do!

Make your way to Bélem district to visit Museu de Arte Popular (contemporary & modern art), MAAT,  the Monastery ‘Mosteiro Jerónimos’ for its beautiful architecture combined with the Santa Maria de Bélem church and the ‘Torre de Bélem’. In between, you can walk to ‘Pasteis de Bélem’, the perfect place to try the most delicious ‘Pasteis de nata’ on earth. Around late lunch time, continue your journey towards the LxFactory, a cultural hub where you can find food, drinks, street art, boutique shops and a cool atmosphere of contemporary Lisbon.

Have a wonderful trip!  
 **Much love, Wolfs Yoga**

![Lisbon City | Wolfs Yoga Retreats Portugal](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI4MDAiIGhlaWdodD0iNTcyIiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgODAwIDU3MiI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgZmlsbD0iI2NmZDRkYiIvPjwvc3ZnPg== "Lisbon City | Wolfs Yoga Retreats Portugal")

![Lot in Lisbon | Wolfs Yoga Retreat Portugal](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI4MDAiIGhlaWdodD0iNTcyIiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgODAwIDU3MiI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgZmlsbD0iI2NmZDRkYiIvPjwvc3ZnPg== "Lot in Lisbon | Wolfs Yoga Retreat Portugal")

### Getting there and away

There is now a direct bus from Lisbon (Sete Rios Bus station) to Vila (do) Bispo bus station, the village Wolfs Yoga is located in. Duration: 4 hours. From Lisbon there is a metro that brings you directly downtown in only 10 minutes. Costs bus ticket: 20€ Reserve online before departure. It will fill up. Our info is updated December 2019, routes and prices are subject to change.

[Bus Schedule & Tickets](https://www.rede-expressos.pt/en)

#### The Hotel I stayed in

[Casa Das Janelas Com Vista](https://www.casadasjanelascomvista.com), a home away from home, quiet street, central location, very friendly staff. | [Google Maps](https://goo.gl/maps/zRTcR5hBgwCbVuGy5)  
 Tip: The view is said to be better from a small room. There are of course numerous amount of hotels. Prices here start at 55€ per night..

# U P C O M I N G R E T R E A T S

@pasco.photography_-85.jpg [...] Pam Ronstadt (US, Yoga Teacher)
 ## As a yoga teacher and experienced yoga retreat facilitator I can highly recommend this beautiful place! It is surrounded by untouched nature, has a beautiful garden and one very well equipped indoor Shala and the most beautiful outdoor Shala in the woods! This place is easy accessible but also secluded at the same time. The main house has 3 fire places and makes everyone feel at home. Also, discover the amazing outdoor shower, your participants will have a beautiful time there reconnecting with nature. Looking forward to host our next retreat there!

  Karoline Cass (Yoga Teacher)

# HOSTING A RETREAT? [...] CECILLE, FRANCE
 ## Thank you for being the home for my retreat this Autumn. Your venue is the perfect environment for a quiet homecoming. The converted greenhouse is so special, rooms are cosy and comfortable and so much land to wander and explore. Will be back to experience this magical place in the summer!

  Lizzie Hawes (UK, Facilitator)
 ## I just finished hosting a weeks retreat at The Shanti Space and cannot wait to find an opportunity to return. The space is magical, with paths that led to new discoveries and peaceful moments. The Yoga shala is well equipped and absolutely lovely to practice in. The outdoor shala is also a treat. The space itself is comfortable with a farmhouse rustic but modern vibe. A lovely space to host a retreat.
hits.content:
[Find us on Google+](https://plus.google.com/107014623782625395399) Retreats

[Skip to Content](#page) 

[![The Shanti Space Portugal](//images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5341e997e4b02bd951e1a50e/82366811-645a-4001-a0d6-2a3dc14028d9/Horizontal+Logo+White.png?format=1500w)](/)

[UPCOMING RETREATS](/upcoming-retreats)

[![The Shanti Space Portugal](//images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5341e997e4b02bd951e1a50e/82366811-645a-4001-a0d6-2a3dc14028d9/Horizontal+Logo+White.png?format=1500w)](/)

[UPCOMING RETREATS](/upcoming-retreats)



![www.pasco.photography-54.jpg]()

# Nourishing Sanctuary with *Soul*.

THE SHANTI SPACE, PORTUGAL

[RETREATS](/upcoming-retreats)

# S H A N T I

# *“The Peace which passeth understanding.”* - T. S. Eliot

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5341e997e4b02bd951e1a50e/da2e569b-94a3-46e9-afd4-487eb88c3fa5/IMG-20180930-WA0005%7E2.jpg)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5341e997e4b02bd951e1a50e/1549482976170-FLBFNENL6YEJ4JHMRTU9/46801518_776317899205474_2152263147736530944_o.jpg)

![AM_MotionPotion-1.jpg]()

# W E L C O M E

Nestled in a beautiful woodland valley, only half an hour from Lisbon and fifteen minutes from Ericeira beach, The Shanti Space is a nourishing family-run sanctuary for retreat, to rest and restore well-being whilst bathed in the   
loving embrace of nature.

*We’re happy to share that all our water is restructured & our centre has low EMF.*

## [VISITS BY APPOINTMENT ONLY](mailto:info@theshantispace.com?subject=Visit)

### **We love animals however as we already accommodate creatures here please do not bring dogs or any other animals**

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5341e997e4b02bd951e1a50e/0b186a5b-882f-48af-8de3-bad5336bcfbb/private+ensuite.jpg)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5341e997e4b02bd951e1a50e/7979952f-8968-4aed-ae07-6e24e7932dd7/AM_shantispace_neutral-32.jpg)

## Winter Residency

## 1 December - 1 March 2025

This winter, we’re opening the doors of The Shanti Space for a three-month winter residence — an opportunity to live in our peaceful retreat sanctuary and be held by the beauty of nature.  
  
Residents have full access to our yoga shala, yoga deck, and lush gardens for personal practice, creativity, and rest.   
  
The space offers five beautiful king bedrooms along with a spacious communal kitchen, wifi connection, and structured water throughout the property.  
  
Come and spend the winter months living simply, tending the fire, and resting deeply in the nurturing energy of The Shanti Space.  
  
If you’d like to learn more or register your interest to this unique opportunity, please contact [jack@theshantispace.com](mailto:jack@theshantispace.com?subject=winter%20residency)

[Sign up](mailto:jack@theshantispace.com?subject=winter%20residency)

* ![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5341e997e4b02bd951e1a50e/97f73492-78cb-4e40-b61c-030fd5f5e051/Screenshot+2024-05-30+at+14.55.55.png)

  ## KIRTAN

  *Night of Alchemy*

  Gather in community, meditation & kirtan as we honour the divine, elevate & unite our spirits in song.

  [REGISTER](/kirtan)
* ![UPCOMING RETREATS & TRAININGS](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5341e997e4b02bd951e1a50e/86b5e739-58e8-422c-8418-186dbf627119/AM_EllenArthur_Retreat-234.jpg)

  ## UPCOMING RETREATS & TRAININGS

  This year, we have an incredible array of teachers and facilitators from all over the world sharing their knowledge and guiding inspiring processes of transformation, facilitating learning experiences to deepen your path and practice while nourishing the roots of your being.

  [YES PLEASE](/upcoming-retreats)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5341e997e4b02bd951e1a50e/d296d6e4-d62e-47b3-9045-af623c7ff8ed/AM_shantispace_neutral-132-min.jpg)

LOVELY THINGS PEOPLE SAY

* ## Wonderful place! The name couldn't fit better. A beautiful experience surrounded by nature, lovely hosts, delicious and homemade veggie food and amazing yoga classes! Everything we needed to breathe and recharge our energy from daily stresses of life.

  VERA, PORTUGAL
* ## I had fantastic days at The Shanti Space.It's the perfect place to quieten your mind and reconnect with yourself.Can highly recommend to visit and participate in the events and treatments.

  FLORIAN, AUSTRIA
* ## The perfect place to go for a retreat. The place is magical and the hosts are so nice and wonderful. I truly recommend!

  MARGARIE, BELGIUM
* ## This is really the right place for a peaceful moment. Everything is present to make your journey wonderful! Thank you with all my heart!

  GAELLE, SWITZERLAND
* ## Amazing! The Shanti Space full of warmth, love, presence, amazing and evermore vegan food, lots of creativity, details, passion, and care. With beautiful nature around, the permaculture garden and so much more.

  EVELYN, SWITZERLAND
* ## The Shanti Space was a lovely discovery. The perfect space to reconnect body, mind & spirit. You will leave feeling grateful & peaceful.

  CAROLINE, CANADA
* ## I spent a wonderful time at The Shanti Space. The place, the atmosphere, the shala, the good food, the good beds…. All inspire Peace. Thank you for all your attentions

  CECILLE, FRANCE
* ## Thank you for being the home for my retreat this Autumn. Your venue is the perfect environment for a quiet homecoming. The converted greenhouse is so special, rooms are cosy and comfortable and so much land to wander and explore. Will be back to experience this magical place in the summer!

  Lizzie Hawes (UK, Facilitator)
* ## I just finished hosting a weeks retreat at The Shanti Space and cannot wait to find an opportunity to return. The space is magical, with paths that led to new discoveries and peaceful moments. The Yoga shala is well equipped and absolutely lovely to practice in. The outdoor shala is also a treat. The space itself is comfortable with a farmhouse rustic but modern vibe. A lovely space to host a retreat.

  Pam Ronstadt (US, Yoga Teacher)
* ## As a yoga teacher and experienced yoga retreat facilitator I can highly recommend this beautiful place! It is surrounded by untouched nature, has a beautiful garden and one very well equipped indoor Shala and the most beautiful outdoor Shala in the woods! This place is easy accessible but also secluded at the same time. The main house has 3 fire places and makes everyone feel at home. Also, discover the amazing outdoor shower, your participants will have a beautiful time there reconnecting with nature. Looking forward to host our next retreat there!

  Karoline Cass (Yoga Teacher)

# HOSTING A RETREAT?

We offer our venue for hire between Spring and Autumn each year and are happy to support retreat leaders in curating a beautiful unique experience for their guests. Whether you wish to run a workshop, a host retreat or run a training course, we have a beautiful space available to host your gathering.

Our farm is the perfect venue for retreats and trainings as the lands compliment and support the pursuit of inner development and calm abiding.

[Learn more](/hire)
