Take the quiet time you need to replenish. Opt into the social time to connect. Indulge in gourmet meals and sleep to nourish. Take walks in nature to balance your energy, and explore a new place to delight the senses.

### About the Retreat

![](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/02_TNP_5417-e1663541238961.jpg)
![](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/MG_4028-e1663541218731.jpg)
![](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/279573260_5085131444937721_1390220019739152358_n-e1663541795844.jpeg)
![](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/IMG_2497_AF-e1663541440466.jpg)
![](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/beach-path-1.jpeg)
![](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/areias-do-seixo-villas-galleryrestaurante-noah-surf-house-4--e1663541840104.jpeg)
![](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/IMG_1454-e1663541391963.jpg)
![](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/IMG_4061-e1663541462725.jpg)
![](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/eventos-areias-do-seixo-galeria032-scaled-e1663541369467.jpg)
![](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/16_IMG_1358_AF-e1663541268167.jpg)

#### **Fresh Air on the Atlantic Ocean**

The hotel’s eco-design is casual luxury and has a pervasive theme of nature with earth tones and colorful, ethnic accents throughout the property. This hotel’s ecological principles of sustainable tourism include efficient, renewable energies of geothermal energy and solar power, and the use of natural resources, like ocean breezes. Some of the resort’s unique features are:

## Included in the Retreat

The Portugal yoga retreat encourages one to find balance and rest in a unique eco-resort immersed in nature and nestled next to the Atlantic.

# Retreat Price & Accommodations

\*Inquire about availability before booking.\* Prices below are per person in USD.

### Deluxe Room

Each room is decorated in its own unique style and designed for a different sensory experience. All rooms have private spacious bathrooms and a view of the sand dunes and ocean. Rooms are set back from the cliffs and beach by about 300 meters. Each room has the following:

**June 2 – 9: \* SOLD OUT; waitlist only \*  
June 11 – 18: \* ONLY 4 ROOMS OPEN \***

**$4,690 – Single Room  
$3,150 per person – Double Room**

### Three- or Four-bedroom Villa

The two-story villas are set just behind the main hotel area and are great for groups traveling together. Each bedroom has a private bathroom. *All bedrooms need to be booked to reserve the villa.*

**$4,590 – Single Room  
$3,100 per person – Double Room**

### FAQ

**Included in the Portugal Yoga Retreat:**

**Not Included in Portugal Yoga Retreat Cost:**

Book your flight to Lisbon international airport (**LIS**). If you’re flying from North America there are direct flights from eastern cities. Check with TAP Air, Portugal’s airline. The retreat location is about an hour drive north from Lisbon (61 km). A private transfer costs about €100 per trip (not per person). You also can rent a car from Lisbon. You will receive more information about transfers when you sign up.

If you are traveling from the U.S. or Canada, try to arrive a day or two early to adjust to the new time zone. You will be in better shape to fully enjoy your retreat. A few days in Lisbon is well worth it!

Plan to arrive at the retreat hotel by mid-afternoon on the first day. Check-in is at 4:00 pm. Check-out is at 12:00 pm. The retreat ends on the last day after breakfast.

The retreat leader is [Sandra Tedeschi](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/about/), the owner of Vajra Sol.

Each morning we have a 2-hour dynamic slow flow vinyasa yoga class combined with transformative breathing exercises. Each class is themed in a yogic teaching or philosophy that ties to the asana practice. Three afternoons include restorative yoga, meditation, and other non-asana practices.

These practices lead one to quiet the mind and enter a restful state of relaxation. With the over-stimulation of our senses in today’s modern lifestyle, the nervous system can have a harder time accessing a fully relaxed state which can lead to burn-out or illness.

As a preventive or therapeutic modality, these time-proven yoga practices can help the body’s system realign with one’s natural state and rejuvenate for optimal well-being.

All levels of yoga, beginner to seasoned, are welcome. Start where you are.

On the Portugal yoga retreat breakfasts or brunches, three light lunches, and some dinners will be on property. Other dinners will be at the hotel’s beachfront restaurant a few minutes’ drive away. One dinner is not included so you can explore on your own at a restaurant in the nearby town of Santa Cruz. The hotel has a café-bar where you can order tea, homemade sweets, appetizers, snacks, and alcoholic drinks. Vegetarian dishes are offered for all meals.

Special diets can be accommodated (tasty vegetarian and vegan offered). Please let us know when you make your booking.

You will have plenty of free time to fill as you like or simply enjoy our host hotel’s amenities.

**What is the group size for this retreat?**

The retreat is limited to 15 persons to maintain general comfort for group travel and to allow for personalized attention to each participant.

This retreat is for the yoga-inspired traveler who appreciates finely curated travel experiences with a small group of like-minded people. We take care of all the planning. You only need to book your plane ticket and pack your bags. Solo travelers are very welcome!

A **non-refundable $1,000 deposit** is required to confirm your reservation.

Portugal is a popular destination and our retreat hotel books out months to a year in advance. To sign up for this retreat please [complete a reservation form](https://www.vajrasoltravel.com/register_for_a_retreat.shtml).

After sending in your reservation you will receive a pre-retreat handout with more details to help you prepare for your trip to Portugal. The final payment is due 90 days before the retreat start date.

Should you need to cancel your reservation, for whatever reason, we will not be able to provide a refund or credit for any payment made.

The only exception is if your spot can be filled then your payment can either be refunded less a $150 cancelation fee or receive full credit for another Vajra Sol retreat within one year.

No refunds are provided for arriving late or departing the retreat early, for activities or meals in which one does not participate.

If *force majeure* (e.g. pandemic, natural disaster, government travel restrictions, etc.) causes a retreat to be canceled we will offer alternative dates to reschedule the retreat within one year. In this case, there is **no refund of payments** when a retreat cannot be held due to causes beyond our control.

If you are unable to join at the rescheduled date, full or partial credit of your payment may be applicable towards another Vajra Sol retreat. This will be determined at the time as it depends on how far out it is from the retreat dates.

In the unlikely event Vajra Sol needs to cancel a retreat for a non-*force majeure*reason a full refund will be given. Vajra Sol will not be held liable for any expenses incurred by the participant for a retreat canceled either by the participant or by Vajra Sol.

We strongly advise on the**[purchase of travel insurance](https://www.imglobal.com/img-producer-insurance-plans?imgac=80001755)** at the time of booking your retreat in the case of any unexpected events or changes to your plans before or during your trip.

[Trip insurance is strongly recommended](https://www.imglobal.com/img-producer-insurance-plans?imgac=80001755) for coverage of any unplanned changes that may occur before or during your trip, such as trip cancelation or delayed flights, lost luggage, emergency medical assistance, and more. Check with **[IMGlobal for insurance coverage](https://www.imglobal.com/img-producer-insurance-plans?imgac=80001755)** that meets your needs.

# Retreat Center in Sintra, Portugal

Come and join us on a journey to connect with your authentic self, find peace and stillness within, and learn tools that will support you in your everyday life.

## ABOUT SHAMBALLAH RETREATS

Shamballah is the perfect place to unwind, relax and connect with like minded people and the beauty of the natural world. Our retreat center is located in Sintra National Park, by the stunning coastline with unspoiled beaches, sacred hill and lush countryside. A place we call home and that you can feel at home. After living in a school of meditation for many years, we created this healing retreat Shamballah to share the teachings that cultivate wellbeing and to continue our practice on a daily basis.

![Clickcease](https://monitor.clickcease.com/stats/stats.aspx)
![Shamballah Retreat Center in Sintra, Portugal](https://shamballahretreats.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/shamballah-logo.png?x97455)

# Retreat Center in Sintra, Portugal

Come and join us on a journey to connect with your authentic self, find peace and stillness within, and learn tools that will support you in your everyday life.

## ABOUT SHAMBALLAH RETREATS

Shamballah is the perfect place to unwind, relax and connect with like minded people and the beauty of the natural world. Our retreat center is located in Sintra National Park, by the stunning coastline with unspoiled beaches, sacred hill and lush countryside. A place we call home and that you can feel at home. After living in a school of meditation for many years, we created this healing retreat Shamballah to share the teachings that cultivate wellbeing and to continue our practice on a daily basis.

## WHAT TO EXPECT DURING YOUR RETREAT AT SHAMBALLAH

![The dining room](https://shamballahretreats.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/shamballah-retreats-2023-10.jpg?x97455)

### Delicious Vegetarian Food

Our food is a highlight for many of our guests and one of the reasons why we were considered one of the best retreats in Portugal. We created a menu with influences from around the world, using fresh local and mostly organic ingredients. You will get delicious freshly baked bread daily and seasonal fruits and diverse meals to show examples of how to prepare a healthy and delicious meal.

### Revitalising Activities

In the Forest therapy you will be guided to slow down, connect to your senses and rhythm in a conscious way. Surfing is a playful and fun way to immerse oneself in the healing qualities of the Ocean. Sound journeys can be very powerful and create a space for deep relaxation and transformation. Guided walks can be gentle yet powerful way to exercise our body while exploring the beauty of the Natural world.

![Man meditating by ocean in sintra portugal](https://shamballahretreats.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/shamballah-retreats-2023-8.jpg?x97455)
![Massage on a table in Sintra](https://shamballahretreats.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/shamballah-treatments-home-1.jpg?x97455)

### Healing Treatments

We offer different types of healing massage therapies and all of them have a holistic approach to the state of wellbeing.  
Ayurvedic massage is a full body treatment that stimulates the blood circulation, respiratory system and the body’s vital energy.  
ZenShiatsu is a unique form of bodywork that pressure of specific points that help relate blockage.  
Watsu is a magical combination of Shiatsu in Water, with supported flotation in a beautiful water Temple, this experience allows us to go into deep states of inner listening.

### Yoga and Meditation Practices

Patricia has been teaching different types of body work for more than 30 years. Her classes combine her extensive knowledge of anatomy and mind/body function with the more metaphysical world of Chakras. [+ info](https://shamballahretreats.com/about/#patricia)

Zarqa shares different meditation and breathing exercises that can be energising or deeply relaxing, developing the mental skills and tools to be more present, aware and connected so that you can make more conscious and positive decisions. [+ info](https://shamballahretreats.com/about/#zarqa)

![group yoga session at yoga retreat portugal](https://shamballahretreats.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/shamballah-retreats-2023-3.jpg?x97455)

## ABOUT SHAMBALLAH RETREAT CENTER

![Meditation by the sea in Sintra, Portugal](https://shamballahretreats.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/shamballah-retreats-surf-7.jpg?x97455)

### Location & Surroundings

With an extensive beach along the cliffs Praia da Aguda is wild and beautiful the access is for the adventurous ones but beauty and tranquility awaits at the end of the stairs. Along the coast, 2 km each way, you will find Magoito beach and Azenhas do Mar, a beautiful and awe-inspiring village perched on the cliffs.

This location is ideal for long walks of exploration and close contact with Nature ́s beauty. We are 10 minutes drive from Sintra ́s Cultural landscape, classified by UNESCO as World Heritage. Its Parks, Palaces, and Natural beauty will definitely nourish your senses and imagination.

### Our Place

The venue is a high-quality house that can accommodate 11 persons in 4 bedrooms, a spacious master bedroom, one triple ensuite room, and two twin rooms.

The house is quite spacious with lots of light. We have a couple of rooms to read an inspiring book, connect with others and have a wonderful Ayurvedic and organic tea.  
We have all the props you need for yoga and meditation, so there is no need to bring your own.

![View from accommodation at Shamballah Retreat Center in Sintra, Portugal](https://shamballahretreats.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/shamballah-retreats-39.jpg?x97455)

## BENEFITS OF OUR YOGA RETREATS

### Learn skills and tools that promote well being.

Rest, relax your body, mind and spirit and come back to a space of balance and equilibrium.

Recharge your energy levels, find inspiration and motivation to create positive changes in your life.

Reset your sleeping patterns and come back to a more natural rhythm.

Learn about the importance of a healthy diet and get recipes for healthy living.

## WHAT OUR STUDENTS SAY

## HOW TO BOOK YOUR RETREAT AT SHAMBALLAH

Once you decide which program better suits your needs, click on the book now button.

You will directed to a new page where you can choose the number of guests for the booking, the date and after completing your information you can choose the accommodation.

This will give you a total cost and we will send you a confirmation email with a link to pay a deposit of 30% to secure your reservation.

![](https://shamballahretreats.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/retreat-1.jpg?x97455)

### All programs have a the same basic structure, that includes:

## FOLLOW US ON INSTAGRAM
